name: Katherine Clark
subject: When we elect more women into office, we all do better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59838633/395233019/610558824?amount=15&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.07_b1_kc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjIxZmIyNi00NWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zTdDJcFOhixql26iwKmiFSeY1_pdtKwgPm-O2C4m0sg=) Happy Women’s History Month!

My name is Katherine Clark, and I proudly serve Massachusetts’ 5th district in Congress. I am also in House leadership serving as the Democratic Whip.

When I first came to Congress in 2013, there weren’t many women serving alongside me. Multiple times, I was stopped and mistaken for someone’s spouse, and I had a hard time even getting into the Chamber.

Thankfully, walking through the halls of Congress in 2023 is much different. **There are more women serving in Congress than ever before — 93 women in the House Democratic Caucus alone!**

I’ve been adamant about helping elect more women to Congress, because the truth is that for generations, we’ve failed to address the persistent challenges faced by women, especially by women of color.

**And with MAGA extremists in the House majority threatening to take us back even further, the stakes of our work couldn’t be higher.**

**[That’s why I’m writing to you today. We need strong women in Congress, and I’m asking you to support that effort by splitting a contribution between my campaign and Nikki Budzinski to elect more women into office.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59838634/395233020/610558824?amount=15&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.07_b1_kc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjIxZmIyNi00NWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zTdDJcFOhixql26iwKmiFSeY1_pdtKwgPm-O2C4m0sg=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be immediately split between Nikki Budzinski and Katherine Clark._ | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59838635/395233021/-1597826413?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.07_b1_kc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjIxZmIyNi00NWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zTdDJcFOhixql26iwKmiFSeY1_pdtKwgPm-O2C4m0sg=)

[CUSTOM AMOUNT »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59838640/395233026/-1597826413?express_lane=true&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.07_b1_kc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjIxZmIyNi00NWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zTdDJcFOhixql26iwKmiFSeY1_pdtKwgPm-O2C4m0sg=)
Effective leadership isn’t about individual ambition. It’s about our collective good.

Lifting up others is a core value of mine — I strongly believe that when we elect more women to positions of power, we _all_ do better.

**Together, Nikki and I will continue the fight for gender equity and women’s rights, and with your support, elect even more candidates who are committed to building the kind of country and future that our daughters deserve.**

[**So please, if you can afford to, split a contribution today between my campaign and Nikki Budzinski and help us fulfill the country’s promise of equality and opportunity for all.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59838641/395233027/610558824?amount=15&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.07_b1_kc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjIxZmIyNi00NWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zTdDJcFOhixql26iwKmiFSeY1_pdtKwgPm-O2C4m0sg=)

Thank you for your support! I hope you take some time this month to reflect on our achievements, celebrate the women in your life, and recommit to building a stronger, more inclusive America.

All my best,

— Katherine

Representative Katherine Clark
Massachusetts 5th Congressional District
Democratic Whip

name: Rick Scott
subject: I answer to the people of Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
Joe Biden wants me to serve his far-Left agenda.

The DC bureaucracy wants me to serve their bloated wallets. Mitch McConnell kicked me off a committee because I challenged him for Leader of the Senate.

And I said no to all of them.

**I only serve one group, Peter, and that’s the hardworking people of Florida. **

_But doing the right thing in Washington has made me a lot of enemies, and now, the Washington insiders won’t stop their attacks on me._

_That’s why I need your help._

[**2024 is closer than we think, and we need all hands on deck if we’re going to win this race. Pitch in NOW to join our team and WIN for Florida.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=a2ea26dc400d463d9768c8e6c5683821&_e=Re-AGlgbgI09cJXzfNKqx7gG5DiFhzGRPR0vw4fZ-86bVBP4ve0n4cLnY4vkPMfC_s6JBvLupCdlE99uhJU_blSXDGZ6qyPTR8cNqUKJXP1NjjIrR12X8unjfQjXYWOzLXXD5uzKfbd9c26jw_4BRifHq2b59srEjls0rH6daqfOHFzNdtur2751kLBBNUlbl6O0ljDib0GpfVA7Q5TrSFbSgaYwoN8PyhMv_Z5Bmb-W_0cXFP4pEKmlagGeH4emuN1-eOeKzAgzBsuax05p1ejX4Gk2Owson5cuadiFYdwHfgJj2tPmTnLMX-Zc_SQ-uo3NkPugfj2iaCnTDF6k5x8swOcfrks5_RSJNId5yQPG9grEpqFxbAtt_uOdHyEC)

| | The Washington Post is reporting on the truth that many of us know, but the GOP won’t admit: their lies have real human consequences. **The Big Lie is putting people in danger!** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59838797/395241080/766387327?refcode=em_fr_b2_030723_election-workers_30ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmE0MDI1ZC00OGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sCa3oaHYDDCHSIXpXIZAOyQjjFXRvnJGJKDbEyw-9-M=) Being an election clerk used to be a way to get involved in democracy and contribute to the political system we all cherish. After all, local officials are crucial to making our elections possible!

**But Trump and the GOP’s conspiracy theories have made life hell for election officials. Some have even received disturbing messages like “I KNOW WHERE YOU SLEEP:”** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59838798/395241081/766387327?refcode=em_fr_b2_030723_election-workers_30ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmE0MDI1ZC00OGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sCa3oaHYDDCHSIXpXIZAOyQjjFXRvnJGJKDbEyw-9-M=) The Brennan Center for Justice reports that similar intimidation has taken place across the country. **And it’s not just at the local level – Secretaries of State have been receiving death threats ever since the 2020 election.**

clean_body: | = | | The Washington Post is reporting on the truth that many of us know, but the GOP won’t admit: their lies have real human consequences. The Big Lie is putting people in danger! = Being an election clerk used to be a way to get involved in democracy and contribute to the political system we all cherish. After all, local officials are crucial to making our elections possible! But Trump and the GOP’s conspiracy theories have made life hell for election officials. Some have even received disturbing messages like “I KNOW WHERE YOU SLEEP:” = The Brennan Center for Justice reports that similar intimidation has taken place across the country. And it’s not just at the local level – Secretaries of State have been receiving death threats ever since the 2020 election. With threats to election workers at an all-time high, we need to do everything we can to elect Secretaries of State who will DEFEND democracy -but that takes grassroots support! = | = = = = = = Team DASS Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions. = | =

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59839063/395248315/1176129059?sourceid=1048722&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2QyOGYzZC00YmJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9TkqttCfsMAZNyC_vksRo__V9qNg6Z5s9G6tjF5cIB8=&emci=e5d28f3d-4bbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e7d28f3d-4bbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)** Hi Peter,

I'm Cayana — the new vice president of Digital here at EMILYs List. It's such an honor and a thrill to be here, right at the beginning of an election cycle that we know will define reproductive rights for a generation. We _also_ know this cycle will be filled with Democratic pro-choice women stepping up and running for office _everywhere_ , fighting for change at every level and making our country better. And there's nowhere I'd rather be than here with you, the EMILYs List community, as we help women WIN all cycle long. **[We've had endorsements, elections, and WINS already in 2023, and there's more to come. Make an early investment in Democratic pro-choice women this cycle by donating to EMILYs List now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59839070/395248322/1176129059?sourceid=1048722&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2QyOGYzZC00YmJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9TkqttCfsMAZNyC_vksRo__V9qNg6Z5s9G6tjF5cIB8=&emci=e5d28f3d-4bbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e7d28f3d-4bbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)** We've even got _another_ exciting update for you, Peter: We just launched a new website! Here's a sneak peek.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59839071/395248323/1176129059?sourceid=1048722&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2QyOGYzZC00YmJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9TkqttCfsMAZNyC_vksRo__V9qNg6Z5s9G6tjF5cIB8=&emci=e5d28f3d-4bbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e7d28f3d-4bbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) Women's History Month is always about looking to the past, seeing how far we've come — but it's also about looking to the future, and where women can go next. The new EMILYs List website is all about our central vision of women running, winning, and changing the world, today and for years to come. ** ** ** ******[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59839075/395248327/1176129059?sourceid=1048722&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2QyOGYzZC00YmJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9TkqttCfsMAZNyC_vksRo__V9qNg6Z5s9G6tjF5cIB8=&emci=e5d28f3d-4bbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e7d28f3d-4bbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)****** ****** ** ******[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59839076/395248328/210412955?sourceid=1048722&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2QyOGYzZC00YmJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9TkqttCfsMAZNyC_vksRo__V9qNg6Z5s9G6tjF5cIB8=&emci=e5d28f3d-4bbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e7d28f3d-4bbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)****** ************ **** ****

name: Quentin James, President and Co-Founder of The Collective PAC
subject: we remember — today and every day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8XkalrnJjy3G9ZYkRcmXiRqD0ObvWEy3IbFqx8UuhOLsJg4n6QvwsdE8V3NfJjNYto-bJmJEZVdgtLrObps8C1RmyKwj22rIQKMMfywGylrJdzK9EA5x_3EA8FEMHYGtoMRy6lOJzBUOJuusnK46X1KjEMz8znpbMfm5PHle3_7kQZT0K5g1jRpEEvadMTElufuGr-KPfxzVdK5SmLj4URq43WWflKxXTUzNyeCjB5hF/3ub/8qzwJGPdR1Kuxcz5BRCx1A/h0/PNTbxsvBZhJ0bU6T3MaRB3048_cnLxikjPNAdjoh7zs)
| | Peter, today marks the anniversary of a turning point in the fight against Black voter suppression. **Today is the anniversary of the Bloody Sunday attacks.**

On March 7, 1965, activist John Lewis, then just 25 years old, led over 600 marchers across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, AL, where they faced brutal attacks by state troopers. **_They were beaten solely because they wanted to exercise their constitutional right to vote._**

But John Lewis refused to stand down. He stood his ground unflinchingly in the face of beatings and tear gas, a courageous action that would go on to be representative of his legacy as an activist and a history-maker.

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yscVJVvN-r4bukDGstILwI862NHve7ljnSJgtQ9E-0UUz87lspwCWF4m_mDw7dBYfpIV6_DQP5kbzR0xI9MFlXGduIMpTf66-c_vRfPxPGPoSAIAPluyF6FVEn4O8VL7l795BxR0QNguXh6exDQASvlfKbbjNf3rV1WyA1Kd8VNwOIlhZxHYA9S2uane3UdDwIpZ4wqRsl_3YKkpeiX3HRcykMqoV4RzUZGl2NGbDkVjcjioEXauXX6Y_U5bzZM1LUWRckU6p7s-xpV8ie6x4vLBxkvE-2VkWgKlxENGEROqSgPgvSEzPFqx1NqglMYuERlfbd-dJnrfYmb2Doj_r5aXZbL-I1FMiWXtjYKoIyFWzvCRNgnWMMGUWWKmGBIP4/3ub/8qzwJGPdR1Kuxcz5BRCx1A/h1/dLojz7SAZT6ayStbl7pCnwGxDlegCm_-WP88-GfJuU8)
[ ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yscVJVvN-r4bukDGstILwI862NHve7ljnSJgtQ9E-0UUz87lspwCWF4m_mDw7dBYfpIV6_DQP5kbzR0xI9MFlXGduIMpTf66-c_vRfPxPGPoSAIAPluyF6FVEn4O8VL7l795BxR0QNguXh6exDQASv4dkOmKy31O8UJOVar37RO1PBDB17DUhorKPJJZ4lpnzpBbYoTtkbYGdsr5D-jhjxeyuuHlCuxa_krPALzHgkxk7gJOdOLZ69PbdwHzpzt1tNQKhJE7hroupQ4nxYAlux0oxtSMVu49U4uLsHz_159z4P5moOnelUX8LNHT1IPqD_sFPfXQIAZIYDEy7DRRYiTN0BkQhL4Pw7GBHO1eXFlFLPF4UIFJ_zwFy1ecZhdSU/3ub/8qzwJGPdR1Kuxcz5BRCx1A/h2/h0XDSmJoAZO7qv-CYUXjC34zhxhKSCbPPFD0WTZEb-w) [ ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yscVJVvN-r4bukDGstILwI862NHve7ljnSJgtQ9E-0UUz87lspwCWF4m_mDw7dBYfpIV6_DQP5kbzR0xI9MFlXGduIMpTf66-c_vRfPxPGPoSAIAPluyF6FVEn4O8VL7l795BxR0QNguXh6exDQASv4dkOmKy31O8UJOVar37ROwB4VpP6dz7VAFtePaFOSjMo0b5BvhVeavLZBc4MEMC4jem5rWZjGL-lqznAykS7N7W_HExPTzKsAbBqmy0dVWkfQsFDFMPThHzXTVpMP3jJOXPHz2pXDi_iOYytGvg-mwDdWvUDaBUIDYpRuHYA_CE3-wG_sVdqr90KytPi7_NVc94qQo36_1K8CALOP3YhnuyavUWt3L3X8anr23EzCKU/3ub/8qzwJGPdR1Kuxcz5BRCx1A/h3/vKtzlJkVf5N8CUX8vI9qKQRT0scTPAyBaTTzNakdEGE) With Black voters’ rights still under attack and voter suppression on the rise over 58 years later, we must remember days like Bloody Sunday and honor the legacy of John Lewis by taking concrete action to amplify Black voices.

[The Collective PAC is working around the clock to do exactly that. If you can, please support our mission by chipping in anything you can today.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yscVJVvN-r4bukDGstILwI862NHve7ljnSJgtQ9E-0UUz87lspwCWF4m_mDw7dBYfpIV6_DQP5kbzR0xI9MFlXGduIMpTf66-c_vRfPxPGPoSAIAPluyF6FVEn4O8VL7l795BxR0QNguXh6exDQASvlfKbbjNf3rV1WyA1Kd8VNwioawKeBwj3DqW7g6-cup0xpbd05J4-IMTUPkvnI9S69x74V-DSuSrpfkp_sxlomvDO-TL7ToIKd8h2dlb7fVZ1RZerbDZAa4K6UGkqfU3ML5hosoVg5XkXlH0d9wpcwdNV0E_uzJ0Fc5c0auFVwX-F2tPGuuaxqnHlLpeAMJIE2CHY3vYcJb-KvdmNmnBqwH3zpkbGnyT6tGg3njRQ0N8/3ub/8qzwJGPdR1Kuxcz5BRCx1A/h4/2cuuSy52t1budC6dLYbjhoVaFBU4z1d5JNCbOaWezFs)

Thank you for all that you do to help us build Black political power.

Quentin James
_President and Co-Founder of The Collective PAC_

* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iRqUTOndcJRC4vm20WcsKLjjLjULwjXDvnD4rI3nnMXtugCIIeJpTycLSowsYU6rQc2UTxO6NOwc7cBJ7xwlp505Vbgq1W-iep1eA2P1R9Mydrgn-R1FLYg6WaQZTiHb3FEULQ2ZEq6w1--b397eoQq7X8DkyhaZSVHwyvT40sKYKc1xrLHKZaet7fjxtpuEFU6_yEeuj6Wsmpx_AF3saHR6UqmHpdVDC1JoG4VlssN4iPpzZQjxpHmkIrkqDqpKjVanSMCHgft0AdBzZVeNKGN1jz5EMpNw8_ujJaOC69DEkTNrDUcoUi449J-tGNzz2r5SN184M-pADTmjz7hlo5Y/3ub/8qzwJGPdR1Kuxcz5BRCx1A/h5/XG-UByW5McR3OEnDiw8FPtUvnHeoylRwdV9sxXLgkKk) | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, today marks the anniversary of a turning point in the fight against Black voter suppression. Today is the anniversary of the Bloody Sunday attacks. On March 7, 1965, activist John Lewis, then just 25 years old, led over 600 marchers across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, AL, where they faced brutal attacks by state troopers. They were beaten solely because they wanted to exercise their constitutional right to vote. But John Lewis refused to stand down. He stood his ground unflinchingly in the face of beatings and tear gas, a courageous action that would go on to be representative of his legacy as an activist and a history-maker. With Black voters’ rights still under attack and voter suppression on the rise over 58 years later, we must remember days like Bloody Sunday and honor the legacy of John Lewis by taking concrete action to amplify Black voices. Thank you for all that you do to help us build Black political power. Quentin James President and Co-Founder of The Collective PAC | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. Peter – Sen. Joe Manchin just teamed up with Republicans to**block another one of Joe Biden's nominees.** This time it was President Biden’s nomination of Gigi Sohn to the Federal Communications Commission: after Manchin announced he wouldn’t vote for her confirmation, Sohn withdrew her nomination. Sinema never announced her vote on the nomination – but she **reportedly helped block Sohn from being confirmed previously**. subject: Governor DeSantis is coming to Las Vegas
body:
Hear Governor DeSantis talk about his Florida Blueprint this Saturday in Las Vegas |
---
| | [ ](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=2706bce92c&e=b87806bd09)
---
| | Friends,
My long time friend, Governor Ron DeSantis, is coming to Las Vegas to talk about his Florida Blueprint, and we’d like you to join us on Saturday, March 11, 2023! Tickets will go fast, so don’t delay in RSVPing, and if you’re lucky, you’ll be one of the select attendees who will get a free copy of the Governor’s brand new book.
[RSVP TODAY!](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=572570939d&e=b87806bd09)
Ron delivered a record-setting victory on November 8, 2022 with a battle-tested, bold agenda for the people of Florida. With his historic, nearly 20-point win, he created a blueprint for freedom in Florida that serves as a model for the rest of the nation. No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis, and he is now sharing this winning blueprint with the country.

Please join us this Saturday, March 11th, at 3:30 PM to hear from our special guest, Governor Ron DeSantis. Let’s make sure to give him a warm, Nevada welcome.

See you soon,
Adam Laxalt

---
| | _Copyright © 2023 Adam Laxalt, All rights reserved._

Adam Laxalt7435 S Eastern Ave Ste 105 Box 118Las Vegas, NV 89123

name: Madeleine Foote, LCV
subject: House to vote this week on bill to gut clean water protections. Your representative needs to hear from you NOW:
body:
Congress is barreling toward a vote THIS WEEK. They need to hear from you. |
---
| | **
URGENT: Take Action to Stop Congress from Gutting Clean Water Protections **
Republicans have scheduled a vote _THIS WEEK_ that would undo drinking water protections for millions of Americans.

****We only have a few days to make our voices heard -- we need your help to deliver 5,000 letters to Congress.

[Add your name: Tell your representative to VOTE NO on the resolution to repeal the Clean Water Restoration Rule >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/4L4XB9Ew_Lc_/N0krLy9tRDdZK2NDSGlKa016cW5OaEZLYUpYNEJEcTl2QXU5WGViZGROV0xGd2RvMXFYUkFpOUt2a0NyM0hXNE1zOWE5RE11MXpvdEkzZnlZMEJDRnJJcmkyOU1jN2NTbTdLVDF4UUZSNTQ9S0/SjlOdnErOGNxN09KOGZIbmtZYjdqRURNSURQUGdmSk9sT0x4eFJTRFI1Z2FrN3NoMTdzR2hCY3lVdVJZYTZFNGRxVDRJSzl0WEhsNG5oUGgxRmZWcDNZMXZTaFR6cldUZm9vemdwNWttRTg9S0)
|
---
**[**TAKE ACTION**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/4L4XB9Ew_Lc_/N0krLy9tRDdZK2NDSGlKa016cW5OaEZLYUpYNEJEcTl2QXU5WGViZGROV0xGd2RvMXFYUkFpOUt2a0NyM0hXNE1zOWE5RE11MXpvdEkzZnlZMEJDRnJJcmkyOU1jN2NTbTdLVDF4UUZSNTQ9S0/SjlOdnErOGNxN09KOGZIbmtZYjdqRURNSURQUGdmSk9sT0x4eFJTRFI1Z2FrN3NoMTdzR2hCY3lVdVJZYTZFNGRxVDRJSzl0WEhsNG5oUGgxRmZWcDNZMXZTaFR6cldUZm9vemdwNWttRTg9S0)**

** **
|
Peter -- in December, the EPA and the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers acted to protect more waterways under the Clean Water Act.

This Clean Water Restoration Rule ensures that waters -- from small streams, to rivers, and wetlands -- are protected from unregulated pollution and destruction.

**This week,** the House is set to vote on a bill to overturn those safeguards using the Congressional Review Act, an extreme legislative tool that overrules administration rules with a simple majority vote in the House and Senate.

******Peter: there is a real risk that polluters and their anti-clean water allies in Congress will pass this dangerous bill. What 's worse -- if this vote passes, future administrations will also be blocked from issuing similar clean water safeguards.**

We're asking every LCV member to reach out to their representatives today, before the vote. It only takes a moment to send a message.

[We don't have much time before Congress votes. Take action _right now_ to preserve protections for clean water and help us reach our goal of 5,000 signatures >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/4L4XB9Ew_Lc_/N0krLy9tRDdZK2NDSGlKa016cW5OaEZLYUpYNEJEcTl2QXU5WGViZGROV0xGd2RvMXFYUkFpOUt2a0NyM0hXNE1zOWE5RE11MXpvdEkzZnlZMEJDRnJJcmkyOU1jN2NTbTdLVDF4UUZSNTQ9S0/SjlOdnErOGNxN09KOGZIbmtZYjdqRURNSURQUGdmSk9sT0x4eFJTRFI1Z2FrN3NoMTdzR2hCY3lVdVJZYTZFNGRxVDRJSzl0WEhsNG5oUGgxRmZWcDNZMXZTaFR6cldUZm9vemdwNWttRTg9S0)

These new safeguards are _incredibly_ important. Repealing them would open the floodgates to the degradation of waterways that feed into our rivers, lakes, and drinking water sources, and to the destruction of wetlands that protect our communities from severe storms and flooding.

**We cannot allow Congress to reverse progress.** Too many communities -- especially Indigenous communities, communities of color, and low-wealth communities -- still lack clean water. We need to continue to build upon the EPA's new safeguards, not throw them aside.
|
---
**[**TAKE ACTION TO
PROTECT CLEAN WATER**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/4L4XB9Ew_Lc_/N0krLy9tRDdZK2NDSGlKa016cW5OaEZLYUpYNEJEcTl2QXU5WGViZGROV0xGd2RvMXFYUkFpOUt2a0NyM0hXNE1zOWE5RE11MXpvdEkzZnlZMEJDRnJJcmkyOU1jN2NTbTdLVDF4UUZSNTQ9S0/SjlOdnErOGNxN09KOGZIbmtZYjdqRURNSURQUGdmSk9sT0x4eFJTRFI1Z2FrN3NoMTdzR2hCY3lVdVJZYTZFNGRxVDRJSzl0WEhsNG5oUGgxRmZWcDNZMXZTaFR6cldUZm9vemdwNWttRTg9S0)**

If polluters and their allies in Congress succeed, it will set a dangerous precedent, jeopardizing all of the progress the Biden administration has made on protecting our water, air, lands, climate, public health, and more. And with a radical Supreme Court looking to strike down more of the administration's actions, our environmental safeguards are at serious risk. ****

We must demand that Congress choose to protect the health of our families and communities instead of the profits of corporate polluters.****

[Please, take action right now, Peter. If they don't hear from you soon, Congress will make a mistake that will threaten waterways in communities like yours.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/4L4XB9Ew_Lc_/N0krLy9tRDdZK2NDSGlKa016cW5OaEZLYUpYNEJEcTl2QXU5WGViZGROV0xGd2RvMXFYUkFpOUt2a0NyM0hXNE1zOWE5RE11MXpvdEkzZnlZMEJDRnJJcmkyOU1jN2NTbTdLVDF4UUZSNTQ9S0/SjlOdnErOGNxN09KOGZIbmtZYjdqRURNSURQUGdmSk9sT0x4eFJTRFI1Z2FrN3NoMTdzR2hCY3lVdVJZYTZFNGRxVDRJSzl0WEhsNG5oUGgxRmZWcDNZMXZTaFR6cldUZm9vemdwNWttRTg9S0)

This moment will have a long-lasting impact on the future of clean water and environmental justice in this country. Thank you for standing with us.

Onward,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9266914&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDE5ODg2NQS2&spReportId=MTcwMDE5ODg2NQS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9266914&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDE5ODg2NQS2&spReportId=MTcwMDE5ODg2NQS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.) |

name: 2023 Membership Services
subject: We’re giving you one more chance to stay.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zilj04q6q8e91hiqi0dt1p4df32lf0ij43e39j9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9jmcoj1chh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztlie9dqtl28226vctdfmvrus0olrl5kroonhdj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9jmcoj1chh2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze1bjtla3hip2db9hl370vp64bir24qh0a1cr810_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9jmcoj1chh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")

name: Trump News HQ
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeqmldouuanrjcrn9lmpur60h2mkmko91pso73a0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9jmcoj6chh2bs)
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi4clc0digdjco23hu5jhb3bgq1i91934lqj6nc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9jmcoj6chh2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zno33vdqvoksv99p2sbq89enm858sflhj441lipg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9jmcoj6chh2bs) [NO](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm1oqlftjt7o552lmrn1uv8jedhulerc030fhf50_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9jmcoj6chh2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zio8sek99isckqm2mfdmka943626dqbogcdq1bp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9jmcoj6chh2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Warning: Sexual brainwashing; don’t be a victim
body:
I’ve filed a groundbreaking new lawsuit against a hospital and the doctors that lied to a young girl and her family

| |
---
| |
---
**_“It’s well known that 80%, even up to 85% of children who experience gender dysphoria and cross sex identification feel differently when they reach puberty after the early phases of puberty.”_**
---
-Dr. Riittakerttu Kaltiala, Chief Psychiatrist, Tampere University Hospital and one of Finland’s leading experts on pediatric gender care
---
|
---
Fellow Patriot, I’ve filed a groundbreaking new lawsuit against a hospital and the doctors that lied to a young girl and her family, manipulating her into taking medication and having surgery to become a “boy.” In fact, my client and I joined Laura Ingraham the other night on her great Fox News show _Ingraham Angle_ to discuss the lawsuit and the dangerous lies that woke doctors are telling patients and their parents to push their radical ideology. [**Please take a moment right now to watch video from this primetime interview and learn what we’re up against in this monumental battle – then consider making a tax-deductible gift of $25 or more to help fund this critical lawsuit.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm0ebik437vhblurrdltfnkl1h6ard3ikc14mq4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9jmcoj6cdh2bs) Chloe Cole was just 9 years old when she was bombarded with transgender ideology.As a child Chloe was bombarded—largely through social media—with the idea that “transitioning” would make her special, accepted and popular.When she shared with her pediatrician that she felt uncomfortable as a girl, leftist activist doctors put her on an irreversible path to chemically and surgically "transitioning” her gender. At age 13, the doctors began pumping Chloe full of dangerous drugs with unknown long-term side effects. At 15, they performed a double mastectomy on her.And all of this happened because doctors lied and concealed less invasive treatment options from Chloe and her parents.They told her parents point blank that they could have a dead daughter or a live son.That’s right. A dead daughter or a living son. Those were their only options. (So they said.)EVEN THOUGH RESEARCH SHOWS THE VAST MAJORITY OF CHILDREN EXPERIENCING GENDER DYSPHORIA GET OVER IT AFTER PUBERTY BEGINS. Chloe Cole and her parents were lied to, coerced, and manipulated not only for monetary gain, but as part of a radical woke agenda that is being pushed on vulnerable children across the country.That’s why we’re not just suing Kaiser Permanente... **We’re suing Dr. Lisa Taylor** for prescribing testosterone and the dangerous puberty blocker Lupron Depot without doing ANY proper evaluation or treatment of Chloe’s other symptoms OR receiving any kind of informed consent from Chloe or her parents for puberty blockers. **We’re suing Dr. Hop Nguyen Le** for performing a double mastectomy without evaluating whether it was the right decision for Chloe, who was just 15 years old and for not obtaining proper informed consent to perform the surgery. **And we’re suing Dr. Susanna Watson** who recommended that Chloe have her breasts removed without evaluating Chloe’s mental or psychological condition. Additionally, she withheld information that may have changed Chloe’s mind about the surgery, including a litany of studies that show drugs and surgeries do not help children suffering from gender dysphoria._If folks like you and I don’t stand up and fight back now, who will?_[**Chloe deserves justice, and children deserve protection – so can we count on your tax-deductible donation of $25 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi6l36q342klsk5ssrg5kpovse81c3er29iafpa0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9jmcoj6cdh2bs) My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded the Center for American Liberty because I saw an opportunity to use my legal expertise to fight for our values and restore the rights left-wing extremists are trying to rip from us.I put together a team of talented, trusted attorneys taking on cases like this not for fame or money, but because we love our country and our Constitution. Unfortunately legal battles aren’t free and the costs of these lawsuits pile up quickly.**But the Center for American Liberty takes these cases on anyway, going head-to-head with some of the most powerful and connected leftists in the country. And we win – but as a nonprofit organization, that’s only possible with your help.** In fact, Chloe Cole is just one of three clients we are representing on this issue, because we recognize just how serious of a threat it is to allow medical professionals to experiment with our children.I think this will be one of the most important cases in the history of our movement, and I hope you’ll be with us every step of the way. [**Can I count on your generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgnds2r2m18efnic0h0hqa2pekekp3aic28l6nmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9jmcoj6cdh2bs) Winning this lawsuit for Chloe Cole won’t turn back the clock. Today Chloe faces medical issues stemming from the surgeries and medication. She will never be able to breastfeed a child – if she’s even able to get pregnant after poison coursed through her veins. Her life will never be “normal.” But winning this lawsuit will send a loud and clear message to every single doctor in America who is thinking of performing a gruesome and barbaric gender transition surgery on a child: **_There are steep financial consequences for lying to your patients and coercing young children and their parents into irreversible sex changes surgeries... and we’re coming for you!_** My friend, you and I cannot sit back while vulnerable children are chemically castrated when what they need is counseling... while parents are fed the lie, “you can either have a dead daughter or a live son.”And we most certainly cannot sit back while money-hungry “Big Pharma” and woke doctors experiment on an entire generation of young Americans like lab rats. Thank you in advance for your help taking on Chloe Cole’s case and stopping this outrageous medical malpractice – and attack on American children – in its tracks.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO
---
|
---
| | **[DONATE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z013tqqub2dude8lbifpeeavnhqo6ab9krkibgkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9jmcoj6cdh2bs)**
---
P.S. Doctors told Chloe and her parents from the beginning that nothing was permanent. They told her she could change her mind if she wanted to, but when she did exactly that, they shrugged their shoulders at her, told her there was nothing they could do and chalked it up to “just another part of her gender journey.” Because they’d already gotten what they wanted from her family. P.P.S. We must put a stop to this. Doctors have abandoned their sacred oath in the pursuit of payouts, and we must make them pay. [**Please make a generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty today, and give our lawyers the resources they need to win this crucial fight.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3e91l9n8svq7mfbo66a2aehdl0shsolmhq13868_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9jmcoj6cdh2bs)
---
| |
---
| |
---

Chloe Cole and her parents were lied to, coerced, and manipulated not only for monetary gain, but as part of a radical woke agenda that is being pushed on vulnerable children across the country.That’s why we’re not just suing Kaiser Permanente... We’re suing Dr. Lisa Taylor for prescribing testosterone and the dangerous puberty blocker Lupron Depot without doing ANY proper evaluation or treatment of Chloe’s other symptoms OR receiving any kind of informed consent from Chloe or her parents for puberty blockers. We’re suing Dr. Hop Nguyen Le for performing a double mastectomy without evaluating whether it was the right decision for Chloe, who was just 15 years old and for not obtaining proper informed consent to perform the surgery. And we’re suing Dr. Susanna Watson who recommended that Chloe have her breasts removed without evaluating Chloe’s mental or psychological condition. Additionally, she withheld information that may have changed Chloe’s mind about the surgery, including a litany of studies that show drugs and surgeries do not help children suffering from gender dysphoria.If folks like you and I don’t stand up and fight back now, who will? My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded the Center for American Liberty because I saw an opportunity to use my legal expertise to fight for our values and restore the rights left-wing extremists are trying to rip from us.I put together a team of talented, trusted attorneys taking on cases like this not for fame or money, but because we love our country and our Constitution. Unfortunately legal battles aren’t free and the costs of these lawsuits pile up quickly.But the Center for American Liberty takes these cases on anyway, going head-to-head with some of the most powerful and connected leftists in the country. And we win – but as a nonprofit organization, that’s only possible with your help. In fact, Chloe Cole is just one of three clients we are representing on this issue, because we recognize just how serious of a threat it is to allow medical professionals to experiment with our children.I think this will be one of the most important cases in the history of our movement, and I hope you’ll be with us every step of the way. Winning this lawsuit for Chloe Cole won’t turn back the clock. Today Chloe faces medical issues stemming from the surgeries and medication. She will never be able to breastfeed a child – if she’s even able to get pregnant after poison coursed through her veins. Her life will never be “normal.” But winning this lawsuit will send a loud and clear message to every single doctor in America who is thinking of performing a gruesome and barbaric gender transition surgery on a child: There are steep financial consequences for lying to your patients and coercing young children and their parents into irreversible sex changes surgeries... and we’re coming for you! My friend, you and I cannot sit back while vulnerable children are chemically castrated when what they need is counseling... while parents are fed the lie, “you can either have a dead daughter or a live son.”And we most certainly cannot sit back while money-hungry “Big Pharma” and woke doctors experiment on an entire generation of young Americans like lab rats. Thank you in advance for your help taking on Chloe Cole’s case and stopping this outrageous medical malpractice – and attack on American children – in its tracks. | | Sincerely, | | Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO | | | P.S. Doctors told Chloe and her parents from the beginning that nothing was permanent. They told her she could change her mind if she wanted to, but when she did exactly that, they shrugged their shoulders at her, told her there was nothing they could do and chalked it up to “just another part of her gender journey.” Because they’d already gotten what they wanted from her family. P.P.S. We must put a stop to this. Doctors have abandoned their sacred oath in the pursuit of payouts, and we must make them pay. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, . 625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Update
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651232%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9wHl2d4AuYwe22q0E7zKXQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651233%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ck8GkepNf9VMWIVuJxOLcA&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651234%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UDe%2beEUz8eEK192XEn9sJg&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651245%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qPASGplKxuy46MdzbKrP3A&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: American Action News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp2a5vg93kpebpt3v1bpvgn2bbphoo8050skl35g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9jm1or4chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9g271qm89mk4go7b9118kokugq3ipb79uhgd40g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9jm1or4chh2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztk4dh8jg6n8ldsdl5hsa5h80pdrlmfeu9b0ce60_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9jm1or4chh2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Wake Up Biden
subject: Most Important Message of the Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bergman for Congress**
body:
Washington is falling short when it comes to protecting the American people.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409456:64RffaGNb:m:1:3365131770:9C902B8CCFEB4C48CEFD03E04793447A:r "Headline") Peter: When Chinese spy balloons were flying over our country and invasions at our Southern Border were reaching historic milestones, it should have been clarion call to the White House, our national security apparatus and Congress. Unfortunately, Washington is falling short when it comes to protecting the American people. In a nutshell:
* We need to do a better job at securing our airspace.
* We need to do a better job at fighting cyber warfare from China and Russia
* And we need to do a better job of keeping Foreign State Media companies like Al-Jazeera from running around Capitol Hill ignoring our laws.

I've called on Attorney General Merrick Garland and the White House to take action, but they've failed to react. That's why I'm turning to freedom-loving Americans like you. **[Will you join the Bergman Battalion and help me keep the pressure on AG Garland and the White House to do their part and protect the American people from these national security threats?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409456:64RffaGNb:m:1:3365131770:9C902B8CCFEB4C48CEFD03E04793447A:r "Will you join the Bergman Battalion and help me keep the pressure
on AG Garland and the White House to do their part and protect the American people from these national security threats?")** Credentialed members of the media receive unparalleled access within the Capitol Building and it's the kind of access a foreign government could leverage to spy on us. Al Jazeera has 136 people running around here and the New York Times only has 82 with the same access. **Shouldn 't that be raising more than just my eyebrows?** I served in the USMC for over 40 years, and I won't accept the failures of any of our leaders who are failing to even run background checks on the foreign journalists on Capitol Hill. China. Russia. Qatar. These are just a few of my concerns. And since Joe Biden and his Administration are sitting on their hands and busy taking victory laps for ruining the economy, falling for China's false assurances about the COVID-19 outbreak, raiding Mar-a-Lago, or giving asylum to illegal border crossers, I'm pushing a new bill through Congress that will close the loophole and force compliance for these Foreign State Media Companies. **[Can I count on you to support my efforts to protect America?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409456:64RffaGNb:m:1:3365131770:9C902B8CCFEB4C48CEFD03E04793447A:r "Can I count on you to support my
efforts to protect America?")** The Chinese government isn't placing any limitations on how they spy on us which is why we need to place limitations on who and where citizens of their country can go in our nation, especially within the Halls of Congress. The Democrats up here seem more concerned with preventing freedom-loving Americans like you from roaming the Capitol Corridors than a spy from Moscow or Beijing. **Isn 't it time we changed that dynamic?** **[Join the Bergman Battalion and help me protect our country, its citizens and our Capitol Building by enforcing compliance with our laws and background checks for Foreign State Media companies!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409456:64RffaGNb:m:1:3365131770:9C902B8CCFEB4C48CEFD03E04793447A:r "Join the Bergman Battalion and help me protect our country, its citizens and our Capitol Building by enforcing compliance with our laws and
background checks for Foreign State Media companies!")** America's national security cannot play second fiddle to partisan politics and Biden's wayward policies. I refuse to stand by idly until Biden and his Administration get their priorities straight. **[Help me keep the pressure up--Donate TODAY!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409456:64RffaGNb:m:1:3365131770:9C902B8CCFEB4C48CEFD03E04793447A:r "Help me keep the pressure up—Donate TODAY!")** For our national security,
Rep. Jack Bergman (MI-1)
Lt. Gen., USMC (ret.) | | [JOIN THE BERGMAN BATTALION](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409456:64RffaGNb:m:1:3365131770:9C902B8CCFEB4C48CEFD03E04793447A:r "JOIN THE BERGMAN BATTALION")
---

| **Paid for by Bergman for Congress**
---
Rep. Jack Bergman is a retired member of the United States Marine Corps. The use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy, the Marine Corps, or the Department of Defense.

subject: The NRA is requesting YOUR input

body:
Official NRA Survey | The NRA needs YOU to see this. As the nation's largest organization dedicated to defending the Second Amendment rights of EVERY American citizen...
We are helping NRA fundraise. Questions? 1(800)662-3888
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62410376:6NqyMaGVN:m:1:3331421248:817FA36D2E51701BC816481C1F1C253D:r)

**[OFFICIAL SURVEY ON GUN VERIFICATION](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62410376:6NqyMaGVN:m:1:3331421248:817FA36D2E51701BC816481C1F1C253D:r)**
**DO YOU AGREE THAT EVERY LAW-ABIDING CITIZEN IS ENTITLED TO THE RIGHT TO SELF-DEFENSE?**

**[YES»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62410376:6NqyMaGVN:m:1:3331421248:817FA36D2E51701BC816481C1F1C253D:r)**

**[NO»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62410376:6NqyMaGVN:m:1:3331421248:817FA36D2E51701BC816481C1F1C253D:r)**

Peter,

The NRA needs YOU to see this.

As the nation's largest organization dedicated to defending the Second Amendment rights of EVERY American citizen, **we rely heavily on the input of law-abiding firearm owners like YOU.**

We're contacting you today for your input on our **[Official Survey on Gun Verification.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62410376:6NqyMaGVN:m:1:3331421248:817FA36D2E51701BC816481C1F1C253D:r)** _Without your response, our mission to defend your rights from the gun-grabbers will be even more difficult._
**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62410376:6NqyMaGVN:m:1:3331421248:817FA36D2E51701BC816481C1F1C253D:r)**
Our nation has reached a crossroads regarding gun rights; _never before have we seen such brazen attempts to disarm the American People._ If we're going to stop radical anti-gun politicians from DESTROYING the Second Amendment, we MUST have a plan.

Peter, can you step up and help the NRA form a winning strategy to protect YOUR rights?
**[GIVE YOUR INPUT»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62410376:6NqyMaGVN:m:1:3331421248:817FA36D2E51701BC816481C1F1C253D:r)**
While the anti-gunners rely on _**dark-money billionaires**_ to set their agenda, the NRA gets its input from red-blooded American patriots. It's grassroots supporters like you who power our movement.

**[Please use this personalized link to take the NRA's Official Survey on Gun Verification and help protect YOUR rights.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62410376:6NqyMaGVN:m:1:3331421248:817FA36D2E51701BC816481C1F1C253D:r)**

Thank you,

NRA

---
Peter,
---
I joined President Trump at CPAC last weekend and spoke to an enthusiastic crowd of patriots who are ready to FIRE Biden in 2024.
---
_**As I said, we 're fighting for the very soul of America right now. **_
---
_The radical Left no longer believes in free speech. They want to suppress ideas and silence you so that they can win elections and advance their agenda at any cost._
---
House conservatives are the ONLY thing stopping us from falling headfirst into their tyrannical, socialist vision for America.
---
[**Please watch my speech and then make a contribution to support my fight against the Biden-Harris Administration's destructive far-Left agenda.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409470:6gffMaGyN:m:1:3365131770:AE5553A601F51EC8F55AFBE03487E033:r)

As conservatives, we must NEVER cave to the woke mob or compromise our principles.
---
We need to do everything we can to fight back against these radicals who want to completely tear down America and rebuild it in their own image.
---
_But "fighting back" doesn't just mean standing in opposition to Biden and Kamala's radical agenda and calling it a day. _
---
**To truly fight back and save our country, conservatives need to build on President Trump 's historic success by growing the America First movement. **
---
We need to be out there every single day explaining to _ALL_ Americans what the Democrats are actually doing to our country.
---
That means going on liberal news networks, cutting through the Democrats' lies, and talking to people who aren't used to hearing from conservatives.
---
**Every American needs to understand the stakes in 2024.**
---
All over the country, we're seeing signs that the overwhelming majority of Americans are fed up with the Democrats and their ruinous far-Left policies.
---
Look at what the people of Chicago just did to their soft-on-crime mayor Lori Lightfoot!
---
The Democrats would quite literally never win another election if every American knew the truth about their radical plan for our country.
---
_In a fair election decided on the issues, President Trump and conservatives would defeat these radicals in a landslide!_
---
_But it 's up to us to get our America First message to the voters and ensure as many Americans as possible vote Republican up and down the ballot in 2024. _
---
We only have about a year and a half to save our country before it's gone forever.
---
There's absolutely no time to waste.
---
[**So please, watch my speech and then make a contribution to support my fight against the Biden-Harris Administration's destructive far-Left agenda.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409470:6gffMaGyN:m:1:3365131770:AE5553A601F51EC8F55AFBE03487E033:r)

name: Bill Spadea
subject: The government can't wait for your taxes
body:
|
---
| Peter, I’m sure you’ve been thinking about tax season. The documents, the paperwork, the time, and lastly that tax bill. It’s always seemingly higher than it should be... **Then you turn around and see how the Government mishandles taxpayer funds and you’re left shaking your head in frustration.** You work hard for your money, and I want you to be able to keep more of it. On Thursday, March 23rd at 8PM Eastern, my good friend and Financial Expert, Rob Gill is going to be hosting a LIVE Critical Meeting on **“How To Turn Tax Season Into An Opportunity To Pay Less In Taxes, Save Money, And Build Your Wealth".** The best part? Rob has agreed to let our network in on this meeting FOR FREE.
---
| | [Save your spot here now](https://xtz223.keap-link017.com/v2/click/2624de34a219cdca73fbd91be81220ad/eJyNkMsKwkAMRf8l62KxKmp3IkVKtQvRtQzTqME6DTOp9UH_3fGBKwW3ycm53NxA0CgjaQExnOUaRT0IwKImJjQyrYwo_dxGg3631w2gJHOY2apmiG9fjz_AYzwYDgOQC6MnVsvJNEvz2Wae5pkHWVkf8ZemPxp_NMliks6hbX968UiSnLzaQSy2xkefgnwnWdvS83sRdnEYNk3TQSa9JZ-uSZVOrBLcEbqOro6hY1Wg8kLFjKZ4_yLDy0vb3gH6emjf)
---
| If the name Rob Gill sounds familiar to you, it's because he is a fellow New Jersey resident and recurring special guest on my live show, Common Ground. Whenever he comes on and reveals financial golden nuggets, the feedback from my audience is incredible.
---
|
---
|
---
# On March 23rd, Rob is going to teach you proven strategies for building your wealth that have worked for so many people, including me.
# [Click here to learn more and register for his LIVE Special Meeting now.](https://xtz223.keap-link017.com/v2/click/ae7d4f4672036be012ad6a73b1ef7793/eJyNkMsKwkAMRf8l62KxWtTuRERKqwvRtQzTqME6DTOp9UH_3fGBKwW3ycm53NxA0CgjaQEJnOUaRT0IwKImJjQyqYwo_dxGcb_b6wZQkjnMbFUzJLevxx_gMY4HcQByYfTEajmeZOlitsnTReZBVtZH_KXpD0cfzXQ-TnNo259ePJJMT17tIBFb46NPQb6TrG3p-b0IuyQMm6bpIJPekk_XpEonVgnuCF1HV8fQsSpQeaFiRlO8f5Hh5aVt7_jGaN0=)

---
|
---
| There are several proven strategies for paying less in taxes, without breaking any laws or putting your financial security at risk... **But the government doesn't want you to know about them.** Our government is constantly looking for ways to keep people trapped in society's broken game plan, and I'm sick of seeing our fellow citizens get taken advantage of by government bureaucrats. For this reason, I've set out on a personal mission to leverage my largest in the state microphone to help spread the word of financial education. If you'd like to learn the most effective ways to reduce your tax bill and keep more of your hard-earned money, [**click here to sign up for the LIVE Special Meeting now.**](https://xtz223.keap-link017.com/v2/click/8daac32643f98b93a33337bce272491e/eJyNkMsKwkAMRf8l62KxWtTuRERKqwvRtQzTqME6DTPR-qD_7vhANwpuk5NzubmCoFFG0gISOMklijoQgEVNTGhkVBlR-rGN4m670w6gJLOb2OrAkFy_Hr-B-zjuDQKQM6MnFvPhKEtnk1WezjIPsrI-4i9Nt__RjKfDNIem-enFPcn46NUOErEHvPcpyHeSpS09vxVhl4RhXdctZNJr8umaVOnEKsENoWvpah86VgUqL1TMaIrXLzI8P7XNDfwuaOE=) This is your opportunity to take advantage of the same tax breaks that millionaires (and billionaires) do. To Your Success, Bill
---
| It’s time for Common Sense ideas and policies to dominate the landscape instead of the vicious and totally counter-productive partisan attacks that only serve to embolden the elite power brokers.You’re a part of the Common Sense Club because you know that we need RESULTS from our government, NOT RHETORIC. Many arrogant, elitist elected officials crushed our way of life during the misguided, unnecessary and deadly lockdowns. Now it’s time to hold them accountable for their actions, ignorance and negligence. The tide is turning, and today is only STEP ONE!

This year’s elections provide a can’t-miss opportunity to support small businesses and families with fiscally responsible policies, restore an education system that puts students and parents over the radical agenda of the NJEA elites, and protect and preserve our civil, economic, and medical liberty.
We believe that our government should serve the people and provide the expected services that we’re paying for! It’s time for government to function as a public service, not a propaganda tool for radicals.
We believe in REDUCING tax burdens on working families AND empowering the skilled trades and small businesses.
We believe our schools should reject Critical Race Theory and the sexualized curricula. It’s time to empower parents and stop the NJEA once and for all.
I hope you’ll join me TODAY as we discuss the results of this year’s critical elections.
If you want to stand with me against the out-of-touch career politicians who are taking New Jersey down the wrong path and help restore Common Sense, you’re in the right place!Please join me during my show tonight, call in to share your thoughts, and watch the results of this year’s elections live as they come in!
Together, we can keep working to restore Common Sense and save New Jersey and America.
Thank you,Bill Spadea
---
|
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/4476961/ba200a097bb236ff) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: join me in marking International Women's Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, as we mark International Women's Day today, I'm emailing you to **[ask that you make a donation to support Off The Sidelines](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59854916/395293734/1171552878?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3974-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWM0ZTM2OC1iZWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sb97EYDgQz0aSu_18mGRGAqwCKd2w-AR6bQ0lduOdPA=)** — my organization that is 100% dedicated to electing more women to public office and ensure our voices are heard in the halls of Congress. But before I do that, **I want to tell you about the first time I ever stepped foot in a campaign's headquarters.**
My grandmother, who was a political powerhouse in her own right, decided it was time for her 10-year-old granddaughter to see democracy in action. When we stepped through the doors, and the hustle and bustle of campaigning hit us, my eyes were immediately drawn to the group of ladies sitting together stuffing envelopes. _I knew in an instant that I wanted to be just like them._
As my grandmother continued to show me the world of public service, I realized that this is how I could make a positive change and fight for women everywhere. **At just 10 years old, I had a bold but definitive dream:_I wanted to be in the U.S. Senate._**
Unfortunately, like far too many young, ambitious girls, that flame was extinguished by others as I grew up.**And so I never admitted that dream again — until 30 years later.**
When I finally found the courage and confidence to run for office — and won — I realized that the work had only just begun. There were countless women whose voices we needed in Washington, but who didn't have the confidence, networks or funds to get here.
**That's why I started Off The Sidelines, a movement to mobilize women to participate in politics, set the local and national policy agenda and hold elected leaders accountable.** Together, we've elevated hundreds of incredible candidates — uplifting their stories and providing their campaigns with powerful grassroots resources.
**But this is unfinished business. Women are still incredibly underrepresented at all levels of government. We can't sit by and let our voices be drowned out.[That's why, as we celebrate International Women's Day, I'm personally asking you to make a donation to Off The Sidelines so that we can elect more women up and down the ballot, achieve progress on the issues that matter most and finally ensure that our voices are heard — loud and clear. Please, will you chip in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59854917/395293735/1171552878?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3974-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWM0ZTM2OC1iZWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sb97EYDgQz0aSu_18mGRGAqwCKd2w-AR6bQ0lduOdPA=)**

---
| | [DONATE $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59854919/395293737/1171552878?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk3974-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWM0ZTM2OC1iZWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sb97EYDgQz0aSu_18mGRGAqwCKd2w-AR6bQ0lduOdPA=)

Thank you for standing with me in this fight — and for investing in the dreams of ambitious, bold 10-year-old girls everywhere.

With love,

Kirsten
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59854922/395293740/1575385346?refcode=jtk3974-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWM0ZTM2OC1iZWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sb97EYDgQz0aSu_18mGRGAqwCKd2w-AR6bQ0lduOdPA=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. clean_body: | | | Friend, as we mark International Women's Day today, I'm emailing you to = — my organization that is 100% dedicated to electing more women to public office and ensure our voices are heard in the halls of Congress. But before I do that, I want to tell you about the first time I ever stepped foot in a campaign's headquarters. My grandmother, who was a political powerhouse in her own right, decided it was time for her 10-year-old granddaughter to see democracy in action. When we stepped through the doors, and the hustle and bustle of campaigning hit us, my eyes were immediately drawn to the group of ladies sitting together stuffing envelopes. I knew in an instant that I wanted to be just like them. As my grandmother continued to show me the world of public service, I realized that this is how I could make a positive change and fight for women everywhere. At just 10 years old, I had a bold but definitive dream:I wanted to be in the U.S. Senate. Unfortunately, like far too many young, ambitious girls, that flame was extinguished by others as I grew up.And so I never admitted that dream again — until 30 years later. When I finally found the courage and confidence to run for office — and won — I realized that the work had only just begun. There were countless women whose voices we needed in Washington, but who didn't have the confidence, networks or funds to get here. That's why I started Off The Sidelines, a movement to mobilize women to participate in politics, set the local and national policy agenda and hold elected leaders accountable. Together, we've elevated hundreds of incredible candidates — uplifting their stories and providing their campaigns with powerful grassroots resources. But this is unfinished business. Women are still incredibly underrepresented at all levels of government. We can't sit by and let our voices be drowned out.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for standing with me in this fight — and for investing in the dreams of ambitious, bold 10-year-old girls everywhere. With love, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand
