name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Warning: Sexual brainwashing; don’t be a victim [WATCH FOX INTERVIEW HERE]
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409500:6O8fnaGN7:m:1:3365131770:64CA36141D8F818AEEBBFBBDCAA3D279:r)
---
**_" It's well known that 80%, even up to 85% of children who experience gender dysphoria and cross sex identification feel differently when they reach puberty after the early phases of puberty."_**
---
-Dr. Riittakerttu Kaltiala, Chief Psychiatrist, Tampere University Hospital and one of Finland's leading experts on pediatric gender care
---
|
---
I've filed a groundbreaking new lawsuit against a hospital and the doctors that lied to a young girl and her family, manipulating her into taking medication and having surgery to become a "boy." In fact, my client and I joined Laura Ingraham the other night on her great Fox News show _Ingraham Angle_ to discuss the lawsuit and the dangerous lies that woke doctors are telling patients and their parents to push their radical ideology. [**Please take a moment right now to watch video from this primetime interview and learn what we 're up against in this monumental battle - then consider making a tax-deductible gift to help fund this critical lawsuit.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409500:6O8fnaGN7:m:1:3365131770:64CA36141D8F818AEEBBFBBDCAA3D279:r) Chloe Cole was just 9 years old when she was bombarded with transgender ideology. As a child Chloe was bombarded--largely through social media--with the idea that "transitioning" would make her special, accepted and popular. When she shared with her pediatrician that she felt uncomfortable as a girl, leftist activist doctors put her on an irreversible path to chemically and surgically "transitioning" her gender. At age 13, the doctors began pumping Chloe full of dangerous drugs with unknown long-term side effects. At 15, they performed a double mastectomy on her. And all of this happened because doctors lied and concealed less invasive treatment options from Chloe and her parents. They told her parents point blank that they could have a dead daughter or a live son. That's right. A dead daughter or a living son. Those were their only options. (So they said.) EVEN THOUGH RESEARCH SHOWS THE VAST MAJORITY OF CHILDREN EXPERIENCING GENDER DYSPHORIA GET OVER IT AFTER PUBERTY BEGINS. Chloe Cole and her parents were lied to, coerced, and manipulated not only for monetary gain, but as part of a radical woke agenda that is being pushed on vulnerable children across the country. That's why we're not just suing Kaiser Permanente... **We 're suing Dr. Lisa Taylor** for prescribing testosterone and the dangerous puberty blocker Lupron Depot without doing ANY proper evaluation or treatment of Chloe's other symptoms OR receiving any kind of informed consent from Chloe or her parents for puberty blockers. **We 're suing Dr. Hop Nguyen Le** for performing a double mastectomy without evaluating whether it was the right decision for Chloe, who was just 15 years old and for not obtaining proper informed consent to perform the surgery. **And we 're suing Dr. Susanna Watson** who recommended that Chloe have her breasts removed without evaluating Chloe's mental or psychological condition. Additionally, she withheld information that may have changed Chloe's mind about the surgery, including a litany of studies that show drugs and surgeries do not help children suffering from gender dysphoria. _If folks like you and I don 't stand up and fight back now, who will? _ [**Chloe deserves justice, and children deserve protection - so can we count on your tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409500:6O8fnaGN7:m:1:3365131770:64CA36141D8F818AEEBBFBBDCAA3D279:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded the Center for American Liberty because I saw an opportunity to use my legal expertise to fight for our values and restore the rights left-wing extremists are trying to rip from us. I put together a team of talented, trusted attorneys taking on cases like this not for fame or money, but because we love our country and our Constitution. Unfortunately, legal battles aren't free and the costs of these lawsuits pile up quickly. **But the Center for American Liberty takes these cases on anyway, going head-to-head with some of the most powerful and connected leftists in the country. And we win - but as a nonprofit organization, that's only possible with your help.** In fact, Chloe Cole is just one of three clients we are representing on this issue, because we recognize just how serious of a threat it is to allow medical professionals to experiment with our children. I think this will be one of the most important cases in the history of our movement, and I hope you'll be with us every step of the way. [**Can I count on your generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409500:6O8fnaGN7:m:1:3365131770:64CA36141D8F818AEEBBFBBDCAA3D279:r) Winning this lawsuit for Chloe Cole won't turn back the clock. Today Chloe faces medical issues stemming from the surgeries and medication. She will never be able to breastfeed a child - if she's even able to get pregnant after poison coursed through her veins. Her life will never be "normal." But winning this lawsuit will send a loud and clear message to every single doctor in America who is thinking of performing a gruesome and barbaric gender transition surgery on a child: **_There are steep financial consequences for lying to your patients and coercing young children and their parents into irreversible sex changes surgeries ... and we're coming for you!_** My friend, you and I cannot sit back while vulnerable children are chemically castrated when what they need is counseling... while parents are fed the lie, "you can either have a dead daughter or a live son." And we most certainly cannot sit back while money-hungry "Big Pharma" and woke doctors experiment on an entire generation of young Americans like lab rats. Thank you in advance for your help taking on Chloe Cole's case and stopping this outrageous medical malpractice - and attack on American children - in its tracks.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409500:6O8fnaGN7:m:1:3365131770:64CA36141D8F818AEEBBFBBDCAA3D279:r)
---
P.S. Doctors told Chloe and her parents from the beginning that nothing was permanent. They told her she could change her mind if she wanted to, but when she did exactly that, they shrugged their shoulders at her, told her there was nothing they could do and chalked it up to "just another part of her gender journey." Because they'd already gotten what they wanted from her family. P.P.S. We must put a stop to this. Doctors have abandoned their sacred oath in the pursuit of payouts, and we must make them pay. [**Please make a generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty today, and give our lawyers the resources they need to win this crucial fight.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409500:6O8fnaGN7:m:1:3365131770:64CA36141D8F818AEEBBFBBDCAA3D279:r)

body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f1qYJbOt6y9DVfmvu7z_OEJYDgiJhSsAb5Pfa09_5cIl8U352BFICurmRHCuNWA7QzF32hH4wR7kDzWBeXMDp9B06H7f1kc07D03c02QtIX3fwIo0qaKmBZX-Ie8VJRaS7CSDTiH3K3tAcs6xrbBjBjg9P5BwPLV&c=XbfXMwwWjqMRThQ3yEHiHPhZWrI48qgmGi_6w9y-39Iqpj4prcNkCw==&ch=7M2g8R75Qv2zrqkpnnyngU2N0bUqiGhREpXDdH11bLDWji1fkju4YA==)
---
| |
---
| The Gold Dome Download Wednesday, March 8, 2023
Happy Wednesday! This week has already been off to a busy start - as state lawmakers worked into the late hours on Monday to pass their final bills ahead of the Crossover Day deadline. Crossover Day is, of course, the last day for a bill to pass out of either the House or the Senate in order to be considered viable for final passage.
However, even though certain bills "died" in their respective chambers, there still may be a chance for that legislation to make a comeback later this month as an amendment to a different bill. It's exactly why we'll continue to keep a close eye on the Gold Dome, and our lawmakers!
This week's Gold Dome Download will give you a brief rundown on the bills that made the cut on Crossover, and that are now heading over to the opposite chamber for consideration.
---
| |
---
| CROSSOVER LEGISLATION
---
| This session, 955 total pieces of legislation were introduced. As of today, 212 bills have passed the House and 151 have passed the Senate. Below are several of those many bills that made the Crossover cut.
BUDGET: The House and Senate passed [House Bill 18](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f1qYJbOt6y9DVfmvu7z_OEJYDgiJhSsAb5Pfa09_5cIl8U352BFIChYVV6XEN5kKyW7cseLrJTmit-8yLTOhL83Y9SOBKMC2owh70YN-jzGzVN5gpSG6st1Yel-XIAlFhJDsg3c8S9nkqRPC0ZHFgpcqJ4-L43RnE7uEjwK_Xjo=&c=XbfXMwwWjqMRThQ3yEHiHPhZWrI48qgmGi_6w9y-39Iqpj4prcNkCw==&ch=7M2g8R75Qv2zrqkpnnyngU2N0bUqiGhREpXDdH11bLDWji1fkju4YA==), the AFY23 Budget, and it now heads to the Governor's desk for signature. Of note, the budget contains almost $1B in property tax rebates for homeowners.
TAX REBATES: [House Bill 162](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f1qYJbOt6y9DVfmvu7z_OEJYDgiJhSsAb5Pfa09_5cIl8U352BFICqO9pHU-GwKkD8303W9yLXys6wCHlwnlG_Gm48HTmnRkiXWD45Azhs9MRZ0PUp3-UQM_4_aw1DDc2EMk6DwtOlLZdd58bd_Dy-Knk6reFx_AHdInJF06R9c=&c=XbfXMwwWjqMRThQ3yEHiHPhZWrI48qgmGi_6w9y-39Iqpj4prcNkCw==&ch=7M2g8R75Qv2zrqkpnnyngU2N0bUqiGhREpXDdH11bLDWji1fkju4YA==) provides a one-time income tax refund of $250 for individuals and $500 for joint filers. It now heads to the Senate.
ELECTIONS: [Senate Bill 222](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f1qYJbOt6y9DVfmvu7z_OEJYDgiJhSsAb5Pfa09_5cIl8U352BFICqO9pHU-GwKkMF1nKUXnH7YfmbPwVFKKcvEIN8kSjyRACAjoS7aAYqiia1fakWMlqV-i7wAjZ_Q1RIZutC1a-LO0-_rnsHBkb-85HFZVWXGUOgY93HyPWrA=&c=XbfXMwwWjqMRThQ3yEHiHPhZWrI48qgmGi_6w9y-39Iqpj4prcNkCw==&ch=7M2g8R75Qv2zrqkpnnyngU2N0bUqiGhREpXDdH11bLDWji1fkju4YA==), which Greater Georgia endorsed, passed the Senate. This bill bans election offices from accepting outside money to fund elections operations.
PROTECTING CHILDREN: [Senate Bill 140](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f1qYJbOt6y9DVfmvu7z_OEJYDgiJhSsAb5Pfa09_5cIl8U352BFICqO9pHU-GwKk9ipwJ5pRgAdwkfPmblgbX7x9Xfuhk0Pgijx2ILXK0FC4tVK6sQs36wjPP2JkHWaPhW9W50_m9EYP0nWjO0fNkikFxEBo0wca07wWLv-yPEM=&c=XbfXMwwWjqMRThQ3yEHiHPhZWrI48qgmGi_6w9y-39Iqpj4prcNkCw==&ch=7M2g8R75Qv2zrqkpnnyngU2N0bUqiGhREpXDdH11bLDWji1fkju4YA==) bans health care providers from administering hormones or performing surgeries to change the gender of underaged children. It now heads to the House.
EDUCATION AND SCHOOLS: [Senate Bill 233](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f1qYJbOt6y9DVfmvu7z_OEJYDgiJhSsAb5Pfa09_5cIl8U352BFICqO9pHU-GwKkgvluzr4TSuLXMYwhBXaWbxsZdWgIMrJXSiVFt7N5GrLg1RM7oGkdHdUCwuLd_nHl1eo1lRIqqlJIcefn7p77SPQZiYoGwLzlEy3bKexuH9g=&c=XbfXMwwWjqMRThQ3yEHiHPhZWrI48qgmGi_6w9y-39Iqpj4prcNkCw==&ch=7M2g8R75Qv2zrqkpnnyngU2N0bUqiGhREpXDdH11bLDWji1fkju4YA==) creates a $6,000 voucher program for students wishing to attend the private school of their choice. It now heads to the House.
[House Bill 538](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f1qYJbOt6y9DVfmvu7z_OEJYDgiJhSsAb5Pfa09_5cIl8U352BFICqO9pHU-GwKkjBMRKsFEk6tdtxPbcvEuvhofeEXuprzbUstBcSx1bb2to-X9mRA38BqQIPZPUD_q0aXFXOesGXhW2975Ja3CdwZKUPptPjDVk0jPouL01jc=&c=XbfXMwwWjqMRThQ3yEHiHPhZWrI48qgmGi_6w9y-39Iqpj4prcNkCw==&ch=7M2g8R75Qv2zrqkpnnyngU2N0bUqiGhREpXDdH11bLDWji1fkju4YA==) requires the State Board of Education to approve materials to improve the literacy rate of students in Kindergarten-3rd grade. The Senate also passed [Senate Bill 211](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f1qYJbOt6y9DVfmvu7z_OEJYDgiJhSsAb5Pfa09_5cIl8U352BFICqO9pHU-GwKkzg9VJSNVy4AvEmtxpGnFyLOvGBgo8ru2KWkHsmOthbK7e8VPKwlyyoeSMq24p3KyYnFxMw3nSvsbk6fqnuBA8_4xlbrkicnUYX1sG5ci0Wk=&c=XbfXMwwWjqMRThQ3yEHiHPhZWrI48qgmGi_6w9y-39Iqpj4prcNkCw==&ch=7M2g8R75Qv2zrqkpnnyngU2N0bUqiGhREpXDdH11bLDWji1fkju4YA==), which establishes the Georgia Council on Literacy.
SUPPORTING OUR VETERANS: [Senate Bill 195](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f1qYJbOt6y9DVfmvu7z_OEJYDgiJhSsAb5Pfa09_5cIl8U352BFICqO9pHU-GwKkzz5TfRYBNYBEwxingcrAyapLXRAZUvt19RApqd8k67xrTJW4UW0rOLSbCpfevh4bb9wMMnQlDajmKumU-8_6Witx4cI_Qi636-QZSYMyySc=&c=XbfXMwwWjqMRThQ3yEHiHPhZWrI48qgmGi_6w9y-39Iqpj4prcNkCw==&ch=7M2g8R75Qv2zrqkpnnyngU2N0bUqiGhREpXDdH11bLDWji1fkju4YA==) would cut red tape and expedite professional licenses for active duty service members, veterans, and their spouses. It now heads to the House.
CRACKING DOWN ON CRIME: [House Bill 505](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f1qYJbOt6y9DVfmvu7z_OEJYDgiJhSsAb5Pfa09_5cIl8U352BFICqO9pHU-GwKk3l5RYzEnwxlPrMHrAP-B6nNDoOPDIDc3PVS9a2OehAom_6WmLhG8p2iCRQE-XxAY3ENSx-4iQgv4fNuAHTkZHcD7d5Y7ZwabKoYReHn9YB4=&c=XbfXMwwWjqMRThQ3yEHiHPhZWrI48qgmGi_6w9y-39Iqpj4prcNkCw==&ch=7M2g8R75Qv2zrqkpnnyngU2N0bUqiGhREpXDdH11bLDWji1fkju4YA==) elevates rioting from a misdemeanor to a felony, and imposes mandatory minimums for rioters. [House Bill 500](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f1qYJbOt6y9DVfmvu7z_OEJYDgiJhSsAb5Pfa09_5cIl8U352BFICqO9pHU-GwKkN5jp7JujlOhRKex1XWLPszHo5uJFQwOQjbI3meaKPg5dlhRMbAzLHo-6u1Ep7snaPmR_tpk1KKa7bDG14RJJ-QuAMjCVkEvMNHzDL2i54nM=&c=XbfXMwwWjqMRThQ3yEHiHPhZWrI48qgmGi_6w9y-39Iqpj4prcNkCw==&ch=7M2g8R75Qv2zrqkpnnyngU2N0bUqiGhREpXDdH11bLDWji1fkju4YA==) makes setting fire to police cars a crime in Georgia.
PROTECTING GEORGIA LAND: [Senate Bill 132](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f1qYJbOt6y9DVfmvu7z_OEJYDgiJhSsAb5Pfa09_5cIl8U352BFICqO9pHU-GwKkrt1yFMtRACFwtlyE0kJypjHPp2DmEw-Y4NJUDz-3mXDb1Myv__SdpX9lRKzDMnmnnO4reNAtkbMmB66Draz8qT5keBgvWEQE67gu_jGbvDY=&c=XbfXMwwWjqMRThQ3yEHiHPhZWrI48qgmGi_6w9y-39Iqpj4prcNkCw==&ch=7M2g8R75Qv2zrqkpnnyngU2N0bUqiGhREpXDdH11bLDWji1fkju4YA==) bans foreign entities from purchasing Georgia farmland or any land in close proximity to our military bases. It now heads to the House.
HATE CRIMES: [House Bill 30](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f1qYJbOt6y9DVfmvu7z_OEJYDgiJhSsAb5Pfa09_5cIl8U352BFICqO9pHU-GwKkp2kIAVBAHRzELzAJnfh7gWa0UqDYpzHR7ralbcwzNXt-_2NhsyCTB6WQmioV9gRRbERKVmO7ZpwU-piXf1zuqUw4iQzxHNB0BwPxQVC_aec=&c=XbfXMwwWjqMRThQ3yEHiHPhZWrI48qgmGi_6w9y-39Iqpj4prcNkCw==&ch=7M2g8R75Qv2zrqkpnnyngU2N0bUqiGhREpXDdH11bLDWji1fkju4YA==) defines antisemitism to aid prosecutions for antisemitic hate crimes. It now heads to the Senate.

### Senate Rules Chairman
### Senator Matt Brass

[Senator Matt Brass](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f1qYJbOt6y9DVfmvu7z_OEJYDgiJhSsAb5Pfa09_5cIl8U352BFICqO9pHU-GwKkEHL4V3kj64GGy_Xia_ZdfihJks1POtJhjxeAy-STkYnx6O6xkuKwFKJbA43LxMimaLbJC-JApe9cRqqywPJ9zaxnu5GFD4K-U26RX-6aWvJNxhm9p4T4L1A3RUEvlsKRaPiuhj_exVQ=&c=XbfXMwwWjqMRThQ3yEHiHPhZWrI48qgmGi_6w9y-39Iqpj4prcNkCw==&ch=7M2g8R75Qv2zrqkpnnyngU2N0bUqiGhREpXDdH11bLDWji1fkju4YA==) represents the 28th Senate District which covers Newnan, Georgia. | LATEST FROM GREATER GEORGIA
HOLDING STACEY ABRAMS ACCOUNTABLE: Greater Georgia initially [called for an investigation](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f1qYJbOt6y9DVfmvu7z_OEJYDgiJhSsAb5Pfa09_5cIl8U352BFICnBYc3_6ExqHLaS21WzsgB6xeyP--9iPB3dqJDzPhQp6eHgtM03ToVWvCsyIFbDk7y0LbQIkyk3xMjTCgN8NBVA0eRhDmY4kLNPPHUVJmv27YvUJP6oMyy1YTBXkR_fqxRe7ZC7d2RanISjM0Y84_jP30N_j84sDS5lEi_AyKWvZSO_dUi-ViBofA5Dpuaym1Q==&c=XbfXMwwWjqMRThQ3yEHiHPhZWrI48qgmGi_6w9y-39Iqpj4prcNkCw==&ch=7M2g8R75Qv2zrqkpnnyngU2N0bUqiGhREpXDdH11bLDWji1fkju4YA==) into Stacey Abrams' New Georgia Project (NGP) in November after top officials at the organization accused it of "gross financial malfeasance." Since then, reporting from The Washington Free Beacon has revealed a whole trove of [alleged illegal activity](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f1qYJbOt6y9DVfmvu7z_OEJYDgiJhSsAb5Pfa09_5cIl8U352BFICnBYc3_6ExqHZy66BOXFrJZYWqYGbArwHBwpksLT6C8nPBeYYp8AP3BQwrwtAnSKGH7rv78m--OAAv9mlov4Mp9m6cN0yswVDeSCDdNgxbDYtN5EtWTjiL1hBG98ENX1JN0GEdoY5hf97HN-sVzdtQgOKYIHuvfMdvEhbo4I1oxCR-ESYvlSJN2LftGUo0UW_70RNQ6c1pElbWqXd83SZ-jj_a_FL55a6XklMq9k__-XTbGmnLsL_7XIpcOPvrWYP8azK-alvkdo&c=XbfXMwwWjqMRThQ3yEHiHPhZWrI48qgmGi_6w9y-39Iqpj4prcNkCw==&ch=7M2g8R75Qv2zrqkpnnyngU2N0bUqiGhREpXDdH11bLDWji1fkju4YA==) by NGP, and top state officials have formally launched an investigation. Greater Georgia weighed in on it last week. From the press release:
"The web of political 'voting rights' organizations built to fuel Stacey Abrams' celebrity and fundraising is under needed scrutiny. Not only did these groups invest millions to perpetuate the voter suppression myth, but they did so using apparently illegal tactics," said Loeffler. "These allegations impair the work of every legitimate organization working honestly and legally to empower and protect Georgia voters. This is why I applaud our state's oversight agencies for taking action to investigate fraudulent front groups in Georgia, before they can interfere in our next election cycle."
To read the full press release, [CLICK HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f1qYJbOt6y9DVfmvu7z_OEJYDgiJhSsAb5Pfa09_5cIl8U352BFICqO9pHU-GwKkcg64MDdf9f2tZLWWzF58FMa-uaVXntIjX3WscXoAqCKH_FNdbrN8RfDx57xfz4AVmu-XCgHtZxNtIkfPDJTDnkjzBSMtvkRcI7LR1zgk67BTP9JzP-TYELtmQfBYvVmYYJbBzytvJCQccZXx9DfiBa9FO4X-pK9EQSRN2t7QOKo=&c=XbfXMwwWjqMRThQ3yEHiHPhZWrI48qgmGi_6w9y-39Iqpj4prcNkCw==&ch=7M2g8R75Qv2zrqkpnnyngU2N0bUqiGhREpXDdH11bLDWji1fkju4YA==).

clean_body: | | | | == | | | The Gold Dome Download Wednesday, March 8, 2023 Happy Wednesday! This week has already been off to a busy start - as state lawmakers worked into the late hours on Monday to pass their final bills ahead of the Crossover Day deadline. Crossover Day is, of course, the last day for a bill to pass out of either the House or the Senate in order to be considered viable for final passage. However, even though certain bills "died" in their respective chambers, there still may be a chance for that legislation to make a comeback later this month as an amendment to a different bill. It's exactly why we'll continue to keep a close eye on the Gold Dome, and our lawmakers! This week's Gold Dome Download will give you a brief rundown on the bills that made the cut on Crossover, and that are now heading over to the opposite chamber for consideration. | | | CROSSOVER LEGISLATION | This session, 955 total pieces of legislation were introduced. As of today, 212 bills have passed the House and 151 have passed the Senate. Below are several of those many bills that made the Crossover cut. BUDGET: The House and Senate passed ==, the AFY23 Budget, and it now heads to the Governor's desk for signature. Of note, the budget contains almost $1B in property tax rebates for homeowners. TAX REBATES: == provides a one-time income tax refund of $250 for individuals and $500 for joint filers. It now heads to the Senate. ELECTIONS: ==, which Greater Georgia endorsed, passed the Senate. This bill bans election offices from accepting outside money to fund elections operations. PROTECTING CHILDREN: == bans health care providers from administering hormones or performing surgeries to change the gender of underaged children. It now heads to the House. EDUCATION AND SCHOOLS: == creates a $6,000 voucher program for students wishing to attend the private school of their choice. It now heads to the House. == requires the State Board of Education to approve materials to improve the literacy rate of students in Kindergarten-3rd grade. The Senate also passed ==, which establishes the Georgia Council on Literacy. SUPPORTING OUR VETERANS: == would cut red tape and expedite professional licenses for active duty service members, veterans, and their spouses. It now heads to the House. CRACKING DOWN ON CRIME: == elevates rioting from a misdemeanor to a felony, and imposes mandatory minimums for rioters. == makes setting fire to police cars a crime in Georgia. PROTECTING GEORGIA LAND: == bans foreign entities from purchasing Georgia farmland or any land in close proximity to our military bases. It now heads to the House. HATE CRIMES: == defines antisemitism to aid prosecutions for antisemitic hate crimes. It now heads to the Senate. | | | KNOW YOUR STATE SENATE & HOUSE MEMBERS | | | | Senate Rules Chairman Senator Matt Brass == represents the 28th Senate District which covers Newnan, Georgia. Senator Brass is the Chairman of the Rules Committee and is on the Children and Families Committee, Education and Youth Committee, Health and Human Services Committee, Natural Resources and the Environment Committee, Regulated Industries and Utilities Committee, and Administrative Affairs Committee. Senator Brass has ==, including an education bill (==) which headed to the House on March 2nd. Click == to visit the Senate website. | | | | House Rules Chairman Representative Richard Smith == represents the 139th House District which encompasses Columbus, Georgia. Representative Smith is the House Rules Committee Chairman and also serves on the Appropriations, Insurance, Natural Resources and the Environment, and Reapportionment and Redistricting committees. Representative Smith has sponsored numerous bills this session (== & ==), both of which have passed the House AND Senate. Click == to visit the House website. | | | LATEST FROM GREATER GEORGIA HOLDING STACEY ABRAMS ACCOUNTABLE: Greater Georgia initially == into Stacey Abrams' New Georgia Project (NGP) in November after top officials at the organization accused it of "gross financial malfeasance." Since then, reporting from The Washington Free Beacon has revealed a whole trove of == by NGP, and top state officials have formally launched an investigation. Greater Georgia weighed in on it last week. From the press release: "The web of political 'voting rights' organizations built to fuel Stacey Abrams' celebrity and fundraising is under needed scrutiny. Not only did these groups invest millions to perpetuate the voter suppression myth, but they did so using apparently illegal tactics," said Loeffler. "These allegations impair the work of every legitimate organization working honestly and legally to empower and protect Georgia voters. This is why I applaud our state's oversight agencies for taking action to investigate fraudulent front groups in Georgia, before they can interfere in our next election cycle." To read the full press release, ==. | == | | | FOLLOW THE PROCESS Stay up to date on all things under the Gold Dome including committee hearings, track legislation, and more by visiting, ==. name: Shift WA
subject: FWD: The deaths on Democrats’ hands
body:
Did you get a chance to read the email below?

It may be lengthy - but it's packed with important information about the consequences of the Democrats' grossly irresponsible 2021 bill banning police from pursuing suspects fleeing the scene of a crime.

Well, TODAY is the last day for House Democrats to cooperate with Republican lawmakers and pass a bill reversing their terrible law. On behalf of rational Washingtonians everywhere, we here at Shift WA have a few demands of our own for Democrats:

1\. Return the current bill to the original form, allowing for the police pursuit of suspects of car theft and not sunsetting it after two years - and PASS IT!
2\. Demand that far-Left State Senator Manka Dhingra (D-Kirkland) schedule a committee hearing for the bill.
3\. Secure an agreement that would ensure the bill is brought to a floor vote in the State Senate.

But that's not all. We're also demanding mainstream media outlets grow a backbone and call out Democrats specifically - not the "Legislature," as they've been reporting - for the deeply flawed 2021 bill. Until that happens, Democrats will not feel the pressure - or the shame they so richly deserve - to take action.

[**We hope you will join us by supporting our organization - the only communications outlet delivering state news from a rational perspective - today!**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61574597:sdSz2KDHN:m:1:2610672541:8208E98B9C00EEF37FBC960E64CAB585:r)

Thank you,

The Shift WA team
Communities across our state have suffered the high cost of Democrats' irresponsible 2021 bill. Despite the growing number of tragic incidents, many Democrats are still refusing to amend their law. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61574598:sdSz2KDHN:m:1:2610672541:8208E98B9C00EEF37FBC960E64CAB585:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

TOMORROW is the last day for lawmakers in the State House to pass HB 1363, the amending bill to the catastrophic law passed by Democrats in 2021 banning police from pursuing criminals fleeing the scene of a crime.

As Shift WA reported, the original version of HB 1363 would have allowed police pursuits for any crimes given a reasonable suspicion a crime had been committed. Unfortunately for families across our state, the rationality behind that was a step too far for many House Democrats.

The current, watered-down version of the bill gives police the authority to pursue someone who they reasonably suspect of a violent crime, a sexual crime, vehicular assault, escape, DUI, and domestic violence. **Notably, vehicular theft - a crime that has reached unprecedented levels in our state - was not included.**

Communities across our state have suffered the high cost of Democrats' irresponsible 2021 bill. Recently - in a truly tragic consequence - two foster children, an 8-year-old girl and a 6-year-old boy, were killed by a driver who was speeding and allegedly driving under the influence. A mere hour before the crash, police clocked the speeding driver but could not pursue due to Democrats' insane law.

**Despite the growing number of tragic incidents, many Democrats are still refusing to amend their law.** And mainstream media outlets are refusing to hold them accountable.

David Horsey, the editorial cartoonist for The Seattle Times, criticized the law in a recent piece. But - tellingly - he stopped short of calling out Democrats in particular. In the cartoon, Horsey refers to the "Legislature" saying it is not safe to pursue criminals. Of course, that's not true. **It 's not the "Legislature," it's Democrats.**

Given the impending need for action, we here at Shift WA are demanding that House Democrats take three actions before tomorrow.

1. Return the current bill to the original copy allowing for the police pursuit of criminals suspected of car theft and not sunseting after two years - and PASS IT!
2. Demand that far-Left State Sen. Manka Dhingra (D-Kirkland) schedule a committee hearing for the bill.
3. Secure an agreement that would ensure the bill is brought to a floor vote in the State Senate.

**Innocent people will continue to suffer until Democrats ' irresponsible law is completely reversed.** That means cooperation from Democrat lawmakers. **And that cooperation requires the mainstream media grow a backbone and call out Democrats.**

Until then, we here at Shift WA are doing our part to ensure the public knows what is going on with the police pursuit bill - and **how Democrats are responsible for the death and destruction of lives that has followed it**.

[**But we need your help. We hope you 'll help us continue our important work by contributing today!**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61574597:sdSz2KDHN:m:1:2610672541:8208E98B9C00EEF37FBC960E64CAB585:r)

As the only media outlets reporting news coming out of Olympia from a conservative perspective, our work must go on. [**We hope you will help today.**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61574597:sdSz2KDHN:m:1:2610672541:8208E98B9C00EEF37FBC960E64CAB585:r)

Thank you,

The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61574599:sdSz2KDHN:m:1:2610672541:8208E98B9C00EEF37FBC960E64CAB585:r)

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

| | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c23c6894bdac49df878abdf6556e8820&_e=4Mjvt3AvswwIXgcNZ-n-uad0AIFfeUV1FK7rxxb-WR8yaoowopdvJWR8lMedAoCoLCp9otl7HCu5GaNBp2DletB_CU-rDZef3MKKey-9IhtXCj679GxVgXtet25gYuLnHe01Wk8BmkzCVp9Y6kJSpeVFsKj3st49aXfdD3wiOAb9Hsah0EximSiQ83sjaK0acE5RcOyaO_BEJL7bLITzqjSGX3XtUMsar___UfMtzHIsA10PrfAQsY8wC6Ymik5Y2bGsKCFnYQc1sM-ZWupVfxAh5cQ-gW4Ns-MAnPtgebW4IZynVKduLAdWCmKMI3-lVMkMUkyU_xVeWo0FjlTeDFavmVxf7qaRZ-bdAvCBwhbcp-4yt0q3ZXq3CPfsjcLcLuXVqgkU9utuwk5-y-MrWlx3D3SgiTG-bgpHajJsTF4%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c23c6894bdac49df878abdf6556e8820&_e=4Mjvt3AvswwIXgcNZ-n-uad0AIFfeUV1FK7rxxb-WR8yaoowopdvJWR8lMedAoCoLCp9otl7HCu5GaNBp2DletB_CU-rDZef3MKKey-9IhtXCj679GxVgXtet25gYuLnHe01Wk8BmkzCVp9Y6kJSpeVFsKj3st49aXfdD3wiOAb9Hsah0EximSiQ83sjaK0acE5RcOyaO_BEJL7bLITzqjSGX3XtUMsar___UfMtzHIsA10PrfAQsY8wC6Ymik5YJhNCkWv-_6nABwT-HcyOg_VyGiM1homTP0Em9ZC68h9-PBnZ0bU0HXPx3pHO4c1qLN7zpJNqzkFQubBc4eVor4HbeXNW4fpch8O6xF28njdi65ma0YvOqMFVHRny93KmKoqN6iq_Cgr-tXs1_m1n-y-ddRWWQmJKVSg2QcZdd7w%3D)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c23c6894bdac49df878abdf6556e8820&_e=4Mjvt3AvswwIXgcNZ-n-uad0AIFfeUV1FK7rxxb-WR8yaoowopdvJWR8lMedAoCoLCp9otl7HCu5GaNBp2DletB_CU-rDZef3MKKey-9IhtXCj679GxVgXtet25gYuLnHe01Wk8BmkzCVp9Y6kJSpeVFsKj3st49aXfdD3wiOAb9Hsah0EximSiQ83sjaK0acE5RcOyaO_BEJL7bLITzqjSGX3XtUMsar___UfMtzHIsA10PrfAQsY8wC6Ymik5YYIYiJdS3xilJk4KlHpS64YuUSPX2kao1623CbRvT8PZhM395DN1RdTOr8OeX3VfHPt0b6HA1xnRVqhXvgzEEShWD7Lj76Z6PH0t2NWXK0_vpE0i_5gTtBhqX62ZHgts8xj3up8JLQcSu14z5_7x5beBuHQmnQ7hRRiyhD4tHfPw%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c23c6894bdac49df878abdf6556e8820&_e=4Mjvt3AvswwIXgcNZ-n-uad0AIFfeUV1FK7rxxb-WR8yaoowopdvJWR8lMedAoCoLCp9otl7HCu5GaNBp2DletB_CU-rDZef3MKKey-9IhtXCj679GxVgXtet25gYuLnHe01Wk8BmkzCVp9Y6kJSpeVFsKj3st49aXfdD3wiOAb9Hsah0EximSiQ83sjaK0acE5RcOyaO_BEJL7bLITzqjSGX3XtUMsar___UfMtzHIsA10PrfAQsY8wC6Ymik5YuAK_gtXADHD6FXTfUGoXdBJ3quAxqtJBGJRMJ0M9Lm_9kkel8rL79GrXPNepN12-IIk0y7_lYdJTYsnMWAi9kSw1RtJ4qt-YOEmQ6wJTvYqZ8Pnrb0BbnVNtkDykrAWvbdZa1pXWmXMjPsgWPKqYXnzkxhJiHa_ndpjSquviKmA%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c23c6894bdac49df878abdf6556e8820&_e=4Mjvt3AvswwIXgcNZ-n-uad0AIFfeUV1FK7rxxb-WR8yaoowopdvJWR8lMedAoCoLCp9otl7HCu5GaNBp2DletB_CU-rDZef3MKKey-9IhtXCj679GxVgXtet25gYuLnHe01Wk8BmkzCVp9Y6kJSpeVFsKj3st49aXfdD3wiOAb9Hsah0EximSiQ83sjaK0acE5RcOyaO_BEJL7bLITzqjSGX3XtUMsar___UfMtzHIsA10PrfAQsY8wC6Ymik5Y4dWSOtscSZl3J1Ua7oJHPc799w2rJOPZnSawv6I3WQngQHua1tW2VfQNK_bbfF19IpupNG91gqek-Gsc0mgBIqxQ6TlUSCBWLG1LQv3B65E12taTljy7sHyllO3skWW8zX-BbCrjrVd8N-gGWS-4v1KSc5KLvZHicPU1-giNehQ%3D)**

clean_body: It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government? For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." | | | | | Peter, The Equal Rights Amendment would add one simple, powerful sentence to the U.S. Constitution: "Equality of rights under the law shall not be denied or abridged by the United States or by any state on account of sex." All genders should be equal under the law. [**Tell your member of Congress: remove the deadline for the Equal Rights Amendment! Pass H.J. Res. 25/S.J. Res. 4 now!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8bdeaaad-eab1-4667-ac6e-0ef0c1f283f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

name: America First Policy Institute
subject: America First is dead?
body:
| | | Peter, **Some members of the media are proclaiming that the America First movement is DEAD. They want nothing more than for our movement to fail.** That hasn't stopped us at the America First Policy Institute from working around the clock to prove them wrong. **In fact, it 's made us work even harder.** In 2022, we launched the first-ever _America First Agenda: Guide to the Issues_ policy book, the ultimate blueprint for American prosperity, security, freedom, and opportunity. Our team published more than 100 op-eds and policy papers, and we even brought the America First message right to YOU on our bus tour across America. And 2023 is going to be even bigger.
**We need to know:**[_**will you be part of the movement?**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409811:JChTZaGtN:m:1:3365131770:9366F12F7F25E9D19BA0A661747A46F6:r)

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

| | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a7ed75b616444de7abce2cd9b4c634d3&_e=6T3OgMBYbXVQ5TrHiR_z3F2un7dTziQ5neHIXxnenf7eR0cbi4Y869LTpDH16rSJOmQRmiCFs8xhcrZcTtpXRHXp5JCI3jXXJeqWOVu_pLlJHnUMrbqbwJQ658aC7VLe0o-VHA57-h3OX7-VQrR0Cf78XnennhNApQl8sHlDXbRKmpni4J1JiE_-eJef5ANTNBgIe8k3rrCE4sH7xlKqyArkMDpEIdQ1rTvqiDBzEjRngEj8vWWMzf3JoeK-jrgJPZAgBDirov1ZxoB3YrQNgFXm1M3nSv076QBIsiQ8dLxjDW-bb--6yDrgN0-MFlsd8Iaw1Bt_kbQWc8MqO38WW-QF6o5TYlOIdnA5IxWHL3uzNdjEG0q2RaUhczmZ9kPTPvCAnM5VzcToHa6iiwO8tFKWd7uEoG6SdCKGCgdKLys%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a7ed75b616444de7abce2cd9b4c634d3&_e=6T3OgMBYbXVQ5TrHiR_z3F2un7dTziQ5neHIXxnenf7eR0cbi4Y869LTpDH16rSJOmQRmiCFs8xhcrZcTtpXRHXp5JCI3jXXJeqWOVu_pLlJHnUMrbqbwJQ658aC7VLe0o-VHA57-h3OX7-VQrR0Cf78XnennhNApQl8sHlDXbRKmpni4J1JiE_-eJef5ANTNBgIe8k3rrCE4sH7xlKqyArkMDpEIdQ1rTvqiDBzEjRngEj8vWWMzf3JoeK-jrgJIVcK8EOdo7imnxqn_zBgFACb1vnsEeERDqc6og3V4oV09XQog4xHrFqZ7h7TbkCA1DIyrJWPVhpBDKfSkZke5dfEc_R4RZFDPlyZ3jvYslmLA1Www4ADxUWlYQ5EYg18X4XqKuQGqAGpRiWwxiyfr949c8AEGZ1wxnyljpyUQo8%3D)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a7ed75b616444de7abce2cd9b4c634d3&_e=6T3OgMBYbXVQ5TrHiR_z3F2un7dTziQ5neHIXxnenf7eR0cbi4Y869LTpDH16rSJOmQRmiCFs8xhcrZcTtpXRHXp5JCI3jXXJeqWOVu_pLlJHnUMrbqbwJQ658aC7VLe0o-VHA57-h3OX7-VQrR0Cf78XnennhNApQl8sHlDXbRKmpni4J1JiE_-eJef5ANTNBgIe8k3rrCE4sH7xlKqyArkMDpEIdQ1rTvqiDBzEjRngEj8vWWMzf3JoeK-jrgJGeXvLMegZsEwapAJZYNotYz_nBFXYMd0PRiF4bxVZvQBrpMjshU4gtGPVAM7iV0f2yJV1IPhcwO9wK4JOjfI9iXa_Q2qTjQdO9jrn6QtWKm2din24--A3Iwr-mpBB6TCbDROZTCDCAMtueuFeGGF8tvbWdVEqjr6r1hN4dgJlQY%3D) [NO](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a7ed75b616444de7abce2cd9b4c634d3&_e=6T3OgMBYbXVQ5TrHiR_z3F2un7dTziQ5neHIXxnenf7eR0cbi4Y869LTpDH16rSJOmQRmiCFs8xhcrZcTtpXRHXp5JCI3jXXJeqWOVu_pLlJHnUMrbqbwJQ658aC7VLe0o-VHA57-h3OX7-VQrR0Cf78XnennhNApQl8sHlDXbRKmpni4J1JiE_-eJef5ANTNBgIe8k3rrCE4sH7xlKqyArkMDpEIdQ1rTvqiDBzEjRngEj8vWWMzf3JoeK-jrgJQHUZHkf7qzHtOGhbFCgdVhgzv5VrtFCHgSRvpN_2HNwZ2nuTSLwFLE4NQV_-Q9rsnmIz9QlHRpxOWLgAf6t9rONZh-6XHwuuZZ3Fb2reP4fKL3GClKV9_XQ1bym7Dv0viLma7pOvjvQKlinWRO4aLypuMElXz6p4i-RWVVDnDLA%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a7ed75b616444de7abce2cd9b4c634d3&_e=6T3OgMBYbXVQ5TrHiR_z3F2un7dTziQ5neHIXxnenf7eR0cbi4Y869LTpDH16rSJOmQRmiCFs8xhcrZcTtpXRHXp5JCI3jXXJeqWOVu_pLlJHnUMrbqbwJQ658aC7VLe0o-VHA57-h3OX7-VQrR0Cf78XnennhNApQl8sHlDXbRKmpni4J1JiE_-eJef5ANTNBgIe8k3rrCE4sH7xlKqyArkMDpEIdQ1rTvqiDBzEjRngEj8vWWMzf3JoeK-jrgJlFbWNgBZCWdr960dpKIf0gAD48ScPEpyP-dp9Tpd7BBrSsmRhSzA0jX7kC8230URPHZJOCzDBFQROGy1-oYDuau1H_hnQfbZpJvnwueoZii34x0qMsOvC6u0sbn4MMv5D2K6jr62oN4nZUGh6qQUzM7HoUKvTlux4_83v8s5sLw%3D)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Rand Paul
subject: Remember when Dr. Fauci said this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
In November 2021, I confronted Dr. Fauci about the NIH changing the definition of gain-of-function research to cover his a**.

| | | **FAUCI FLASHBACK** _
_
---
_Fauci can’t hide from the facts_
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrv954u9o0jqb5n5j4rngjhraeh26d1uv691uir0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9ie2p33c5h2bs)
---

The clip was propaganda, not evidence the actual videotape shows." -- Tucker Carlson](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651243%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=scyADAkLIFCf4nejdYz7PA&sysid=1)**

They both feed off of each other, pushing distortions of the truth and outright lies to advance their corrupt agenda and keep their grip on power. The democrat lies don't fool me, and they don't fool Tucker Carlson. Tucker got access to the January 6th security footage, and one thing is clear-- the January 6th _Committee_ is the ultimate example of why people are right to distrust democrats and the media. The committee selectively edited and distorted facts to fit their narrative. The liberal media took up the torch and ran with the lies, but now THE TRUTH IS COMING OUT. Tucker combed through thousands of hours of January 6th footage, and the TRUTH paints a whole different picture than the lies the democrats pushed. They should be ashamed of themselves, but over the last few years, it has become clear that they have NO SHAME. To them, lying is as easy as breathing. **[Watch the clip from Tucker Carlson and decide the TRUTH for yourself! >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651355%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8G%2fLSjqRSNt%2fBWJFe8dlLQ&sysid=1)**

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Warning: Sexual brainwashing; don’t be a victim
body:
I've filed a groundbreaking new lawsuit against a hospital and the doctors that lied to a young girl and her family

| |
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a1be1a1c3d754d50abe6f65ab41ca809&_e=aK_CBmCud6Vprro5X-6a5jpY91NWgF7aUuYsU0j5OQW_pygdbHm0RuBsAnswbHxoWO7R3DGV1F2huD1SFTtkW2BO307VflgeQqicKstk7QPFqencB-CkMSv55v7n7fkaKVSxlE631xsnEgiOy6K3blypPBC2uLtBRAZeEaZvlWRuoigANUVRbOg4Jv2x4nZmsUX2C1JTqjGivKkxDWoPW5Yfkv_SLa3eUYjhSOHhkRlC5IvVVTtGXXLDS5WaVgWk1DDaH01AzzulxVglpprG7Oz89sU66SRn05b8A5GxO5gW2bSPmORfEdfalDpdIoAtMgfc26cbuYx9mONXJ1Q6fP8W3uiuWpyRelY-F5Nl1XQ-QfvToeeosXjY2RzmWG5b)
---
**_" It's well known that 80%, even up to 85% of children who experience gender dysphoria and cross sex identification feel differently when they reach puberty after the early phases of puberty."_**
---
-Dr. Riittakerttu Kaltiala, Chief Psychiatrist, Tampere University Hospital and one of Finland's leading experts on pediatric gender care
---
|
---
I've filed a groundbreaking new lawsuit against a hospital and the doctors that lied to a young girl and her family, manipulating her into taking medication and having surgery to become a "boy." In fact, my client and I joined Laura Ingraham the other night on her great Fox News show _Ingraham Angle_ to discuss the lawsuit and the dangerous lies that woke doctors are telling patients and their parents to push their radical ideology. [**Please take a moment right now to watch video from this primetime interview and learn what we 're up against in this monumental battle - then consider making a tax-deductible gift of $25 or more to help fund this critical lawsuit.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a1be1a1c3d754d50abe6f65ab41ca809&_e=aK_CBmCud6Vprro5X-6a5jpY91NWgF7aUuYsU0j5OQW_pygdbHm0RuBsAnswbHxoWO7R3DGV1F2huD1SFTtkW2BO307VflgeQqicKstk7QPFqencB-CkMSv55v7n7fkaKVSxlE631xsnEgiOy6K3blypPBC2uLtBRAZeEaZvlWRuoigANUVRbOg4Jv2x4nZmsUX2C1JTqjGivKkxDWoPW5Yfkv_SLa3eUYjhSOHhkRnK-XJbk9ZZvPn9oUGx1Uw-LZKYt3RxEivos3sbX0awnwEErg7GnQExoIkdGTxrtTGLLTAIIjnJM9AIz4r1hxTQtl26PLMn7PLx99Cvy_Oaj74_oIbpK_RyGlmRQtqAJXeBnFS2Q5JZOAHQKWsdW39e) Chloe Cole was just 9 years old when she was bombarded with transgender ideology. As a child Chloe was bombarded--largely through social media--with the idea that "transitioning" would make her special, accepted and popular. When she shared with her pediatrician that she felt uncomfortable as a girl, leftist activist doctors put her on an irreversible path to chemically and surgically "transitioning" her gender. At age 13, the doctors began pumping Chloe full of dangerous drugs with unknown long-term side effects. At 15, they performed a double mastectomy on her. And all of this happened because doctors lied and concealed less invasive treatment options from Chloe and her parents. They told her parents point blank that they could have a dead daughter or a live son. That's right. A dead daughter or a living son. Those were their only options. (So they said.) EVEN THOUGH RESEARCH SHOWS THE VAST MAJORITY OF CHILDREN EXPERIENCING GENDER DYSPHORIA GET OVER IT AFTER PUBERTY BEGINS. Chloe Cole and her parents were lied to, coerced, and manipulated not only for monetary gain, but as part of a radical woke agenda that is being pushed on vulnerable children across the country. That's why we're not just suing Kaiser Permanente... **We 're suing Dr. Lisa Taylor** for prescribing testosterone and the dangerous puberty blocker Lupron Depot without doing ANY proper evaluation or treatment of Chloe's other symptoms OR receiving any kind of informed consent from Chloe or her parents for puberty blockers. **We 're suing Dr. Hop Nguyen Le** for performing a double mastectomy without evaluating whether it was the right decision for Chloe, who was just 15 years old and for not obtaining proper informed consent to perform the surgery. **And we 're suing Dr. Susanna Watson** who recommended that Chloe have her breasts removed without evaluating Chloe's mental or psychological condition. Additionally, she withheld information that may have changed Chloe's mind about the surgery, including a litany of studies that show drugs and surgeries do not help children suffering from gender dysphoria. _If folks like you and I don 't stand up and fight back now, who will? _ [**Chloe deserves justice, and children deserve protection - so can we count on your tax-deductible donation of $25 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a1be1a1c3d754d50abe6f65ab41ca809&_e=aK_CBmCud6Vprro5X-6a5jpY91NWgF7aUuYsU0j5OQW_pygdbHm0RuBsAnswbHxoWO7R3DGV1F2huD1SFTtkW2BO307VflgeQqicKstk7QPFqencB-CkMSv55v7n7fkaKVSxlE631xsnEgiOy6K3blypPBC2uLtBRAZeEaZvlWRuoigANUVRbOg4Jv2x4nZmsUX2C1JTqjGivKkxDWoPW5Yfkv_SLa3eUYjhSOHhkRnzSUrxGkdSTGHhfRPyShAjVhIIuGcNfWyilL7t1GmClH2ljxWrDCz-8OlViRTN6rSPg5vK_1rwLnNy0R0tZDu4EsWT_7vE05aqQ9-qU5WBMerivyNLpaOJ4Yrj4vMnWjEGpIWhZj3QbTXIqPJESgfk) My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded the Center for American Liberty because I saw an opportunity to use my legal expertise to fight for our values and restore the rights left-wing extremists are trying to rip from us. I put together a team of talented, trusted attorneys taking on cases like this not for fame or money, but because we love our country and our Constitution. Unfortunately legal battles aren't free and the costs of these lawsuits pile up quickly. **But the Center for American Liberty takes these cases on anyway, going head-to-head with some of the most powerful and connected leftists in the country. And we win - but as a nonprofit organization, that's only possible with your help.** In fact, Chloe Cole is just one of three clients we are representing on this issue, because we recognize just how serious of a threat it is to allow medical professionals to experiment with our children. I think this will be one of the most important cases in the history of our movement, and I hope you'll be with us every step of the way. [**Can I count on your generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a1be1a1c3d754d50abe6f65ab41ca809&_e=aK_CBmCud6Vprro5X-6a5jpY91NWgF7aUuYsU0j5OQW_pygdbHm0RuBsAnswbHxoWO7R3DGV1F2huD1SFTtkW2BO307VflgeQqicKstk7QPFqencB-CkMSv55v7n7fkaKVSxlE631xsnEgiOy6K3blypPBC2uLtBRAZeEaZvlWRuoigANUVRbOg4Jv2x4nZmsUX2C1JTqjGivKkxDWoPW5Yfkv_SLa3eUYjhSOHhkRnMmZC80k9IGaPb6AebD7GFAu1Jv77Y0UcUqR1uKWfNm3sYkwJyJp0myhyUtMYfZTyUkJWYteqZDBdldxvX0RSPzPVwtxX69yiSKWSz5DSn5MzoVAg2ZTNv0xPEPe8sesNTkpAFFFuvVvm6pwHJejPJ) Winning this lawsuit for Chloe Cole won't turn back the clock. Today Chloe faces medical issues stemming from the surgeries and medication. She will never be able to breastfeed a child - if she's even able to get pregnant after poison coursed through her veins. Her life will never be "normal." But winning this lawsuit will send a loud and clear message to every single doctor in America who is thinking of performing a gruesome and barbaric gender transition surgery on a child: **_There are steep financial consequences for lying to your patients and coercing young children and their parents into irreversible sex changes surgeries ... and we're coming for you!_** My friend, you and I cannot sit back while vulnerable children are chemically castrated when what they need is counseling... while parents are fed the lie, "you can either have a dead daughter or a live son." And we most certainly cannot sit back while money-hungry "Big Pharma" and woke doctors experiment on an entire generation of young Americans like lab rats. Thank you in advance for your help taking on Chloe Cole's case and stopping this outrageous medical malpractice - and attack on American children - in its tracks.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a1be1a1c3d754d50abe6f65ab41ca809&_e=aK_CBmCud6Vprro5X-6a5jpY91NWgF7aUuYsU0j5OQW_pygdbHm0RuBsAnswbHxoWO7R3DGV1F2huD1SFTtkW2BO307VflgeQqicKstk7QPFqencB-CkMSv55v7n7fkaKVSxlE631xsnEgiOy6K3blypPBC2uLtBRAZeEaZvlWRuoigANUVRbOg4Jv2x4nZmsUX2C1JTqjGivKkxDWoPW5Yfkv_SLa3eUYjhSOHhkRml73rGhT4FyhfEZLQ6MKNESK-nnd6G4InGBRa9n6x11culHZYONoUPcZXCmsJoOMtmaD8eSs5gLOAEqFAE53mJs9DxgPie5fS4o0j1onFrcRlQCBYA7yjv5kJcA8beMi6-Hiri7Tdoa14KKB6I8Coh)
---
P.S. Doctors told Chloe and her parents from the beginning that nothing was permanent. They told her she could change her mind if she wanted to, but when she did exactly that, they shrugged their shoulders at her, told her there was nothing they could do and chalked it up to "just another part of her gender journey." Because they'd already gotten what they wanted from her family. P.P.S. We must put a stop to this. Doctors have abandoned their sacred oath in the pursuit of payouts, and we must make them pay. [**Please make a generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty today, and give our lawyers the resources they need to win this crucial fight.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a1be1a1c3d754d50abe6f65ab41ca809&_e=aK_CBmCud6Vprro5X-6a5jpY91NWgF7aUuYsU0j5OQW_pygdbHm0RuBsAnswbHxoWO7R3DGV1F2huD1SFTtkW2BO307VflgeQqicKstk7QPFqencB-CkMSv55v7n7fkaKVSxlE631xsnEgiOy6K3blypPBC2uLtBRAZeEaZvlWRuoigANUVRbOg4Jv2x4nZmsUX2C1JTqjGivKkxDWoPW5Yfkv_SLa3eUYjhSOHhkRmg2mggJ65DLERJg4sP5NCKyY7B3I7FX5bxBRff3EeddfKgn4rYR8BeqBhuyj7A17qGXB5bqgtQGzNl0bcYWMOfkDQpHWn1jeS9WRMHyiCQ6Etm8REGeIFtyvkCPKjY-gl7WVFAP0FiUA_Wg2iakgIa)
---
| |

clean_body: I've filed a groundbreaking new lawsuit against a hospital and the doctors that lied to a young girl and her family | | | | " It's well known that 80%, even up to 85% of children who experience gender dysphoria and cross sex identification feel differently when they reach puberty after the early phases of puberty." -Dr. Riittakerttu Kaltiala, Chief Psychiatrist, Tampere University Hospital and one of Finland's leading experts on pediatric gender care | I've filed a groundbreaking new lawsuit against a hospital and the doctors that lied to a young girl and her family, manipulating her into taking medication and having surgery to become a "boy." In fact, my client and I joined Laura Ingraham the other night on her great Fox News show Ingraham Angle to discuss the lawsuit and the dangerous lies that woke doctors are telling patients and their parents to push their radical ideology. Chloe Cole was just 9 years old when she was bombarded with transgender ideology. As a child Chloe was bombarded--largely through social media--with the idea that "transitioning" would make her special, accepted and popular. When she shared with her pediatrician that she felt uncomfortable as a girl, leftist activist doctors put her on an irreversible path to chemically and surgically "transitioning" her gender. At age 13, the doctors began pumping Chloe full of dangerous drugs with unknown long-term side effects. At 15, they performed a double mastectomy on her. And all of this happened because doctors lied and concealed less invasive treatment options from Chloe and her parents. They told her parents point blank that they could have a dead daughter or a live son. That's right. A dead daughter or a living son. Those were their only options. (So they said.) EVEN THOUGH RESEARCH SHOWS THE VAST MAJORITY OF CHILDREN EXPERIENCING GENDER DYSPHORIA GET OVER IT AFTER PUBERTY BEGINS. Chloe Cole and her parents were lied to, coerced, and manipulated not only for monetary gain, but as part of a radical woke agenda that is being pushed on vulnerable children across the country. That's why we're not just suing Kaiser Permanente... We 're suing Dr. Lisa Taylor for prescribing testosterone and the dangerous puberty blocker Lupron Depot without doing ANY proper evaluation or treatment of Chloe's other symptoms OR receiving any kind of informed consent from Chloe or her parents for puberty blockers. We 're suing Dr. Hop Nguyen Le for performing a double mastectomy without evaluating whether it was the right decision for Chloe, who was just 15 years old and for not obtaining proper informed consent to perform the surgery. And we 're suing Dr. Susanna Watson who recommended that Chloe have her breasts removed without evaluating Chloe's mental or psychological condition. Additionally, she withheld information that may have changed Chloe's mind about the surgery, including a litany of studies that show drugs and surgeries do not help children suffering from gender dysphoria. If folks like you and I don 't stand up and fight back now, who will? My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded the Center for American Liberty because I saw an opportunity to use my legal expertise to fight for our values and restore the rights left-wing extremists are trying to rip from us. I put together a team of talented, trusted attorneys taking on cases like this not for fame or money, but because we love our country and our Constitution. Unfortunately legal battles aren't free and the costs of these lawsuits pile up quickly. But the Center for American Liberty takes these cases on anyway, going head-to-head with some of the most powerful and connected leftists in the country. And we win - but as a nonprofit organization, that's only possible with your help. In fact, Chloe Cole is just one of three clients we are representing on this issue, because we recognize just how serious of a threat it is to allow medical professionals to experiment with our children. I think this will be one of the most important cases in the history of our movement, and I hope you'll be with us every step of the way. Winning this lawsuit for Chloe Cole won't turn back the clock. Today Chloe faces medical issues stemming from the surgeries and medication. She will never be able to breastfeed a child - if she's even able to get pregnant after poison coursed through her veins. Her life will never be "normal." But winning this lawsuit will send a loud and clear message to every single doctor in America who is thinking of performing a gruesome and barbaric gender transition surgery on a child: There are steep financial consequences for lying to your patients and coercing young children and their parents into irreversible sex changes surgeries ... and we're coming for you! My friend, you and I cannot sit back while vulnerable children are chemically castrated when what they need is counseling... while parents are fed the lie, "you can either have a dead daughter or a live son." And we most certainly cannot sit back while money-hungry "Big Pharma" and woke doctors experiment on an entire generation of young Americans like lab rats. Thank you in advance for your help taking on Chloe Cole's case and stopping this outrageous medical malpractice - and attack on American children - in its tracks. | | Sincerely, | | Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO | | | P.S. Doctors told Chloe and her parents from the beginning that nothing was permanent. They told her she could change her mind if she wanted to, but when she did exactly that, they shrugged their shoulders at her, told her there was nothing they could do and chalked it up to "just another part of her gender journey." Because they'd already gotten what they wanted from her family. P.P.S. We must put a stop to this. Doctors have abandoned their sacred oath in the pursuit of payouts, and we must make them pay. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Philadelphia NOW endorses Dr. Nina Ahmad for Philadelphia City Council at-Large
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
On this **International Women 's Day**, it gives me so much pleasure to announce that I have been **endorsed by the Philadelphia Chapter of the National Organization for Women (NOW) PAC for Philadelphia City Council at-Large.**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OWvIN0zmpvz5Lp-TmMHS3YFDrNu8eoFc0cJ27hitWUg=/ZPVe-9fJV3Z_kZI9uS4jocX-jXaWpe0WTKikPJepwoY=)

This endorsement is deeply meaningful; I know the consequences **of being devalued.** I have been advocating for women and girls since I survived the Liberation War of Bangladesh during which more than 250,000 women and girls were brutalized.
Running for City Council At-Large with the support and partnership of Philly NOW truly humbles me - to have my sisters in the struggle stand with me is so meaningful. I WILL be transparent and ALWAYS available. I will continue advocating to level the playing field for women & girls who are 52% of Philadelphians.
I have been deeply involved in this advocacy work through the National Organization for Women, having served as a Philly NOW President, National Board member and currently as the President of Pennsylvania NOW.
With your support we can make a difference and ensure that we "Leave No One Behind"
[**Please donate $5, $10, $100 or $1000 to keep Team Nina 's Momentum going!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/OWvIN0zmpvz5Lp-TmMHS3YFDrNu8eoFc0cJ27hitWUg=/ZPVe-9fJV3Z_kZI9uS4jocX-jXaWpe0WTKikPJepwoY=)
Let's make Philadelphia a healthier city for a stronger future,
Dr. Nina

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OWvIN0zmpvz5Lp-TmMHS3YFDrNu8eoFc0cJ27hitWUg=/ZPVe-9fJV3Z_kZI9uS4jocX-jXaWpe0WTKikPJepwoY=)

Paid for by Nina for Philly

name: Alan Keck
subject: We came out swingin’ ⚾
body:
...with a grand slam debate victory that you’ve made possible.
[](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pliqn-dytiuyidkd-r/) _If just one thing is clear after tonight 's debate, it's that **we came out swingin ' with an undeniable grand slam debate victory that only you've made possible. **__But we can 't rest on our laurels yet-[_**because tonight's victory is so pivotal, would you chip in $25 of your treasure to help spread the word of our shared victory and vision? **_](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pliqn-dytiuyidkd-j/)_ [CHIP-IN $25 TO BOOST OUR MOMENTUM](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pliqn-dytiuyidkd-t/) If you didn't have the chance to tune into tonight's debate, _let me give you the rundown._ **_I tackled the tough questions with commonsense solutions that 'll make the Commonwealth win again and put it back on track._** _That 's what my Keck Game Plan is all about-**and whether it was education, Kentucky 's workforce crisis, or any other issue we discussed-it's clear we won tonight's debate having showcased that vision for our state that Kentuckians like YOU helped craft.**_[__**But I have to be honest, we can 't rest on our laurels yet-and I need your help to boost the momentum we've undoubtedly gained after tonight's debate victory. **__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pliqn-dytiuyidkd-i/)_**With the primary just a few months away, every moment matters, every bit of support from here on out is crucial -[that's ](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pliqn-dytiuyidkd-d/)[_why I'm asking for your support now!_](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pliqn-dytiuyidkd-h/)**_ Your support of truly any size makes a larger-than-life difference in putting the Commonwealth back on track. I think that's worth fighting for, and I hope you think so too. [CHIP-IN $25 TO BOOST OUR MOMENTUM](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pliqn-dytiuyidkd-k/) [__**So, join me in celebrating tonight 's debate victory-and let's not let up for a single second.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pliqn-dytiuyidkd-u/) The future of our great Commonwealth is at stake-let's leave a Commonwealth for our kids that's better than we found it.God Bless. [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pliqn-dytiuyidkd-o/) [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pliqn-dytiuyidkd-b/) Alan Keck ### | [Unsubscribe](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-u-pliqn-dytiuyidkd-n/)
