name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity.

# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78101%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n344Gjlx1ywtxTnRCwv32g&sysid=1). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78102%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gWVtICJjBPFxMkelTHuOLg&sysid=1) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78103%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LNg8Kbpwq%2bitbOyJIMK9zg&sysid=1) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78104%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y4IsRYBnuLhVoB3YRT7hJQ&sysid=1) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78115%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KfRWxlHXfSi8Hu1tierTDw&sysid=1) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78116%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bf95Wtd5GyJfgHu61JobFw&sysid=1). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78103%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LNg8Kbpwq%2bitbOyJIMK9zg&sysid=1) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---

Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see [Terms & Conditions](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78117%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dHVzjJPmRRcfEGVejLAgdw&sysid=1).

But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... FREE Bonus #9: You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order! It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. Look, this food tastes homemade. It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just . When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. As it stands today, it's every man for himself. In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters More Raving Reviews From Customers! | | Rory H. I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things. ---|--- | Billy H. Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup. ---|--- | Kevin S. The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start. ---|--- | Carol B. I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings. ---|--- | Ken K. I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when." ---|--- Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see . 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

name: Speaker Kevin McCarthy
subject: I come to you with bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |

| | | I come to you with bad news.

The FEC has increased its maximum contribution limit by 14%!

The Left's ability to outraise and outspend us is nothing short of astonishing but now, Democrat billionaires and millionaires can have 14% more of an impact on our elections!

**Let me be clear, this puts Republicans in a DEVASTATING position. **

I have spent YEARS fighting against Democrats and I can tell you from experience, that after a certain point, there is no overcoming a cash disadvantage.

Our ability to fight against corrupt Democrats, stand against the Biden Administration's socialist agenda, and fight for your priorities in Congress hangs in the balance.

That's why I'm setting an immediate fundraising goal by midnight tonight. **[If every person reading this message gives whatever they can give, we can even the odds:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62410450:J7BlXaGBN:m:1:3331421248:045408AFC29D339B85675ED8478352F1:r "If every person reading this message gives $14 or whatever they can give, we can even the odds:")**

Without every patriot reading this, without YOU, please believe me when I say it will be game over.

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times.

# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5dulgqkopeef3hh8v45jdqdjcjnb49s9oanmp48_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9ie1ob2cph2bs). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z39mo0qrkkegtavo15nr2hjdhu1q2toc0h2art3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9ie1ob2cph2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5ng7kqn7a07irvqguk2dmst1sn069hlcega0c10_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9ie1ob2cph2bs) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsmbnppjs47520ljhhq5aq71up5lujps9vct9ohg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9ie1ob2cph2bs) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4slk3qpkst6a71t2cfnkuk98tppbfrr2hmfqp3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9ie1ob2cph2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4ekhe1gd8592cphaq5d6ct5d43amkdnlflu8dmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9ie1ob2cph2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu6oglvo7l8rqj810vf16jphk0h7t4n124748eug_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9ie1ob2cph2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
[**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zb0sgntdbofeqpvr4n2cna90dvctd5u4isq7nv2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9ie1ob2cph2bs)

Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see [Terms & Conditions](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zb4kbl2l098eg4aok6n9o0i0oge1s4cmdqtj18mo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9ie1ob2cph2bs).

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Biden’s Political Prisoners
body:
Within hard drives in our nation's Capitol sits between 14,000 to 42,000 hours or more of CCTV footage from January 6th that would prove many of these defendants to be innocent, and more importantly, prove that the Capitol Hill Police aided in allowing protesters inside the halls of Congress. | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62413078:6VogXaGNK:m:1:3361486117:50C685DBBC4F0B13F9637F292F9EC8F9:r) | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62413078:6VogXaGNK:m:1:3361486117:50C685DBBC4F0B13F9637F292F9EC8F9:r) Dear Peter,

For the last several months, I've been traveling back and forth to Washington, D.C. to assist, observe and report on our government's political prosecutions of the January 6th protesters.

I've met with broken families and watched judges trample the Constitution to defend their Criminal Enterprise that is our federal government.

I've sat in over 30 hours of hearings, my emotions range from gut-wrenching sadness for the defendants and their families, to complete outrage on the rulings and manipulation of the Department of Justice.

Within hard drives in our nation's Capitol sits between 14,000 to 42,000 hours or more of CCTV footage from January 6, 2021 that would prove many of these defendants to be innocent, and more importantly, prove that the Capitol Hill Police aided in allowing protesters inside the halls of Congress.

But, despite promises from the new establishment GOP Speaker of the House, Kevin McCarthy, to release all the footage to the public, the footage still remains hidden from the public.

While you may have heard that the footage was turned over to Tucker Carlson, the reports are simply not true. No physical footage or hard drives containing footage was ever transferred outside of the United States Capitol to Tucker Carlson's office. Tucker Carlson and his staff have only been allowed to watch footage inside one terminal at the United States Capitol.

Once again, McCarthy has distorted reality to deceive the American public into thinking that he is fighting for them. As McCarthy continues to lie, good Americans remain incarcerated!

My work has come at a cost, but I strongly believe I have an obligation to continue to assist these Americans and their families. **[ Will you chip in to help cover my trial coverage and travel costs? ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62413078:6VogXaGNK:m:1:3361486117:50C685DBBC4F0B13F9637F292F9EC8F9:r) **

I've spent weeks in D.C. hotels attending numerous J6 hearings and I'll need to head back to D.C. in April for more trials. [ **Any support you can provide will be greatly appreciated, and it will help get the truth out about the trials, which the media continues to ignore.** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62413078:6VogXaGNK:m:1:3361486117:50C685DBBC4F0B13F9637F292F9EC8F9:r)

Outside of Washington, the media of course and even **the Governors of Red States** have DONE NOTHING for the J6 defendants.

In Florida, we have the highest number of J6 defendants out of any state in the nation. I cannot begin to express how disappointed I am in Governor Ron DeSantis, who publicly stated his SUPPORT for the jailing and prosecutions of January 6 defendants!

We need to EXPOSE and hold every Republican politician accountable who fails to do anything about the political prisoners of the illegitimate Biden Regime!

And I say WE . . . because it will take all of us, good men and women standing strong against wrong.

You may have heard the quote attributed to Edmund Burke, "The only thing necessary for the triumph of evil is for good men to do nothing."

In Washington, there are few good men and women left. That leaves us, the people, to take action.

That leaves us, the people, to take action!

So please, [ **help me continue reporting on the corrupt actions of the Biden Regime as I continue to support the J6 defendants and their families.** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62413078:6VogXaGNK:m:1:3361486117:50C685DBBC4F0B13F9637F292F9EC8F9:r)

Thank you so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

There is an important runoff election for the Phoenix City Council District 6 on March 14. Conservative Sal DiCiccio (R) is term limited and will be replaced by the winner of this race. The two candidates are Republican Sam Stone and Democrat Kevin Robinson. **If you live in District 6 (**[check here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e697e9619fc2752f16f79d307c796b93/35693/0660a044a1892d84/a091b5dd74471ad3c3d6b838967d376c/35693)**), you either received a mail-in ballot or you must vote in person (see below).

****This is a very important race that will determine the balance of power on the City Council.** Phoenix, like many large cities in conservative states, has tended blue with the consequences many cites suffer from with progressive governance. Have you noticed the growing homeless problem in our city?

**Conservative Sam Stone is the strong choice of The Prickly Pear** and we urge our readers in District 6 to mail your ballots in immediately and cast your vote for Sam Stone. [Learn about Sam Stone here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e697e9619fc2752f16f79d307c796b93/35693/0660a044a1892d84/077401666a567663c3d6b838967d376c/35693).

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity.

# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09410%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lSsdSctqRFL5RJvbijPDEA&sysid=1). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09411%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XrSfWBuJoBYuGj1wxs5NzA&sysid=1) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). clean_body: There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. The Food Crisis of 2023 We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling . Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because: 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: I owe you an explanation for why I launched so early
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18900?t=1001&akid=3036%2E346206%2E1FvMf3 ][IMG]

Peter — I know. It’s early. And 2024 feels like a long time from
now.

If I’m going to be emailing you [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18900?t=1002&akid=3036%2E346206%2E1FvMf3 ]asking for a split donation to our
grassroots campaign to defeat Josh Hawley, then I owe you a real
explanation. So please, give me just a couple minutes of your time:

I know you’ve already heard a lot about how much of a fraud and coward
Josh Hawley is. When we launched this campaign last week — just two years
after Hawley raised his fist and then ran for his life on January 6 — we
made a lot of noise. And from online and to prime time TV, we’ve kept the
hits going.

But from the moment we’ve been in this race, Hawley and the corporate
interests supporting him have already been hitting back — from the
National Republican Senatorial Committee to Breitbart.

That’s because they know we’re a threat. They know that over the past
three election cycles, Missourians voted to raise the minimum wage nearly
5 dollars higher than the federal level, expand Medicaid under the
Affordable Care Act, and legalize marijuana. They know Missourians even
elected a Democrat statewide to be our Auditor — by a 6% margin.

Missourians have been fighting hard to claw back power from corrupt
politicians like Josh Hawley for years — and Hawley knows we have a
grassroots movement that can harness that energy. That’s why, on the same
day we launched our campaign, he sent a message to his donors warning we’d
“love nothing more than to take back Missouri. We CAN'T let that happen.”

So here’s what that all tells us: Hawley is going to come at us hard,
fast, and early. That means our best shot at winning this race is building
a record-breaking movement right from the start so we can fight back, get
our positive message in front of Missouri voters, and hold him accountable
for betraying our country.

And that’s why I’ve got to ask today, even if it feels early: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18900?t=1003&akid=3036%2E346206%2E1FvMf3 ]Can I
count on you to split a donation of $20 or whatever amount feels right
between our grassroots campaign and Charles Booker today? I’m not taking a
single cent from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Pharma and Big
Oil execs, so anything you chip in makes a big difference:

Thanks for being a part of this movement. This is a race we can win. And
together, we’re going to beat Hawley and put everyday people in charge of
our country.

Never stop fighting,

Lucas Kunce

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18900?t=1004&akid=3036%2E346206%2E1FvMf3 ]CHIP IN →

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230308-3036-footer&t=1005&refcode2=3036_346206_1FvMf3&akid=3036%2E346206%2E1FvMf3

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3036%2E346206%2E1FvMf3

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

If you’re not familiar with us, **we’re the most effective grassroots conservative organization around. ** And right now, we’re spearheading a campaign against ESG or Environmental, Social, Governance policies that prioritize left-wing politics and jeopardize your 401k. But we have a real shot at dealing a _devastating_ blow to ESG and Woke companies.Congress just worked to terminate the Biden Administration's rule that allows investment firms to play politics with the retirement savings of **152 MILLION** Americans, for a total of ~**$11.7 TRILLION** in assets. We worked _tirelessly_ to ensure Congress had the votes to reverse this terrible rule. We’ve activated our vast grassroots network to call their senators to support terminating this ESG rule. These efforts were successful—both the House AND the Senate passed a resolution to overturn Biden’s pro-ESG regulation.
**But Biden plans to issue his FIRST-EVER VETO against this resolution and we need** _**your support**_**to keep fighting ESG.** [**Will you help us energize and activate grassroots conservatives across the country to Stop ESG with an IMMEDIATE donation?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b50a2b8b9bc649f59707a8673dae0491&_e=VeApXlv8UUns6t1nDmtsx0c6N4lnsx2Hm-mpR7FVpmLEJZek729kQkx8X6CMX5wgmIj2-ozcxI-SWv6vIfFq_mPGbJvNt9SHqBveifcdw1P_pNda7N0D2V_v-Ad4DQvMH-wSnSnfy-4YHNzHpgHIYfvk4WiSqmbzaKL3qdl_pzw-Fv4lVQ7qP5hckhQBg8k9rWv2dAt6qyxea3t-qcA4BQT8KeIydC0QbfzYpoxSxshYCB1ViX8JYfxkaDWhlwAYAfnZnNk74USQH94u1txA54Zbr1cj-21CTrlogvnmBqDXM070-ToiICDOebOhaVNDLu67m7HOyVGropN4Yaf2wggcyK4m4GQiuEYEGlTEZcg%3D)

We worked tirelessly to ensure Congress had the votes to reverse this terrible rule. We’ve activated our vast grassroots network to call their senators to support terminating this ESG rule. These efforts were successful—both the House AND the Senate passed a resolution to overturn Biden’s pro-ESG regulation. But Biden plans to issue his FIRST-EVER VETO against this resolution and we need your supportto keep fighting ESG. | | Peter, many people are still unaware of the dangers and consequences that ESG poses to their retirement and everyday lives. That’s why we launched our ESGHurts initiative with to warn as many Americans as possible about the threat of ESG. And we have proposed specific legislation to fight back against ESG. Thank you,Jessica AndersonExecutive Director | Heritage Action | Heritage Action for America is a 501(c)4 non-profit organization. Donations are not tax deductible. By participating, you agree to the terms & privacy policy (51776-info.com) for recurring autodialed marketing messages from Heritage Action to the phone number you provide. No consent required to buy. Msg&data; rates may apply. When selecting a recurring donation, Heritage Action for America will process this donation every month on the day of the month that you set up the recurring gift in the amount that you specify using the method of payment that you identified. You can cancel or change this donation at any time by contacting us at 1-(202) 548-5280. This authorization shall remain in effect until you notify Heritage Action for America and Heritage Action has had reasonable time to act on it. A record of each debit will appear on your bank statement. You have the right to instruct your bank to reverse any and all debits. | | | | Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | . |

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Wokeness killing the American Dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’m a first-generation American, born and raised in Ohio. I got ahead based on merit, not my skin color. I am running for President of the United States to keep it that way.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=1d8595deadf84fd1aa5b2f664d45e299&_t=I0Lax3PAcj5QNnAdRqUqHvYgibc9BlXLlEFPAK56Uc0Vs9NspJ5VFsHC-7Ahkl_jQDDMsPpsuQz8f1Mk_GqTFVgZm5hIBa-O_uVsI0BXzQs%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=1d8595deadf84fd1aa5b2f664d45e299&_t=I0Lax3PAcj5QNnAdRqUqHvYgibc9BlXLlEFPAK56Uc0Vs9NspJ5VFsHC-7Ahkl_jQDDMsPpsuQz8f1Mk_GqTFVgZm5hIBa-O_uVsI0BXzQs%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1d8595deadf84fd1aa5b2f664d45e299&_e=peLr5Ej1rkar_BteEMQefO5grUb4djam_8cT6w_bmTOVtyEXazg2qTNuuwFEamQ5Pva4x8JXRF7kCTAidqJQ2VJT_MA1V9X5k3YhpwyPCUOpXrb2SdEtzXXzm1lQf7pzj3nm3a6usZ1YrqFhQyaMQbgacYHNLna6ksJR5O1k_Jm9O9yzUcXcYX9v_sYeibR3Da1pGxf53RsKs2FiGNvBucCRX7aw_sOtDsSki3ZYiR6h7f-GKmTDKEFz8TW2PNQ1dyPjh5DCjIoh2qp8zrKBxffPbwov5f-IPJsreBh2b2_nxUKlLy0FST8Jzipr9x26N0OcFAgYGTFuk8uShUte3BmC-tYvHMb11p3RgDfCchRkP_0MUIbZo0F9WQODk26vaYjNuMtuQpYgxJ8JxOE3Pw%3D%3D)
---
|
Fellow American,

Wokeness is a new secular religion that says your identity is based on your race and sexuality. This is destroying America in front of our eyes.

I'm on a mission to stop it. I wrote two bestselling books and started a new company to take on wokeness on Wall Street, but we must do more and address the real problem: **we are going through a national identity crisis.**

I'm Vivek Ramaswamy, and I launched my campaign for President of the United States to deliver an answer to the most important question of our time: what it means to be an American. **[Today I am asking YOU to be a part of our movement.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1d8595deadf84fd1aa5b2f664d45e299&_e=peLr5Ej1rkar_BteEMQefO5grUb4djam_8cT6w_bmTOVtyEXazg2qTNuuwFEamQ5Pva4x8JXRF7kCTAidqJQ2VJT_MA1V9X5k3YhpwyPCUOpXrb2SdEtzXXzm1lQf7pzj3nm3a6usZ1YrqFhQyaMQbgacYHNLna6ksJR5O1k_Jm9O9yzUcXcYX9v_sYeibR3Da1pGxf53RsKs2FiGNvBucCRX7aw_sOtDsSki3ZYiR6h7f-GKmTDKEFz8TW2PNQ1RostaxHBUf674vtLDOu09onFRT3_EvO81Ivpzga_rcm2UuE7q0NPfNLwb51Hik-y88IsUX7B-_o9jNLam099Bs8JeB74EJncmiAdc9WMORq4VPWzPCDr7YoM7lQR9LdtVN6uStdbBb9whWQ6n1o25A%3D%3D)**

| [** JOIN VIVEK ->**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1d8595deadf84fd1aa5b2f664d45e299&_e=peLr5Ej1rkar_BteEMQefO5grUb4djam_8cT6w_bmTOVtyEXazg2qTNuuwFEamQ5Pva4x8JXRF7kCTAidqJQ2VJT_MA1V9X5k3YhpwyPCUOpXrb2SdEtzXXzm1lQf7pzj3nm3a6usZ1YrqFhQyaMQbgacYHNLna6ksJR5O1k_Jm9O9yzUcXcYX9v_sYeibR3Da1pGxf53RsKs2FiGNvBucCRX7aw_sOtDsSki3ZYiR6h7f-GKmTDKEFz8TW2PNQ11BxmdtPn-QcOEu4oJtxt8kZ9ISn5SzoSdMywDtyBjV9JIJzoGN9a2LUrpYFVLUQjdtvhBgW1_vYcIHEJzsDPAm-XgxltmXfYMdEfyCHRM8EsCjcNOl5QorB7LDTqzVDMbHIA1_Y8KR5jK5yny699Qg%3D%3D)
---

I remember when I was in 2nd grade and heard Martin Luther King's _"I Have Dream"_ speech for the first time: America judges its children not on the color of their skin, but on the content of their character.

I grew up in Ohio in the 90s to two immigrants who came to this country with almost no money. I was a skinny kid with nerdy glasses and a funny last name. Achievement was my ticket to get ahead. After graduating from Harvard and Yale, I went on to start a family and founded multibillion-dollar companies.

You probably know me as the **author of _Woke, Inc._** - or by what left-leaning outlets have called me, like "the intellectual godfather of the anti-woke movement" (_Politico_), "CEO of Anti-Woke, Inc.," (_The New Yorker_), or the "right's leading anti-ESG crusader" (_Axios_ , _Bloomberg_ , and others). I take their criticisms as a badge of honor because we are standing up for what is right - and true.

_I'm 37 years old. People my age and younger can't even answer what it means to be an American today._

**My peers have abandoned faith, patriotism, and hard work and instead embrace new secular religions like covidism, climatism, and radical gender ideology.**

**I'm running for President of the United States of America to revive the ideals that made America great - and made America itself. If this is important to you too, then I need you to be a part of this movement. [Will you help me launch my campaign by throwing in a contribution of $10, $25, $40 or more today?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1d8595deadf84fd1aa5b2f664d45e299&_e=peLr5Ej1rkar_BteEMQefO5grUb4djam_8cT6w_bmTOVtyEXazg2qTNuuwFEamQ5Pva4x8JXRF7kCTAidqJQ2VJT_MA1V9X5k3YhpwyPCUOpXrb2SdEtzXXzm1lQf7pzj3nm3a6usZ1YrqFhQyaMQbgacYHNLna6ksJR5O1k_Jm9O9yzUcXcYX9v_sYeibR3Da1pGxf53RsKs2FiGNvBucCRX7aw_sOtDsSki3ZYiR6h7f-GKmTDKEFz8TW2PNQ1zKcIBmeOok8XC9SJ_lKb_PhvgS7p2TmeMtzv0Poy1ecEyjIZJn-MbDWQr4Pb6k0i5ZghR3pNBRE0Mth483AYkx9Qfij2taGr0UjtX9CqQnk1wEL-UU2my5rHMKj-X_AnGl3KeTWQZWEw0n1ymhquqA%3D%3D)**

[** JOIN VIVEK ->**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1d8595deadf84fd1aa5b2f664d45e299&_e=peLr5Ej1rkar_BteEMQefO5grUb4djam_8cT6w_bmTOVtyEXazg2qTNuuwFEamQ5Pva4x8JXRF7kCTAidqJQ2VJT_MA1V9X5k3YhpwyPCUOpXrb2SdEtzXXzm1lQf7pzj3nm3a6usZ1YrqFhQyaMQbgacYHNLna6ksJR5O1k_Jm9O9yzUcXcYX9v_sYeibR3Da1pGxf53RsKs2FiGNvBucCRX7aw_sOtDsSki3ZYiR6h7f-GKmTDKEFz8TW2PNQ1hPUIFzrnHN1NwPJeRjBKlAGFK9wHvMpthvyt8GslvuWYzVgo7CmYJnADxivcN6S9rNbA9TmHUgHN_Xel2Sty4ZOFbvf-OWfdsGbq9NS2l5r62vGSq1eBziuP3v6XTEhXz9bhH8Z0PP2ez9mKVq_VEw%3D%3D)
---

It's not enough to just be AGAINST something like wokeness... we need to be FOR something.

**We are on a mission to create a new American Dream for the next generation.**

We must embrace merit and excellence in every sphere of our lives:

Merit in who gets into America. More immigrants like my parents, instead of illegal immigrants who break the law to enter the country.

Merit in who gets ahead in America. You win in America not on the color of your skin, but on the content of your character and contributions.

Merit in who governs America. I have a humble dream that the people who we elect to run the government should be the ones who actually run the government, not federal bureaucrats who multiply themselves like a national cancer.

Merit in the marketplace of ideas. The best ideas win when no ideas are censored.

**I think you believe in these ideals.** I think you believe your neighbors and colleagues believe in these ideals too, but you can't be sure because you're not allowed to talk about it anymore. We still agree on the basic ideals - at least most of us do.

**[I am running for President to save the ideals that made America great. Please stand with me in the fight to revive American exceptionalism by contributing $10, $25, $40 or another amount to help me launch my campaign.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1d8595deadf84fd1aa5b2f664d45e299&_e=peLr5Ej1rkar_BteEMQefO5grUb4djam_8cT6w_bmTOVtyEXazg2qTNuuwFEamQ5Pva4x8JXRF7kCTAidqJQ2VJT_MA1V9X5k3YhpwyPCUOpXrb2SdEtzXXzm1lQf7pzj3nm3a6usZ1YrqFhQyaMQbgacYHNLna6ksJR5O1k_Jm9O9yzUcXcYX9v_sYeibR3Da1pGxf53RsKs2FiGNvBucCRX7aw_sOtDsSki3ZYiR6h7f-GKmTDKEFz8TW2PNQ1R-A-Bstq27KLoDAXjUssGluOKaWQPlTxDkVvHuXWlyD7kPaZTStfXe25L_otjxdWObb9qMp4w0_yEXbno4JiF_UzRTAt0A7hNvShtZ-n8ee_uja16k4TUOkBJy1V5FaFSIDWVrGI6_hpAto3smZyJw%3D%3D)**

For The American Dream,
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1d8595deadf84fd1aa5b2f664d45e299&_e=peLr5Ej1rkar_BteEMQefO5grUb4djam_8cT6w_bmTOVtyEXazg2qTNuuwFEamQ5Pva4x8JXRF7kCTAidqJQ2VJT_MA1V9X5k3YhpwyPCUOpXrb2SdEtzXXzm1lQf7pzj3nm3a6usZ1YrqFhQyaMQbgacYHNLna6ksJR5O1k_Jm9O9yzUcXcYX9v_sYeibR3Da1pGxf53RsKs2FiGNvBucCRX7aw_sOtDsSki3ZYiR6h7f-GKmTDKEFz8TW2PNQ1tZx4-cuaVrQhG49JO6CAaT9omojhYlmnBCdPVtXDuNO127r5NYH2OWn0Bquf3sJBTNUOHTbf7cmquviA5wGtG0uBVzYYsh2-W4B2SdSml27rsjG1wggdQiie6soSlnBBKSO60_PxGgWBZSxJRnQITQ%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** JOIN VIVEK ->**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1d8595deadf84fd1aa5b2f664d45e299&_e=peLr5Ej1rkar_BteEMQefO5grUb4djam_8cT6w_bmTOVtyEXazg2qTNuuwFEamQ5Pva4x8JXRF7kCTAidqJQ2VJT_MA1V9X5k3YhpwyPCUOpXrb2SdEtzXXzm1lQf7pzj3nm3a6usZ1YrqFhQyaMQbgacYHNLna6ksJR5O1k_Jm9O9yzUcXcYX9v_sYeibR3Da1pGxf53RsKs2FiGNvBucCRX7aw_sOtDsSki3ZYiR6h7f-GKmTDKEFz8TW2PNQ173sncVpC7_t-QnPs_vqaGVQv4Qjyo5EDNYpHrQ77nixgcSGnP_N2CKq7D8R69-qPbtEpYka-n_QOeQlDqXblUfjAFluxYSAqA3yetDqz-CFCY9-CN57U20nW6mXLveHR5rlNZkTP2JGrFsATUMfiaQ%3D%3D)
---

Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. I think you believe your neighbors and colleagues believe in these ideals too, but you can't be sure because you're not allowed to talk about it anymore. We still agree on the basic ideals - at least most of us do. For The American Dream, Vivek Ramaswamy | | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times.

# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z65dgmsli8iiei52d30362s2m8vsp15011iknrr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spg60oj2cph2bs). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaab9n8btr3npg8mnqol3to2087bqq81j6kvh3io_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spg60oj2cph2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlc5c5vs60sc5d6ovcpklcu1ksbn7q2d34biiveg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spg60oj2cph2bs) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zt5o63se66svursjb1ftpf3jmjldj99l2a8pjie0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spg60oj2cph2bs) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0jq5llu83shptgfgq9mprtenbd3v1k4coi5o5jg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spg60oj2cph2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z549muds18ggfc18arfspekciuhtnda24e574lh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spg60oj2cph2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhctvae1psta1m7tfqdrbekdurckbo30ge4s6k70_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spg60oj2cph2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
[**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmh0dq78tgfhs19bhh61dukamvtm6toglh3mae5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spg60oj2cph2bs)

Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see [Terms & Conditions](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjvpntrobcaovqocsq00s9885cs8js786iv7eo4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spg60oj2cph2bs).
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Briefing, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanbriefing.com/prefs/9z2z4d4u7a3ujqc1h287f81ef0mm1i4k96n1v7gmgl0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zur5o5k38jbt6m7mfgpotatsgqia8r5p52icttpo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c3j60o32c9j649fg)

Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. FREE Bonus #7: You also get Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa. Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... FREE Bonus #8: You also get $25 OFF your next purchase. This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... FREE Bonus #9: You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order! It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. Look, this food tastes homemade. It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just . When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. As it stands today, it's every man for himself. In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters More Raving Reviews From Customers! | | Rory H. I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things. ---|--- | Billy H. Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup. ---|--- | Kevin S. The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start. ---|--- | Carol B. I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings. ---|--- | Ken K. I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when." ---|--- Real reviews from real customers.
