name: =?utf-8?Q?Derek=20Lyons=20=2D=20RITE?=
subject: Didn't Vote In The Last Arizona Election? Are You Sure?
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **Didn't Vote In The Last Arizona Election? Are You Sure?**
_How Katie Hobbs Made It Easier For Somebody to Impersonate You at the Ballot Box_ **WASHINGTON, DC** – A lawsuit filed in Arizona court by Restoring Integrity and Trust in Elections (RITE) demonstrates how Governor Katie Hobbs violated state law in her previous role as Secretary of State by authorizing an illegal expansion of the database of signatures used to verify ballots, including the addition of potentially unreliable signatures.

“Signature verification is a critical election integrity measure that is under sustained attack,” said Derek Lyons, President & CEO of RITE. “We are fighting to protect it so that it is available to safeguard the integrity of future elections. Hobbs’ illegal instructions degrade the reliability of signature verification over time by enabling more and more ballots to be tested against an ever-expanding database of signatures, some of which may not be sufficiently reliable. Arizona law is clear that only certain, reliable signatures can be used to verify mail-in ballots. The new Secretary of State must revoke Hobbs’ instructions and enforce the law enacted by the Arizona legislature.”

The lawsuit, filed in partnership with Arizona Free Enterprise Club and a concerned Arizona voter, asks the court to enforce state law and ensure that county officials validate mail ballots using only signatures that are part of the voter’s registration record, not, as the complaint warns, using any “loop, jot, or tiddle” in any signature that happens to be in their possession, many of which may be unreliable. A key argument RITE makes is that the signature verification process, as provided in the election code, is necessary to ensure confidence in Arizona's elections: _"The signature presented on an early ballot affidavit is the fulcrum on which the integrity of that ballot pivots; it is the only means by which the county recorder can verify that a person casting an early ballot by mail is, in fact, a duly qualified elector. And given the centrality of early ballots to elections in this state, signature verification is also foundational to the overall integrity of Arizona’s elections."_ The law directs election officials to compare the mail ballot to the “signature of the elector on the elector's registration record.” This excludes, for example, signatures collected from mail-in ballots received in previous elections. These signatures are not part of the registration record and are less likely than registration signatures to trace back to the voter in question. Lyons added, “Hobbs’ instructions subvert the signature law and increase the risk that invalid ballots will enter the ballot box and be counted. The inevitable consequence of forever increasing the number of signatures on file for comparison, including from potentially unreliable sources, is harm to the public’s confidence in the integrity of their elections. And with more unreliable signatures being added with every election, the database is becoming increasingly less useful as an identity verification tool. Hobbs’ instructions threaten to completely subvert Arizona’s signature verification regime. That is why they must be revoked before the next election.” **About RITE**

Co-founded in 2022 by National Finance Chairman Steve Wynn, Senior Advisor Karl Rove, and Chairman of the Board Bobby R. Burchfield, RITE is a 501(c)(4) non-profit organization dedicated to protecting the rule of law in elections. Working with some of the finest lawyers in the country, RITE supports faithful enforcement of valid, properly enacted, and adopted laws and regulations that promote secure, efficient, and accurate elections throughout the United States.

For updates, follow Restoring Integrity and Trust in Elections on [Twitter.](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=d9e7276ccc&e=ea91f782ea) ###
---
| | | | | [](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=1d66e173e8&e=ea91f782ea)
---
[](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=3c66694777&e=ea91f782ea)

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Restoring Integrity and Trust in Elections1233 20th St NWSte 350Washington, DC 20036
[Add us to your address book](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/vcard?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=735bdaf382)

subject: Limited edition offer
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Peter, The 2024 presidential race is underway and there's only one Republican who can rally the base and defeat Joe Biden in a landslide: **Florida Governor Ron DeSantis** ...but he has not yet put his hat in the ring. [**That 's why I'm urgently turning to you - a loyal grassroots conservative - to spur Governor DeSantis to jump in the race.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409964:JRDBxaG3N:m:1:3365131770:A91268A87001F1B2794F804E6515FE7A:r)
---
|
---
In fact, I'm asking you to do two important things to let Governor DeSantis know it's time:
---
1. [**Donate**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409964:JRDBxaG3N:m:1:3365131770:A91268A87001F1B2794F804E6515FE7A:r) today - this will help us let Governor DeSantis know he has the support of millions of grassroots patriots like you across the nation.
2. [**Proudly display the special edition READY FOR RON bumper sticker**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409964:JRDBxaG3N:m:1:3365131770:A91268A87001F1B2794F804E6515FE7A:r)- which I'll rush you when you make your donation today - somewhere folks will see it to spread the word about our best AND ONLY option for 2024.

---
**Limited Edition Bumper Sticker _Available Now_**
---
---
|
---
The numbers don't lie. The latest Quinnipiac poll of independent voters has DeSantis at 50% to Biden's 41% and a 12.4% average lead across major polling sources. In other words, Ron DeSantis is the one candidate who can defeat Joe Biden in a landslide and usher in a new era of conservative leadership. **On top of that, we 've now collected over 200,000 signatures from American patriots like you on our Draft DeSantis petition! ** I certainly don't need to tell you our country desperately needs new leadership. New, principled conservative leadership. America needs a leader who will fight for our shared values, defend our constitutional rights and remove the red tape so our economy can thrive. **America needs Ron DeSantis.** [**So can I count on your immediate donation today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409964:JRDBxaG3N:m:1:3365131770:A91268A87001F1B2794F804E6515FE7A:r) _Ready for Ron_ is the only legitimate grassroots organization dedicated to jumpstarting Ron DeSantis's 2024 presidential campaign. We are working hard to persuade the Governor to jump in the race NOW... ...while we rally conservative Americans like you to raise money and increase his name recognition and momentum so Ron DeSantis is the clear frontrunner for the Republican nomination the day he announces his candidacy. [**Don 't forget I'll rush you a special edition READY FOR RON bumper sticker when you donate today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409964:JRDBxaG3N:m:1:3365131770:A91268A87001F1B2794F804E6515FE7A:r) Four more years of Joe Biden isn't an option. I'm _Ready for Ron._ Are you? Thank you in advance for your support of Ron DeSantis and our country.
---
Sincerely,
---
Ed Rollins
---
P.S. I'm ready for someone to hold Joe Biden's feet to the fire and get booted out of office on Election Day 2024. But the only way that will happen is if Republicans rally around one candidate: Florida Governor Ron DeSantis. [**Donate today to urge Governor DeSantis to get in the race and I 'll rush you a special edition READY FOR RON bumper sticker today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409964:JRDBxaG3N:m:1:3365131770:A91268A87001F1B2794F804E6515FE7A:r) Please display it proudly where others can see to spread the word about our next President.
---
[**DONATE TODAY**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409964:JRDBxaG3N:m:1:3365131770:A91268A87001F1B2794F804E6515FE7A:r)
---
| | _Ready for Ron is a grassroots effort dedicated to drafting Ron DeSantis for President in 2024. Your support is critical to making sure this effort succeeds in order to get America back on track. _
---
_Our efforts depend on the support of America-First patriots like you. So if you'd like to donate,**[please submit your response today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62409964:JRDBxaG3N:m:1:3365131770:A91268A87001F1B2794F804E6515FE7A:r)** Thank you. _

name: John Kasich
subject: Watch my speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
I was proud to offer remarks at this year's Principles First summit. You can watch my speech in this email.| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=05c68b4a44ee4a8b85aa060cfa4b6b32&_e=77IC2lRTM7XGvwql4LFP100iAlNNVuIVXWqfOa1n1Qt6qo6nP8pf9oP_mUx8Mo8MorfcXmZLqRxymL0ywELEfe4DplJJO3gFlMtT8EIws9ekiNcOinyBy_XsOFoPI-b04NyBpPEufzOlrC5i-AL3qV1JUvWE1DzAQ7PfKyKD2Bqiowrv88Jwp2ma9wwnrOHs8EHucQCnAjpXRdQbPA-Jxg%3D%3D)
---
Peter, You may have heard that the CPAC conference was happening in DC last week. This used to be a well-respected forum for conservative candidates to talk about policy, but has since morphed into a platform for Trump’s most faithful supporters to air their divisive views. It’s not surprising that so many prominent members of my party chose to skip the conference as the annual event is losing its influence. Instead, many well-respected Republican voices met nearby for the Principles First Summit and heard substantive policy discussions from leaders who are looking to return the party to positivity and problem solving. I was honored to speak to attendees of the conference. You can watch my speech below:
---
[](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=05c68b4a44ee4a8b85aa060cfa4b6b32&_e=77IC2lRTM7XGvwql4LFP1xorVUb9aF1gUXCyMHuCnwLFkVtdQDW0qICiCNYuEBIntuEh5XMzUkP4oJogSos61CauJveU8L03OepTwtik5hsGih50PyUz5LiM5Wfl6gYelhlz7NKtVfTBS4U6fVx2bBzdQr_kdVe0phwQ8RAajKTwBPqybi18M9vQYEN7WwiFiJLFzV8P1eUU10Jpx7_lZg%3D%3D)
---
[WATCH VIDEO](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=05c68b4a44ee4a8b85aa060cfa4b6b32&_e=77IC2lRTM7XGvwql4LFP1xorVUb9aF1gUXCyMHuCnwLFkVtdQDW0qICiCNYuEBIn-yBznazormmtG3JSUuOT9-WP5IEp-4AJ1E3mv6dlyrZ639olMtuMH1jtbeu9z8rfLHbnHa-d2rADgnmR2HFSXA-Q0Gx2V5LirMkMJBSR_30Vyz2xkHTEDkNyVaaNaphluN8kvIJaZYN6eYkI8Cn0zA%3D%3D)
---
We know what works when it comes to creating better opportunities for Americans. It's lower taxes. It's government as a last resort. It's local control on many issues and empowering communities to govern themselves. It's having debates that take us out of our comfort zone, while keeping an open mind and being respectful. It's easy to be against everything. Sadly, that's seemingly what today's Republican Party is all about. How many elections do we have to lose before people will wake up and realize that this doesn't work? You and I know that there is a better way. It starts by simply treating other people with respect and decency. From there, it's amazing how much common ground you can find with people, even if they have different political beliefs or life experiences. **Peter - I'm committed to the mission of healing our politics and know that you agree with me**. That's why I'm so proud to have you on the team.
---
One of the realities is that we need to raise the funds to continue rallying support for this positive agenda. [Will you consider chipping in with a donation to help?](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=05c68b4a44ee4a8b85aa060cfa4b6b32&_e=77IC2lRTM7XGvwql4LFP1_ilypKzUdgnJHxBJXHpyCweh7u2WED1zHB5kaaPR4TtStoudhovE1fIZGJ7xvAymoZ52UDNcZwk7psB_rvZV-G1BPdSWvFAPkudqEl93HBeYc_NuANp0Ewe25pVb0KtRW4uz7lc_Q9Fi5wxzOgMWB-RR3U4C8ksdsykpLxtMlTsNzUqClwG4e5SyeX5vazwAQ%3D%3D) I'm so appreciative for your ongoing support. Thank you! -John
---
| | |
---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: It's a sick joke that Fox can call itself news, much less be played at our military bases. In fact, one in seven of those who stormed the Capitol in an attempted coup had military experience. Will you stand with VoteVets to ban this propaganda outlet from US military bases?
body:
Pentagon should ban Fox News propaganda
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T86344bb8-25a3-44c3-af73-1ad78ac2b43b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Fox News is a propaganda organization._ **_**Dangerous conspiracy-mongers that pollute the minds of millions of Americans, turning them into right-wing kooks and Russian sympathizers. **_ _**[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T928433e8-ae97-48ca-9e11-8293fa3d7a6b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**_ _You may have seen the news re the Dominion Voting Systems' lawsuit vs Fox. It produced texts and emails proving _**Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, Sean Hannity, their supposedly *serious newsman* Brett Baier and owner Rupert Murdoch knew Trump's bs about "election fraud" was just that. Bs. But like the treacherous jackals they are, they repeated it anyhow.** _**Because, Fox cares only for ratings and profits, **not anything approaching integrity or their fellow human beings**.** __**Fox has turned tens of millions of Americans against their country, communities and democracy. **_ [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in giving VoteVets $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so they can promote this video far and wide and begin the process of de-Foxing our country to stabilize our democracy?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2881e65c-9603-474d-9a18-053d57bf9ad9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_So, It's a sick joke this station can call itself news, much less be played at our military bases. In fact, one in seven of those who stormed the Capitol in an attempted coup had military experience._** _As an American, and son of a father who spent much of his career on a military base,** it's sickening we allow Fox's cabal of conspiracists anywhere near our military** to convince our troops to not only hate their country, but use their training to attack it._
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T49572e53-f6a3-4d3d-a875-85ca0d0964fd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_That's why I support VoteVets' effort to get the Pentagon to ban Fox on U.S. military bases, and hope you will too! _**_VoteVets created an outstanding video to make their case, and if we can get them resources, more people will see it. _ _[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a53db2b-8846-4d69-baf7-b7272fab8fc6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_ [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in giving VoteVets $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so they can promote this video far and wide and begin the process of de-Foxing our country to stabilize our democracy?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0243f4a5-b99b-4dc9-af4f-452cabaeb928/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for taking on this vicious propaganda._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tca737601-6c39-4fee-a6bd-f4f1aa14648d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

CONGRATULATIONS! >>
| **BREAKING: Jennifer McClellan Sworn into Congress, Shrinking the GOP’s House Majority** **Listen, this is a HUGE victory for Democrats and our fight to take back the House, so we’re sending McClellan a letter from our top grassroots supporters to congratulate her!** [We’re sending this letter to her office at 8 am tomorrow – so we only have 55 more signature spots available! SIGN NOW! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41697?t=6&akid=6685%2E878179%2EMe8VZg) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41697?t=7&akid=6685%2E878179%2EMe8VZg) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41697?t=8&akid=6685%2E878179%2EMe8VZg)

TO: Representative Elect Jennifer McClellan
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: CONGRATULATIONS **_Dear Jennifer McClellan – CONGRATULATIONS!_**

**We cannot begin to tell you the sense of relief we had when we found out you soared to victory!**

This election was absolutely _essential_ for Democrats to win if we want to take back the House in 2024.

**We know becoming the first Black woman elected to the U.S. House from Virginia was no easy task, but you worked tirelessly to win and we’re so excited to see all that you will accomplish in office.**

**So we just wanted to show our thanks and send our congratulations!** [I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to congratulate you on this outstanding victory and to continue to elect incredible House Democrats like you »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41697?t=9&akid=6685%2E878179%2EMe8VZg) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41697?t=10&akid=6685%2E878179%2EMe8VZg) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41697?t=11&akid=6685%2E878179%2EMe8VZg)

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: What is an FEC deadline and why is it so important? Please let us explain.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Every three months candidates running for federal office are legally required to report how much money they’ve raised
#

Peter -
We have an important FEC fundraising deadline this month, so we wanted to take a moment to explain what that means and why it is so important.
If you already understand why this is so important for Ruben’s campaign and are ready to add a donation to our total, here’s a link for you to give right away:
[**https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/fec_march_deadline**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar23.PJzORo&refcode=em230308-1-30-15gm&t=1&akid=445%2E734936%2Ej6DBWk)
Otherwise, let us explain.
FEC. It stands for Federal Election Commission. It’s the organization that oversees campaign finance law.
And every three months candidates running for federal office are legally required to report how much money they’ve raised and how much of that money comes from small donations, big donations, and who those big donors are.
This is how we know Kyrsten Sinema gets so much money from payday lenders, hedge fund managers, and drug company executives.
Everyone looks at these reports, especially the press and potential endorsers.
And what we want to do when we file our first report is show elected Democrats and potential supporters the level of grassroots support Ruben’s campaign has.
If we can file a good report with lots of donors — one that shows we can win — we know that endorsements and more donations will follow. That is why this deadline is so important.
And because most of our donations come from emails like this, it means we have to ask:
[**Can you PLEASE contribute $5, $10 or whatever feels right for you today to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate? Hopefully you understand now how important this is. The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar23.PJzORo&refcode=em230308-1-30-15gm&t=2&akid=445%2E734936%2Ej6DBWk)
Use the link above to give, or click an amount that feels right for you today:
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

---

| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-mar23.ptXUwS&refcode=em230308-1-30-15gm&t=22&akid=445%2E734936%2Ej6DBWk)**

| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-mar23.qy39g3&refcode=em230308-1-30-15gm&t=23&akid=445%2E734936%2Ej6DBWk)**

name: Greg Casar
subject: My trip this weekend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59855438/395295898/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODk2MmNmNC1iZmJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q74Nk0FzRT8CdezSkXHrgb6WFkYS92I6dx-UcFWmoFg=&emci=85962cf4-bfbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=88962cf4-bfbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6830379)
Peter,

**This past weekend, I marched in Selma, Alabama to mark the 58th anniversary of the “Bloody Sunday” march** , a seminal moment in the Southern freedom struggle for civil rights.

To protest against Jim Crow, and in response to the killing of peaceful demonstrator Jimmie Lee Jackson, leaders like Martin Luther King Jr. and Rev. Fred Shuttlesworth led a march across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma.

While marching across the bridge, law enforcement brutally attacked the peaceful marchers—which included the late Congressman John Lewis—with billy clubs, dogs, and even tear gas. The march helped to galvanize the civil rights movement and exposed many Americans to the horrors activists faced while speaking out for civil rights.

While crossing the Edmund Pettus Bride myself this weekend, I thought about Congressman John Lewis’s struggle and legacy. **I walked alongside some of the same freedom fighters that marched in 1965, and they reminded me that we are not simply called to commemorate the original demonstration— we are called to continue it.**
****
_This weekend I crossed the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, Alabama, where civil rights activists were attacked by law enforcement 58 years ago while demanding federal voting rights legislation._

Right-wing extremist politicians have successfully dismantled many of the voting rights protections that John Lewis and others successfully won. We’ve seen a surge in voter suppression legislation across the country—including in places like Texas, which passed laws that shortened voting hours, restricted voting-by-mail, racially gerrymandered districts, and empowered partisan poll watchers to intimidate voters.

If you read the history closely, this type of legislation is _**exactly**_ what John Lewis and the marchers in Selma were speaking out against. Now, I’m in Congress and committed to passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and the For the People Act, to guarantee voting rights and civil rights for all.

Thank you,

Greg

_Congressman Greg Casar
Texas Congressional District 35_

Let's talk Ilhan Omar's failures, . The Minnesota Democrat Representative has quite the history of promoting extreme, socialist, and anti-Semitic views throughout her political career.She has been:
* _Condemned by both parties in 2012 for tweeting, “Israel has hypnotized the world” to do “evil” – even Nancy Pelosi condemned these remarks._
* _Ousted earlier this month by Republicans from the Foreign Affairs Committee._
* _Consistently shows up with anti-Minnesota proposed legislation._

_**What do you think?**_

The Minnesota Democrat Representative has quite the history of promoting extreme, socialist, and anti-Semitic views throughout her political career.She has been: Condemned by both parties in 2012 for tweeting, “Israel has hypnotized the world” to do “evil” – even Nancy Pelosi condemned these remarks. Ousted earlier this month by Republicans from the Foreign Affairs Committee. Consistently shows up with anti-Minnesota proposed legislation. What do you think? Thank you, Aaron E.**Finstad HQ | | | | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m personally asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59858863/395308311/-1708609261?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2336-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzY2Y4MjRhLWMzYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lSwie1djy7zeEXYug2dctjcZ70vv4qm3fR5yfw2R2Ss=)Hi, friend, it’s Sen. Sherrod Brown from Ohio. I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity of Work – and I mean _all_ work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I’ll fight for you.

I’m running for reelection so I can _keep_ fighting for workers and families in the Senate – but I need your help. As the only remaining statewide Democrat in Ohio, analysts at _CNN_ say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and national Republicans are already launching attack ads against me.
**The battle for Senate control could all come down to Ohio – so please, I’m personally asking: ****[Will you give $15 or more right now – split between my campaign and American Bridge PAC – to help defend this battleground seat and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59858865/395308325/-1708609261?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=15&refcode=jtk2336-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzY2Y4MjRhLWMzYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lSwie1djy7zeEXYug2dctjcZ70vv4qm3fR5yfw2R2Ss=)**

I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. And I’ll be honest with you: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. I’m fighting in the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every American.
But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8 points. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the most costly and competitive in the nation, and _NBC News_ reports that this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”

**The long and short of it is, I can’t win – and Democrats simply can’t hold onto our narrow Senate majority – if we don’t have strong grassroots support from folks like you.**

**[That’s why I’m asking for your support today, friend: Please, will you chip in $15 or more now – split between my campaign and American Bridge PAC – so we can win in Ohio and defend the Senate?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59858870/395308333/-1708609261?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=15&refcode=jtk2336-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzY2Y4MjRhLWMzYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lSwie1djy7zeEXYug2dctjcZ70vv4qm3fR5yfw2R2Ss=)**

With gratitude,

Sherrod Brown
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.everyaction.com/p/0g0_Xzr_bkGTgu_cr2eHAA2?unsubscribedata=lXYP8Fbg1QAPbOIW3h6XFwWktHR7OwxKNLRw3EMF3ucOOW9zB6mQkDtUpAvcBcTtrpzQDK0YM4f%2F%2Ft5kpeJVMwaTlmxnV%2F%2B4B4PG9xTKdaXDRmXVI%2FbPWyqhb9YMpBo5GIE8kTBeJjUP%2Fz9tFDeJ9%2Fw1PAsSVRq3mzWfMCZTmpRjiTsyAIpuut2329Gb5awOHaAQMc%2F7smMdrAQwvAMGcxURFrvHZnXFjxk5qPTc5VqmeHenOj6cZ6pTpyIhNuy%2Boin7PwSz1yRIIm52J8Gqju8fjUkQuXCKtdOqXc2W0aYJH5HxIcJTNbRY%2FV8esW1FdMLkGuScx3oeaqBl3f8ZOFJQkhICB9zn5Kvs%2Bk1TILavn1p%2FOdBT%2BXmo8ut85N6LZiljQd3F7HK00CDzWh5oSLCMuE3JGMm1Ca%2B%2BSM8JFcY%3D) | | Paid for by AB PAC. Speaker McCarthy provided over 40,000 hours of security camera footage, of which three sets were released to Fox News and Carlson. body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59860357/395314200/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDgwZjYzYy1jNmJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3QgBevcMarrp1TjBQcjzTkPTFcwp4S3JP4xUwbahcms=&emci=389f5f84-04bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9080f63c-c6bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | Marjorie Taylor Greene spewed more of her usual conspiracy theories and hateful rhetoric this weekend at the premiere GOP conference.

Her main speech was propaganda straight from the Kremlin and Vladimir Putin, calling on the U.S. to withdraw support from Ukraine and **_reminding us that she’d rather stand for dictators than democracy._**

But that’s not all – she also viciously attacked trans kids and called for a _**ban on gender-affirming health care.**_

In fact, the GOP has become so extreme that MTG’s extremism is now the party norm. One speaker even called for trans people to be “eradicated.” **_This kind of language can get people killed._**

clean_body: | | | Marjorie Taylor Greene spewed more of her usual conspiracy theories and hateful rhetoric this weekend at the premiere GOP conference. Her main speech was propaganda straight from the Kremlin and Vladimir Putin, calling on the U.S. to withdraw support from Ukraine and reminding us that she’d rather stand for dictators than democracy. But that’s not all – she also viciously attacked trans kids and called for a ban on gender-affirming health care. In fact, the GOP has become so extreme that MTG’s extremism is now the party norm. One speaker even called for trans people to be “eradicated.” This kind of language can get people killed. And here’s the worst part: The crowd was fawning and cheering them on the entire time. subject: my friend Tammy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59861106/395316595/396464211?refcode=em-logo&refcode2=423587a2-c7bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=KTThn9mr1foMPt6o62R8YBLklvN7QCVeEp8KjgrXrIr60pfXzUWv/svqrPUp8lwT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjM1ODdhMi1jN2JkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6PdGfNdsboNFtT8PzVBmFitJjxZdNFRkP_LhBmj2i8Y=)

It's 715 miles from Baltimore to Madison, Wisconsin where my friend US Senator Tammy Baldwin was born and raised. We represent different states, but we share a deep commitment to fighting for those least able to stand up for themselves. [**Tammy's up for re-election this Senate cycle and she needs our support. Click here to help.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59861107/395316596/-399333356?refcode=&refcode2=423587a2-c7bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=KTThn9mr1foMPt6o62R8YBLklvN7QCVeEp8KjgrXrIr60pfXzUWv/svqrPUp8lwT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjM1ODdhMi1jN2JkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6PdGfNdsboNFtT8PzVBmFitJjxZdNFRkP_LhBmj2i8Y=)
Tammy's life prepared her to be the strong fighter for working families she has been since her first election to the U.S. Senate in 2012. Tammy was diagnosed with spinal meningitis at 9 and overcame that illness, but later found out she was ineligible for health care coverage because she was considered to have a "pre-existing condition". From patient rights, access to quality health care, educational opportunity, civil rights, economic security and more, she has been a fierce advocate for everyday Americans.
Tammy can't afford to take anything for granted in her re-election race. As you may remember, Donald Trump won Wisconsin in 2016 and Joe Biden only narrowly won the Badger state in 2020. Last November, pro-Trump Republican Ron Johnson, Wisconsin's other US Senator, defied predictions and won re-election to another 6 year term.
[**That's why I am asking if you can split a donation today of $10 or more between Tammy Baldwin's and my campaign to support our work to maintain our Democratic Senate majority. A contribution now helps Democrats build strong grassroots campaigns early and be well-prepared as we move full steam ahead toward Election Day 2024.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59861108/395316597/-399333356?refcode=&refcode2=423587a2-c7bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=KTThn9mr1foMPt6o62R8YBLklvN7QCVeEp8KjgrXrIr60pfXzUWv/svqrPUp8lwT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjM1ODdhMi1jN2JkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6PdGfNdsboNFtT8PzVBmFitJjxZdNFRkP_LhBmj2i8Y=)
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59861109/395316598/-399333356?refcode=&refcode2=423587a2-c7bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=KTThn9mr1foMPt6o62R8YBLklvN7QCVeEp8KjgrXrIr60pfXzUWv/svqrPUp8lwT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjM1ODdhMi1jN2JkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6PdGfNdsboNFtT8PzVBmFitJjxZdNFRkP_LhBmj2i8Y=)****
Rest-assured Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans will have their eyes on Tammy's seat as one of their top targets this cycle. With our help, she will be prepared for the fight ahead.
As always, thank you for all you do to protect and fight for our democracy.
Onwards,
Chris

Van Hollen for Senate
10605 Concord St. Ste 202
Kensington, MD 20895
[www.vanhollen.org](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59861110/395316599/-1239931627?refcode=em230307baldwin&refcode2=423587a2-c7bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=KTThn9mr1foMPt6o62R8YBLklvN7QCVeEp8KjgrXrIr60pfXzUWv/svqrPUp8lwT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjM1ODdhMi1jN2JkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6PdGfNdsboNFtT8PzVBmFitJjxZdNFRkP_LhBmj2i8Y=&emci=b9a418fa-25bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=423587a2-c7bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2216363)

name: Rand Paul
subject: protecting the unvaxxed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
Every American has the right to make medical decisions that are best for them. | | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this _[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=6629fb2de92a4eac815ff8e8fdcdd624&_t=JSgtBNXJFNYq28I0ATOCrheBJZ7g-n5IaQW0pOinkYA13I9_4v8xo2kCjjY-V2jjmkYQK1ZcM3KBUpNypxN9aFx0k5MytYE2JfawyodYwn4%3D)_.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6629fb2de92a4eac815ff8e8fdcdd624&_e=nMKHBE3dIyv6ZD4UG6P9X8q0y5jWlbLaIifl1eL7crKQC8Ldf4dm8h4GiW75Tp1LOBXee-Z3A5HNrcdRPfXhQH0lBcnIMq84Sng0ZQUvCH4wvXynmIqK9DBLlAGHSQ-yqWKwEQE9cMZp4sK5liih5KaJb1_zQoQakkFDmxeoVVR7Jz1eTpj_fedAX0IqppNkLVkYMsWdX6xDcL93qFb-VQP3zJW2jsJan4KIZBHEXkHhUxOfSDuTw1hozJUJmzNHNAhW0jaWrE7KqNqcYFFe3mdFMnn986Ggr45CXRpLBIiSj1M5LiJl0nhpg8qj0w8vGHV_GtUdPfwDESn4Oo25YZTYZ-yPVIz205vibL_qtHqVY44pYlnEMQLYvX9jO5FJ)
---
Peter, **_NO American_** should be denied critical care at a hospital or medical facility based on their personal decision not to get the COVID vaccine. _[**_I AGREE >>_**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6629fb2de92a4eac815ff8e8fdcdd624&_e=nMKHBE3dIyv6ZD4UG6P9X8q0y5jWlbLaIifl1eL7crKQC8Ldf4dm8h4GiW75Tp1LOBXee-Z3A5HNrcdRPfXhQH0lBcnIMq84Sng0ZQUvCH4wvXynmIqK9DBLlAGHSQ-yqWKwEQE9cMZp4sK5liih5KaJb1_zQoQakkFDmxeoVVR7Jz1eTpj_fedAX0IqppNkLVkYMsWdX6xDcL93qFb-VXdGVf_CWqnXIcq7O1QwN_LV5T3CBp75qqn78El1ncTCQLTTEjOxLJwlnT3oO2os13FcaPe9vXZfl9xT8xqBS8AFovO0oaXWTz8NvkYek6CXIkvYUzDpZzpusMXBqQTAIf0IK9c45LTsyGnqF9CYibAAZPLr25nB32Ej7q2tGh7x)_ Far too often, taxpayer funds are being sent to facilities that turn away patients based on their vaccination status, _and it’s wrong._ Peter, I introduced legislation to right this wrong. My bill will ensure federal tax dollars are not being used on facilities that pick and choose who to treat. **_Want to see this legislation become a reality? _**_[**_ABSOLUTELY >>_**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6629fb2de92a4eac815ff8e8fdcdd624&_e=nMKHBE3dIyv6ZD4UG6P9X8q0y5jWlbLaIifl1eL7crKQC8Ldf4dm8h4GiW75Tp1LOBXee-Z3A5HNrcdRPfXhQH0lBcnIMq84Sng0ZQUvCH4wvXynmIqK9DBLlAGHSQ-yqWKwEQE9cMZp4sK5liih5KaJb1_zQoQakkFDmxeoVVR7Jz1eTpj_fedAX0IqppNkLVkYMsWdX6xDcL93qFb-VfNZo1IZgPekKUcl3DaYF2iWYupQ7QQylfuWDmFp7wOYClol63tC6uFOh1Qurm_I1HTHEalcpaAIb2Nej7gb37Hr9L-EtuZ7o6kP2cfidctBQUMwf6P0y8TTyqwttPrQM39pbu5CRkz6MtCUuv-9nqtCgGu44DBvwKnYlEaCLxu1)_ **Sign my petition telling Congress to pass my bill and protect the unvaccinated:_[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-id-rvs-2023/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6629fb2de92a4eac815ff8e8fdcdd624&_e=nMKHBE3dIyv6ZD4UG6P9X8q0y5jWlbLaIifl1eL7crKQC8Ldf4dm8h4GiW75Tp1LOBXee-Z3A5HNrcdRPfXhQH0lBcnIMq84Sng0ZQUvCH4wvXynmIqK9DBLlAGHSQ-yqWKwEQE9cMZp4sK5liih5KaJb1_zQoQakkFDmxeoVVR7Jz1eTpj_fedAX0IqppNkLVkYMsWdX6xDcL93qFb-VboNqu5njS273Z4faNens6R5momqaYn-qSBpV6Dfc7aACG8ZGsxtIfgOkSJuiUR4jSWDZrOwPpY0G7kU1KykFoZys3r3AZjPi8owkZH2PPNSBMl1B6dK_NZ0xzLVEIe8FdenW4YnyVR9pDq_rdVhy4Vdml7ixeS1djsc-cOPW7xw)_** Peter, this bill would protect the rights of patients to make their own medical decisions without fear of being denied medical care, but I need your help making this a reality.
---
[**STAND WITH RAND: SIGN THE PETITION**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6629fb2de92a4eac815ff8e8fdcdd624&_e=nMKHBE3dIyv6ZD4UG6P9X8q0y5jWlbLaIifl1eL7crKQC8Ldf4dm8h4GiW75Tp1LOBXee-Z3A5HNrcdRPfXhQH0lBcnIMq84Sng0ZQUvCH4wvXynmIqK9DBLlAGHSQ-yqWKwEQE9cMZp4sK5liih5KaJb1_zQoQakkFDmxeoVVR7Jz1eTpj_fedAX0IqppNkLVkYMsWdX6xDcL93qFb-VSLj7uvxY_ILZr_rZEIEpVlTyX5fcOdRSUX_KfvIjixHWvcojy9cd5rzkt6rzYH-6_uIMTQl1Yo_puDAc8kIyh_5vVdTFfSBzJ-e5oUkauMQEPtRAXz0pqvhbl05YAA-drzJ6iELrOfSIoSgrFeZ9p19vK5KK32zdSzUD5B1kn6Q)
---
In liberty,Rand Paul

body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62410499:J937SaGNL:m:1:3331421248:2DE1D8E5D1A1570295806FC0949D64D3:r)

Peter, it's Kellyanne Conway - former Senior Counselor to President Trump.

I know you're extremely busy, so I won't be long. I've been told by my Republican friends in the U.S. Senate to specifically reach out to you to get your opinion on the most important issues facing the American people today.

That is why I need you to take the critical **[NRSC Nationwide Census](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62410499:J937SaGNL:m:1:3331421248:2DE1D8E5D1A1570295806FC0949D64D3:r)**. In fact, we trust you SO much that your response will be the representation of **YOUR AREA** and forwarded to my team.

Thank you,

Kellyanne Conway

name: Mark Warner
subject: A step toward ending Alzheimer’s
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
...together we can find a cure

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59887079/395380784/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDdlNDFjOC1mM2JkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LnI8lbc5tK7_UXo8CToFrq4pkf8-mE3XXkj1Y3JyI3U=&emci=cc773c2e-e6bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c47e41c8-f3bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, 2023 is the year we make major steps towards ending Alzheimer’s Disease as we know it. I lost my mother to Alzheimer’s after a 10-year battle with the illness. I know the toll of this terrible disease and the urgent need to find better treatments and a cure. That’s why I’m proud to have worked with my colleagues – both Democrats and fair-minded Republicans – to introduce a pair of bipartisan bills that will enhance our national plan to tackle the disease. I’ve introduced two bills to extend and modernize the National Alzheimer's Project, the federal program that implements our national Alzheimer’s research strategy. The bills are frankly pretty technical, but they reflect three commonsense goals.
* First, they will cement a long-term federal commitment to curing Alzheimer’s Disease.
* Second, our bills will help the National Alzheimer’s Project keep up with the science and support new areas of research that have emerged since Congress last took up this issue.
* Third and finally, they will help the federal government plan ahead for future research, so that we can make sure scientists have the resources they need to find a cure and that our tax dollars are wisely spent.

We’ve made great strides in our work to prevent and treat Alzheimer’s, but frankly, we need grassroots support to get these important bills across the finish line. **[_So I’m asking: Will you add your name and join me in supporting legislation to cure Alzheimer’s?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59887080/395380785/783071808?refcode=mw_em_230308_1&ms=mw_em_230308_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDdlNDFjOC1mM2JkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LnI8lbc5tK7_UXo8CToFrq4pkf8-mE3XXkj1Y3JyI3U=&emci=cc773c2e-e6bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c47e41c8-f3bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)** The truth is, Alzheimer’s Disease doesn’t care if you’re a Democrat or a Republican. From the personal impact on patients, to the billions of dollars we spend on treatment, to the countless hours of unpaid labor performed by caregivers—our whole country suffers the longer we wait to find a cure. Our bipartisan legislation will accelerate the national plan to find a cure on behalf of the millions of American families who have been touched by this disease. If we are to continue our work to end Alzheimer’s, we need to keep up the momentum and increase federal funding for research and potential treatments. **[_Please Derek, join me today to fight for all those who have been impacted by this disease >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59887081/395380786/783071808?refcode=mw_em_230308_1&ms=mw_em_230308_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDdlNDFjOC1mM2JkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LnI8lbc5tK7_UXo8CToFrq4pkf8-mE3XXkj1Y3JyI3U=&emci=cc773c2e-e6bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c47e41c8-f3bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)** Thanks, Mark Warner **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59887082/395380787/783071808?refcode=mw_em_230308_1&ms=mw_em_230308_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDdlNDFjOC1mM2JkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LnI8lbc5tK7_UXo8CToFrq4pkf8-mE3XXkj1Y3JyI3U=&emci=cc773c2e-e6bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c47e41c8-f3bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)**

Wokeness is a new secular religion that says your identity is based on your race and sexuality. This is destroying America in front of our eyes.

I'm on a mission to stop it. I wrote two bestselling books and started a new company to take on wokeness on Wall Street, but we must do more and address the real problem: **we are going through a national identity crisis.**

I'm Vivek Ramaswamy, and I launched my campaign for President of the United States to deliver an answer to the most important question of our time: what it means to be an American. **[Today I am asking YOU to be a part of our movement.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=be49798d34e2417d86f3da771ab44b13&_e=_YFpJfi09wkhxIHMLmqMPamwT45--UZR84pSuEgsQNQbTDqJp5M6cLSKWoLGdlO0StKHXyqvdwteded92JJg-apH_AtxCBTEC9ccRERVtT9PR-ezl0_Vs2jkUmcxlkhRbJ0MvBrDYQMR36dATvCC_SpAOYbzw8X0orfIqQF5y_FS5QL1_oBeFaAzQ0olAiOV_r2Y7vEXvkcJ0TlVM3vyJsOj68XlG4VBiBWjeHSTAXRJzqyJJTq0Ge8btYE-R3gfF6vDNNuSMOmH6mTpkcmKIce0R_H5uQfKPU_pkY4zT0LWv6peMprKDY5GbIgPF3NQT6TvDan9j-t9Y-T-yKBXERoz00Q5bLrOMjB9lyMw1D6iq_P0rGvhGTIWu7W9zncvHQjBV4UtTU8JaKxN762_VA%3D%3D)**

| [** JOIN VIVEK ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=be49798d34e2417d86f3da771ab44b13&_e=_YFpJfi09wkhxIHMLmqMPamwT45--UZR84pSuEgsQNQbTDqJp5M6cLSKWoLGdlO0StKHXyqvdwteded92JJg-apH_AtxCBTEC9ccRERVtT9PR-ezl0_Vs2jkUmcxlkhRbJ0MvBrDYQMR36dATvCC_SpAOYbzw8X0orfIqQF5y_FS5QL1_oBeFaAzQ0olAiOV_r2Y7vEXvkcJ0TlVM3vyJsOj68XlG4VBiBWjeHSTAXTIa9zhTNgmkSg5t4r3_ImWett6T7CBET8dN_6LAo_W2WM_YVnl3nx2x5hBbqga1UU7TyyPHBMvEEwceHkaH6lNbMtYuF5FV77hL_DCv9OZBXO9-fbu4s7kDZZ9iCxmmVvwFQE_0655BSUWn_2syEWMDGvubByDU75SUiOWxAE1Cg%3D%3D)
---

I remember when I was in 2nd grade and heard Martin Luther King's _"I Have Dream"_ speech for the first time: America judges its children not on the color of their skin, but on the content of their character.

I grew up in Ohio in the 90s to two immigrants who came to this country with almost no money. I was a skinny kid with nerdy glasses and a funny last name. Achievement was my ticket to get ahead. After graduating from Harvard and Yale, I went on to start a family and founded multibillion-dollar companies.

You probably know me as the **author of _Woke, Inc._** - or by what left-leaning outlets have called me, like "the intellectual godfather of the anti-woke movement" (_Politico_), "CEO of Anti-Woke, Inc.," (_The New Yorker_), or the "right's leading anti-ESG crusader" (_Axios_ , _Bloomberg_ , and others). I take their criticisms as a badge of honor because we are standing up for what is right - and true.

_I'm 37 years old. People my age and younger can't even answer what it means to be an American today._

**My peers have abandoned faith, patriotism, and hard work and instead embrace new secular religions like covidism, climatism, and radical gender ideology.**

**I'm running for President of the United States of America to revive the ideals that made America great - and made America itself. If this is important to you too, then I need you to be a part of this movement. [Will you help me launch my campaign by throwing in a contribution of $10, $25, $40 or more today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=be49798d34e2417d86f3da771ab44b13&_e=_YFpJfi09wkhxIHMLmqMPamwT45--UZR84pSuEgsQNQbTDqJp5M6cLSKWoLGdlO0StKHXyqvdwteded92JJg-apH_AtxCBTEC9ccRERVtT9PR-ezl0_Vs2jkUmcxlkhRbJ0MvBrDYQMR36dATvCC_SpAOYbzw8X0orfIqQF5y_FS5QL1_oBeFaAzQ0olAiOV_r2Y7vEXvkcJ0TlVM3vyJsOj68XlG4VBiBWjeHSTAXT-3Kvc6rhWVvS7udYrnRqO7p4e6x8sM5wGkzae0Dsg1SohovVePkKiq-bHQOb1d1NrU220TckMc0azdcPduceWOGbpdqszXrnQo5KOX-AxA86PDwPn-BjSEIsQgOsVewMAeOBeGwMMD5nXQfkEjErqaU3myn_gfZ5_uaSLJT3XJg%3D%3D)**

[** JOIN VIVEK ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=be49798d34e2417d86f3da771ab44b13&_e=_YFpJfi09wkhxIHMLmqMPamwT45--UZR84pSuEgsQNQbTDqJp5M6cLSKWoLGdlO0StKHXyqvdwteded92JJg-apH_AtxCBTEC9ccRERVtT9PR-ezl0_Vs2jkUmcxlkhRbJ0MvBrDYQMR36dATvCC_SpAOYbzw8X0orfIqQF5y_FS5QL1_oBeFaAzQ0olAiOV_r2Y7vEXvkcJ0TlVM3vyJsOj68XlG4VBiBWjeHSTAXRB-Zj7MV5sza28KDxb-smfNQ_zZB28afvDLtKAh7H08k-kIAeGMt1AkS9sXT2fTaK7VRdhh9mxPJNxyjNQP2dtELhGMwBIL85W8T1k0fcC7t092A2VzPx5wby3ILJZ4FOPHi2LjaQAQq8TjgylYkhOVFdTGzbm7qO5aDb71erecA%3D%3D)
---

It's not enough to just be AGAINST something like wokeness... we need to be FOR something.

**We are on a mission to create a new American Dream for the next generation.**

We must embrace merit and excellence in every sphere of our lives:

Merit in who gets into America. More immigrants like my parents, instead of illegal immigrants who break the law to enter the country.

Merit in who gets ahead in America. You win in America not on the color of your skin, but on the content of your character and contributions.

Merit in who governs America. I have a humble dream that the people who we elect to run the government should be the ones who actually run the government, not federal bureaucrats who multiply themselves like a national cancer.

Merit in the marketplace of ideas. The best ideas win when no ideas are censored.

**I think you believe in these ideals.** I think you believe your neighbors and colleagues believe in these ideals too, but you can't be sure because you're not allowed to talk about it anymore. We still agree on the basic ideals - at least most of us do.

**[I am running for President to save the ideals that made America great. Please stand with me in the fight to revive American exceptionalism by contributing $10, $25, $40 or another amount to help me launch my campaign.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=be49798d34e2417d86f3da771ab44b13&_e=_YFpJfi09wkhxIHMLmqMPamwT45--UZR84pSuEgsQNQbTDqJp5M6cLSKWoLGdlO0StKHXyqvdwteded92JJg-apH_AtxCBTEC9ccRERVtT9PR-ezl0_Vs2jkUmcxlkhRbJ0MvBrDYQMR36dATvCC_SpAOYbzw8X0orfIqQF5y_FS5QL1_oBeFaAzQ0olAiOV_r2Y7vEXvkcJ0TlVM3vyJsOj68XlG4VBiBWjeHSTAXQtiGWa9BAQqNmh4sPB1rshRWP7ae2rw4UybdmNqBBNYI97ttLGeOUCQm1AtbeomJH6x2n9OO434SLbjPHSYW3saAo7GywuCGRWsHe_fJD3E6i-nKhmoiLfcMPD0mvA_VAWk4S-fed9dywMP6ahuJImkAN9vhxxM_0hWqlt6r9x2g%3D%3D)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tyler=20B.=20Jones?=
subject: Under the Dome - Your Update from the Legislature
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132872?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**I only have a few more weekly updates to send to y'all as time is winding down on the 2023 Legislative Session. **

While the last day on the calendar is scheduled for April 2, several lawmakers believe that the legislature could adjourn earlier than anticipated.

**Here is what has been going on over the past week in the Mississippi Legislature:**

Mississippi's school funding formula has been the same since its creation in 1997. MAEP, or the Mississippi Adequate Education Program, outlines how much funding school districts receive each year. The complex formula allocates money based on average daily attendance, student cost and several other factors.

**_[HB 1369](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=6440e93a7e&e=5703353baa),_ with companion bill HB [_1613_](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=89a344b4f2&e=5703353baa), would increase funding for state education by $181 million.** Local contribution requirements would increase from 27% to 29.5%, or equal in value to 28 mills of a special district.

While MCPP is proud that our school's education system will be fully funded - one of only three times since MAEP's existence that this will happen - we believe there is more our legislature should do to revamp our funding formula, such as giving parents control over their children's tax dollars.

This bill passed the Senate Tuesday, but several House members and leaders have expressed opposition to the legislation, indicating that it will probably fail once it is sent to the House.

The right to initiative has been a major talking point throughout this entire session. After the 2021 Supreme Court ruling striking down the state's current initiative process, Mississippi has needed a new initiative procedure - it just should be carried out in a proper manner.

**[SCR 533](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=333c191e1a&e=5703353baa) requires that 12% of the Mississippi electorate sign an initiative in order for a referendum to appear on a ballot. **This 12% approximates nearly 240,000, quite a large difference from the previous threshold of around 106,000.

The new initiative process would exclude several topics from being taken up through a referendum, such as abortion, changes to the state's Public Employees’ Retirement System and state constitutional amendments. While we believe Mississippians should have the right to an initiative, the threshold required under this bill is unattainable, and excluding particular subjects from the process is undemocratic, therefore, we do not support this bill.

This bill has passed the Senate floor, the House Constitution committee and is on the House calendar to be discussed on the floor.

Several controversial bills have now passed both chambers in anticipation of today's floor action deadline and are now on their way to Gov. Tate Reeves' desk for his official stamp of approval.

**[HB 401](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=81853baff7&e=5703353baa), commonly referred to as the "Tesla bill," passed the Senate floor last Thursday. **This bill revises certain provisions relating to a manufacturer's ownership of a motor vehicle dealership and prevents electric vehicle manufacturers from locating dealerships in the state.

This bill goes against free-market principles and discourages competition, and one we are not behind. Our only hope is that Gov. Reeves vetoes the bill when it comes across his desk.

**[HB 1020](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=6449ecef82&e=5703353baa), or the "CCID bill," passed the Senate floor Tuesday looking quite different from the original legislation sent over from the House. **

The initial bill called for the expansion of the Capitol Complex Improvement District, giving Capitol Police more jurisdiction and creating an appointed court system for the area. After several amendments in both the Senate Judiciary A committee and on the chamber floor, the bill would give Capitol Police jurisdiction over the entire city of Jackson, and funding will go toward hiring new judges and public defenders for Hinds County and putting money into the state crime lab.

The amended bill will be sent back to the House for approval.

Several bills were introduced and debated this session involving drug policy.

**[HB 722](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=05441cd78d&e=5703353baa) from Rep. Christopher Bell decriminalizes fentanyl testing strips. **These strips help prevent drug overdoses and deaths. This bill has passed both chambers and is heading to Gov. Reeves for approval.

**[HB 4](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=623cad333f&e=5703353baa) includes Tianeptine on the controlled substance list.** Tianeptine is an unregulated antidepressant sold in gas stations and convenience stores. HB 4 would ban this substance from being sold in the stores and would only be available through a prescription. This bill was amended in the Senate and will be sent back to the House.

On a brighter note, our state now has an official gemstone and fruit. **[SB 2138](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=b46b2b2078&e=5703353baa) from Sen. Lydia Chassaniol deems the Mississippi Opal as the official state gemstone, and [HB 1027](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=61a7a4a74e&e=5703353baa) from Rep. Jill Ford designates the blueberry as our state fruit. **

Have a great rest of your week!
---
|
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d036ce0769&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
All the best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

---
| _PS you can stay up to date with every bill introduced during the session through the [2023 Legislative Tracker](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=091b819acc&e=5703353baa) found on our website. _
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=a9d3df0139) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=a9d3df0139).

Jones Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs | PS you can stay up to date with every bill introduced during the session through the found on our website. | | |

name: Team Durbin
subject: Making History
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
more than 70% of our confirmed judges are women
#
Hey Peter, it's International Women's Day today and we wanted to take a moment to mention how proud we are of Senator Durbin and Senate Democrats for delivering some major wins for Americans recently.
**Under Senator Durbin’s leadership, the Judiciary Committee has confirmed more than 110 new judges since 2021 — and more than 70% of them are women!** This is a historic achievement, and these judicial nominations are the most diverse in our nation's history.
These judges are going to be a game-changer for our court system, bringing more representation to the bench and delivering justice for the American people.
**[But we need your help to defend our Senate majority and continue to push for the integrity of our judicial system. Will you chip in $5 to help us win this fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59862237/395321591/2052497700?refcode=dd_em_230308_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjJmMjg0YS1jYWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3w-vK2a8g3-m9li30NuYEPnW7db9zRuls09JqdFYfT0=)**
If Democrats lose our majority in 2024, the GOP will take us back to the days of right-wing, dark money, ultra-conservative ideology controlling the fate of our courts, putting our future at risk. We need to stand together and defend our Democratic majority to keep making progress.
**[By donating $5 right now, you are helping give us the resources to win in 2024, keep our majority, and deliver more results for the American people.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59862243/395321593/2052497700?refcode=dd_em_230308_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjJmMjg0YS1jYWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3w-vK2a8g3-m9li30NuYEPnW7db9zRuls09JqdFYfT0=)**
Let’s continue making history.
~ Team Durbin
**** ******** ****
********[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59862246/395321600/2052497700?refcode=dd_em_230308_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjJmMjg0YS1jYWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3w-vK2a8g3-m9li30NuYEPnW7db9zRuls09JqdFYfT0=)********

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: OUR FINAL BATTLE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
A recap of my speech at CPAC.

---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z81a9auravcdpq6ae41vrga34i4b9jk233pso6po_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spg69oj6c1h2bs)
---
| Friend,
---
| When I accepted the Republican nomination in 2016, I declared, "I am your voice."
---
| During my speech at CPAC, I added that _**" I am your warrior. I am your justice. And for those who have been wronged and betrayed, I am your RETRIBUTION."**_
---
| 2024 is the final battle for America.
---
| Either they win, or we win. And I promise you this: if you put me back in the White House, their reign will be OVER, and America will be a FREE NATION once again.
---
| _**[Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA in what truly is the FINAL BATTLE for our country- for an incredible 1,500% impact.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdo38cdb7d7o88jp4pfemhk08ofobigic7qil5bg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spg69oj6c1h2bs "Please make a contribution before the FEC end-of-month deadline to help us crush our goal for our NEW Ballot Harvesting Fund – for 1,300% impact.")**_
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8iohmi22kdss55rsf4gig8ubksm7eoqsbhhs2po_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spg69oj6c1h2bs)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $24](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrh8988b35o896foi093fb42hjv3rcu9f9scnnpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spg69oj6c1h2bs)
---
---
[CONTRIBUTE $47](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm71uf02i4h85035qn3s0515kut12dsu36cmeb8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spg69oj6c1h2bs)
---
---
[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsqsh2vljfnsns8af4u4rsrtkhdm4vvnctpit01g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spg69oj6c1h2bs)
---
---
[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaf88bcmh29ljfvm4oq4mg24fmpnl0kgt2b1l4dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spg69oj6c1h2bs)
---
---
[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr0ecpotltu13qim1odekag1e8d90k4in1vamd98_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spg69oj6c1h2bs)
---
---
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zimtla0j7droj3vtj7tubnhbcdvm7f81b90876v8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spg69oj6c1h2bs)
---
| I also went through some of our big plans that I will do as the 47th President of the United States.
---
| At the top of my list will be stopping the slide into costly and never-ending wars.
---
| **As you know, I was the only president in DECADES who didn 't start a war.**
---
| But I also _COMPLETED_ wars that had already started, including defeating 100% of the ISIS caliphate - which everyone said was impossible to do.
---
| In fact, a certain general said it could only be done in 3 years - if at all. _**I did it in 3 weeks.**_
---
| Before I even arrive at the Oval Office, I will have the disastrous war between Russia and Ukraine settled. I will get the problem solved - and get it solved quickly.
---
| **Instead of spending hundreds of billions of dollars to defend the borders of distant foreign countries, under my leadership, we will defend OUR borders.**
---
| Three years ago, we had the safest border in the history of our country. I built hundreds of miles of wall and completed that task as promised.
---
| When I am back in the White House, we will use all necessary state, local, federal, and military resources to carry out the **LARGEST DOMESTIC DEPORTATION** operation in American History.
---
| I will ask every state and federal agency to identify every known or suspected gang member in America, and every one of them that is here illegally, we will pick them up, and we will throw them out of our country - and there will be no questions asked.
---
| _I will also direct the Department of Justice to go after Marxist prosecutors ' offices to make them pay for their illegal, race-based enforcement of the law._
---
| _All of us have seen too many videos of 13-year-old carjackers and 14-year-old hoodlums viciously beating their victims._
---
| My administration will crack down on these out-of-control monsters, young though they may be, and impose tough consequences on juvenile criminals.
---
| I will also fight for PARENTS' RIGHTS, including universal school choice, and the direct election of school principals by the parents.
---
| I will revoke every Biden policy promoting the chemical castration and sexual mutilation of our youth -- and ask Congress to send me a bill prohibiting child sexual mutilation in all 50 states.
---
| And we will keep men out of women's sports!
---
| There's no other way to say it: _**our enemies are lunatics and maniacs.**_
---
| **_They cannot stand that they do not own me, they cannot steer me, they cannot shake me, and they will NEVER, EVER control me._**
---
| At the end of the day, ANYONE else could be intimidated, bought-off, blackmailed, or ripped to shreds.
---
| I alone will NEVER retreat.
---
| But that's why we must stand together...
---
| While the Soros Money Machine, Hollywood, and globalist billionaires - who have made a fortune off of selling out our country - try to defeat our America First movement, grassroots donors like YOU are our only hope of fighting back to save America.
---
| _**[So please, make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA in what truly is the FINAL BATTLE for our country- for an incredible 1,500% impact.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbo2ub4qjhjalel1cghbufdmsjaoqb6gmiqnmm8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spg69oj6c1h2bs "So please, make a contribution before the FEC end-of-month deadline to help us crush our goal for our NEW Ballot Harvesting Fund – for 1,300% impact.")**_
---
| Thank you,
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1rdh8bj516aalcpttg4c4f0lbmf7f5a21u49dp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spg69oj6c1h2bs)
---
| Donald J. Trump
45th President of the United States
---
| | |

---

625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
This grassroots team has been integral to the progress Democrats have made, and this new and exciting addition to DNC HQ will be a physical reminder of each and every supporter we have by our side. | |
---
Derek -- we’re coming to you today with an exciting new opportunity to get your support for Democrats memorialized here in DNC HQ. This month, we’re covering our walls with the names of grassroots donors who help power the hefty investments in organizing, voter protection, state-of-the-art data and technology, and so much more that is needed to elect Democrats nationwide. This new Official Democratic Grassroots Donor Wall will be a constant reminder of what -- _and who_ \-- we’re fighting for. Every sticker will have the name of a member of this team who chipped in to help elect Democratic candidates up and down the ballot nationwide -- and we want you to be one of them. clean_body: This grassroots team has been integral to the progress Democrats have made, and this new and exciting addition to DNC HQ will be a physical reminder of each and every supporter we have by our side. | | Derek -- we’re coming to you today with an exciting new opportunity to get your support for Democrats memorialized here in DNC HQ. This month, we’re covering our walls with the names of grassroots donors who help power the hefty investments in organizing, voter protection, state-of-the-art data and technology, and so much more that is needed to elect Democrats nationwide. This new Official Democratic Grassroots Donor Wall will be a constant reminder of what -- and who \-- we’re fighting for. Every sticker will have the name of a member of this team who chipped in to help elect Democratic candidates up and down the ballot nationwide -- and we want you to be one of them. Can you chip in $7 to add your name to our new Grassroots Donor Wall? This team has been integral to the progress Democrats have made over the last two years, and the Grassroots Donor Wall will be a physical reminder of each and every supporter we have by our side. We can’t wait to see the finished product and share our photos with you, too! Before that happens, we’re counting on you to make a donation and have your support for Democrats commemorated here in DNC HQ. Thanks for being a part of this, The Democrats Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. name: Veronica Martinez-Roman
subject: Celebrate Women in Politics this Women's History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee Massachusetts Democratic Party
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59864095/395329477/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDhlN2Q3YS1jZWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7_J0MW_-wWXNCFrJo14UUL7fDGMjW7bsu2dHrUMU-_I=&emci=e0886489-89b7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ed8e7d7a-cebd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=17281370)
---
| | Dear Peter, This Women's History Month, I’m joining in celebrating the countless trailblazers who've fought tirelessly for gender equality, paving the way for progress in politics. It's crucial that we continue to honor legacies by empowering women leaders and supporting the next generation of change-makers. Thanks to your support, we’re able to celebrate the increased number of state-wide candidates across the board who are committed to representing all of us in the Commonwealth. Today, women hold 30% of the MA State Senate seats with 12 powerful members leading the way. On the House side, women make up 32% of the MA House of Representatives. As well as - five out of the six top spots on the ticket are now held by women, creating the first-ever all-women Governor and Lt. Governor pairing. It's an exciting time for politics, but our work isn't done yet. We need to be united in this cause to ensure that these opportunities in politics are available for all. Will you join us in celebrating Women's History Month by supporting our efforts to empower democratic leaders? [Please consider making a donation of $5, $10, $15 or more to support our efforts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59864097/395329479/1204328695?refcode=website&amount=5&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDhlN2Q3YS1jZWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7_J0MW_-wWXNCFrJo14UUL7fDGMjW7bsu2dHrUMU-_I=) Because together, we can make history again. Thank you for your generosity.
---
| | [Donate Here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59864106/395329482/1204328695?refcode=website&amount=5&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDhlN2Q3YS1jZWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7_J0MW_-wWXNCFrJo14UUL7fDGMjW7bsu2dHrUMU-_I=)

| | Sincerely,
Veronica Martinez-RomanDeputy Treasurer, Massachusetts Democratic Party

Florida legislators just introduced a six-week abortion ban on the _very first day_ of the new legislative session.
