name: Ed Rollins
subject: Join the Ready for Ron team!
body:
The 2024 presidential race is underway and there's only one Republican who can rally the base and defeat Joe Biden in a landslide

| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow American, The 2024 presidential race is underway and there's only one Republican who can rally the base and defeat Joe Biden in a landslide: **Florida Governor Ron DeSantis** ...but he has not yet put his hat in the ring. [**That 's why I'm urgently turning to you - a loyal grassroots conservative - to spur Governor DeSantis to jump in the race.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ad1662b7bc9a43acbfa60c3dd5d871d5&_e=oCfWPvYRVPxZe7D2ltoRf-qHylaNmhF2laGXfoAEckLuhcTmxCh1c_hvklfAx69Ckhsl36mP80cu-HJv52pjTfVYuvUahASoc8q1orgLVvn1E3W6vGlhOk-Q8KFsmHCUORzj6IOGrlmSEFgtzW6m3SVcLeiPWNNV74FuJBFbSAS6Ao9xkw38abcFzALQT0E4aONutTX-hdMXI4zzQNKtRXsgTIRJYJamBVRTqqqcgS7WjzfUvuSHkqdquhwplDae4EOqMaNqQ7K92QPqKukZZ6cbGbSVvZVjpYsj8d1gAbnvKdSW8-yCk9bWFwiaVcFcfBh5wrOfXgxuhNlbDbweEUIp4cRIkVKJUjmGg4uovlsPMsdytWA8l54ey1UEKffiVHndKpYdecziv1shfR_hGQ%3D%3D)
---
|
---
In fact, I'm asking you to do two important things to let Governor DeSantis know it's time:
---
1. [**Donate $10**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ad1662b7bc9a43acbfa60c3dd5d871d5&_e=oCfWPvYRVPxZe7D2ltoRf-qHylaNmhF2laGXfoAEckLuhcTmxCh1c_hvklfAx69Ckhsl36mP80cu-HJv52pjTfVYuvUahASoc8q1orgLVvn1E3W6vGlhOk-Q8KFsmHCUORzj6IOGrlmSEFgtzW6m3SVcLeiPWNNV74FuJBFbSAS6Ao9xkw38abcFzALQT0E4aONutTX-hdMXI4zzQNKtRXsgTIRJYJamBVRTqqqcgS7F8YlV5cbjWolQ2CtDLzImVPWl28LtWSZCxCVhprXEqlHujnJGMjgkhFPx_L7RuEdiNE7JtKV9WxfbeobAUZiOMiuvMacAGpgbqpXLq6SZK54VgECbI1J3eOw-S3q_21xiQ5wwPhi_pk2vJnKk4qSkdy1JPqhTcVLPrCXKDkMTO3fuIhLsLZfpzJaAOjg-TBQ%3D) or more today - this will help us let Governor DeSantis know he has the support of millions of grassroots patriots like you across the nation.
2. [**Proudly display the special edition READY FOR RON bumper sticker**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ad1662b7bc9a43acbfa60c3dd5d871d5&_e=oCfWPvYRVPxZe7D2ltoRf-qHylaNmhF2laGXfoAEckLuhcTmxCh1c_hvklfAx69Ckhsl36mP80cu-HJv52pjTfVYuvUahASoc8q1orgLVvn1E3W6vGlhOk-Q8KFsmHCUORzj6IOGrlmSEFgtzW6m3SVcLeiPWNNV74FuJBFbSAS6Ao9xkw38abcFzALQT0E4aONutTX-hdMXI4zzQNKtRXsgTIRJYJamBVRTqqqcgS7WjzfUvuSHkqdquhwplDae70oJyBFZMlNGemJIFAdaUj2lsJRDMvYxKnyEQyzWrk0AqdqXL1-8g9jJRc-oVsHLnH19bRcTf9JnM5wfl2He_HSNc-T_cO9J8X2uNXfxPFvDNWWY7hx0n-OxypvT97BAQUj7FKi5fhxUBiCoA6XQ_A%3D%3D)- which I'll rush you when you make your donation today - somewhere folks will see it to spread the word about our best AND ONLY option for 2024.

---
**Limited Edition Bumper Sticker _Available Now_**
---
---
|
---
The numbers don't lie. The latest Quinnipiac poll of independent voters has DeSantis at 50% to Biden's 41% and a 12.4% average lead across major polling sources. In other words, Ron DeSantis is the one candidate who can defeat Joe Biden in a landslide and usher in a new era of conservative leadership. **On top of that, we 've now collected over 200,000 signatures from American patriots like you on our Draft DeSantis petition! ** I certainly don't need to tell you our country desperately needs new leadership. New, principled conservative leadership. America needs a leader who will fight for our shared values, defend our constitutional rights and remove the red tape so our economy can thrive. **America needs Ron DeSantis.** [**So can I count on your immediate donation of $10 or more today?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ad1662b7bc9a43acbfa60c3dd5d871d5&_e=oCfWPvYRVPxZe7D2ltoRf-qHylaNmhF2laGXfoAEckLuhcTmxCh1c_hvklfAx69Ckhsl36mP80cu-HJv52pjTfVYuvUahASoc8q1orgLVvn1E3W6vGlhOk-Q8KFsmHCUORzj6IOGrlmSEFgtzW6m3SVcLeiPWNNV74FuJBFbSAS6Ao9xkw38abcFzALQT0E4aONutTX-hdMXI4zzQNKtRXsgTIRJYJamBVRTqqqcgS7WjzfUvuSHkqdquhwplDae8kNyEykxZadwxCX1mKt9-OWb_HlWGifD3D-4J5GlD26iTM3EFr10rsoFYG23Nd9pmnHmm-v4zajB411Hb3fHXRmcZmOrCUsd9UPhA-5x13qLpSwqTcoW6QpNi6YGZcg2bEvJ_RrABC7R3nOfvrM1kg%3D%3D) _Ready for Ron_ is the only legitimate grassroots organization dedicated to jumpstarting Ron DeSantis's 2024 presidential campaign. We are working hard to persuade the Governor to jump in the race NOW... ...while we rally conservative Americans like you to raise money and increase his name recognition and momentum so Ron DeSantis is the clear frontrunner for the Republican nomination the day he announces his candidacy. [**Don 't forget I'll rush you a special edition READY FOR RON bumper sticker when you donate $10 or more today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ad1662b7bc9a43acbfa60c3dd5d871d5&_e=oCfWPvYRVPxZe7D2ltoRf-qHylaNmhF2laGXfoAEckLuhcTmxCh1c_hvklfAx69Ckhsl36mP80cu-HJv52pjTfVYuvUahASoc8q1orgLVvn1E3W6vGlhOk-Q8KFsmHCUORzj6IOGrlmSEFgtzW6m3SVcLeiPWNNV74FuJBFbSAS6Ao9xkw38abcFzALQT0E4aONutTX-hdMXI4zzQNKtRXsgTIRJYJamBVRTqqqcgS7WjzfUvuSHkqdquhwplDaei1y9HutEs_jkqeAOBqTaaElaz_uvzX38ge7TiXj92kuH6OOWnuqPW2amMH_B81nzp15uDdV4KfnTVDPpmMQTPeA1XScxngtP4XR-bbMkMJyZpSS9A8YnoJYtHGMqDbzdXfd-sPYCfH5zqPwmkDRB2w%3D%3D) Four more years of Joe Biden isn't an option. I'm _Ready for Ron._ Are you? Thank you in advance for your support of Ron DeSantis and our country.
---
Sincerely,
---
Ed Rollins
---
P.S. I'm ready for someone to hold Joe Biden's feet to the fire and get booted out of office on Election Day 2024. But the only way that will happen is if Republicans rally around one candidate: Florida Governor Ron DeSantis. [**Donate $10 or more today to urge Governor DeSantis to get in the race and I 'll rush you a special edition READY FOR RON bumper sticker today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ad1662b7bc9a43acbfa60c3dd5d871d5&_e=oCfWPvYRVPxZe7D2ltoRf-qHylaNmhF2laGXfoAEckLuhcTmxCh1c_hvklfAx69Ckhsl36mP80cu-HJv52pjTfVYuvUahASoc8q1orgLVvn1E3W6vGlhOk-Q8KFsmHCUORzj6IOGrlmSEFgtzW6m3SVcLeiPWNNV74FuJBFbSAS6Ao9xkw38abcFzALQT0E4aONutTX-hdMXI4zzQNKtRXsgTIRJYJamBVRTqqqcgS7WjzfUvuSHkqdquhwplDaeWbtEaHfL9MOLAbv4Kgyi35NtmollZkBLMq96RaKKUMA0GS9F1toz43ePE3NrEBAUuVtmoIEvHf4P-eiP7iF9IydpVMOGosD64mAXVRMgXQr8Mi2ASrb_BdkUCRwW6WSMcCDlnpZ8tVAZVTXbNWkVxg%3D%3D) Please display it proudly where others can see to spread the word about our next President.
---
[**DONATE TODAY**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ad1662b7bc9a43acbfa60c3dd5d871d5&_e=oCfWPvYRVPxZe7D2ltoRf-qHylaNmhF2laGXfoAEckLuhcTmxCh1c_hvklfAx69Ckhsl36mP80cu-HJv52pjTfVYuvUahASoc8q1orgLVvn1E3W6vGlhOk-Q8KFsmHCUORzj6IOGrlmSEFgtzW6m3SVcLeiPWNNV74FuJBFbSAS6Ao9xkw38abcFzALQT0E4aONutTX-hdMXI4zzQNKtRXsgTIRJYJamBVRTqqqcgS7WjzfUvuSHkqdquhwplDael0OhWuUS8XirOezSCtoJOqfDEYorEnM4skzSzw0xB3cMgikT5KNx5nqc27UYK-vC0Rz4WfARutHplVwgKE6Hnm-aUis4fOTnPQknR_q71F6syP-RYTWL2QMikrLmrtrWY57xj5PtU7PsOFFmG5C2wA%3D%3D)
---
| | _Ready for Ron is a grassroots effort dedicated to drafting Ron DeSantis for President in 2024. Your support is critical to making sure this effort succeeds in order to get America back on track. _
---
_Our efforts depend on the support of America-First patriots like you. So if you'd like to donate,**[please submit your response today.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ad1662b7bc9a43acbfa60c3dd5d871d5&_e=oCfWPvYRVPxZe7D2ltoRf-qHylaNmhF2laGXfoAEckLuhcTmxCh1c_hvklfAx69Ckhsl36mP80cu-HJv52pjTfVYuvUahASoc8q1orgLVvn1E3W6vGlhOk-Q8KFsmHCUORzj6IOGrlmSEFgtzW6m3SVcLeiPWNNV74FuJBFbSAS6Ao9xkw38abcFzALQT0E4aONutTX-hdMXI4zzQNKtRXsgTIRJYJamBVRTqqqcgS7WjzfUvuSHkqdquhwplDaea2GU-h04o4W3l_PSQsGQ7sumF0TKNVYro96v-69wVPerE47X5XcYn_6xQJNmF3maeRq3kCKAJKciq2jnbH65VChI-uOH5r_-pD1j64NvN3Nt_E6uNSccE-s45VR5B5Bpizb859El49qVptWNWuCqXw%3D%3D)** Thank you. _

To view the full petition text, please visit: "" By signing this petition and providing your information, you are requesting to have Ready for Ron provide it to Governor DeSantis. Use of the name and likeness of any candidate or officeholder is for the purpose of this PACs political communication only and IN NO WAY indicates any authorization by, affiliation with, direction from, or endorsement by that person of any kind. Contributions or gifts to the Ready for Ron are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes and will be used in connection with federal elections. Contributions from federal government contractors, national banks, or foreign nationals or entities are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. By submitting the form above, you certify the following statements are true and accurate: 1. This contribution is made from your personal funds, not from the general treasury funds of a corporation, union, or national bank, and will not be reimbursed by another person or entity; 2. This contribution is made by a U.S. citizen, lawfully admitted permanent U.S. resident (i.e. Green Card holder), and not a foreign national or entity, federal government contractor, or national bank; and 3. Contributions from individuals up to $5,000 per year are designated to the RFR candidate contribution account, and any amount in excess of $5,000 per year is designated to the RFR Carey account. **When you provide a phone number, you will also be opted into our text message campaigns, which are sent using peer-to-peer technology. subject: Happy International Women's Day!
body:
\- - - | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fd17956fa829/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-8118855?e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| | [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=dbc4bcc286&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Happy International Women’s Day, Peter!

As a Congresswoman and a mother of girls, this day holds a special significance for me. I am proud to have raised two strong and independent daughters, who inspire me every day with their determination and compassion.
---
| [ ](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=b48c31933f&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Throughout my career, I have worked tirelessly to empower women, promote equality, and create a brighter future for all of us.

I have championed legislation to support small businesses owned by women, minorities, and veterans, advocated for access to quality healthcare for all, including women's health, fought for equal pay and workplace protections for women, supported survivors of domestic violence and sexual assault, and worked to expand access to education and job training programs for women and girls.

On this International Women's Day, I encourage you to reflect on the incredible women in your own life and the contributions that they have made to society. Whether it's your mother, sister, daughter, friend, or colleague, we all have women who have made a difference in our lives.

Sincerely,

[](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=249cbc2332&e=c87c5d8d97)
Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Congresswoman OR-05
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TODAY]( "CONTRIBUTE TODAY")

subject: Let’s celebrate women by electing women

body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59866711/395339008/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2E3ZjdlZC1kM2JkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WyaYH6Kit8BdAHyMKnw7hiI9KnCZPHp7N80RJvioVRE=&emci=aef2d623-cebd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e7a7f7ed-d3bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9636579)

| | It's International Women's Day, Peter, a day to honor the achievements of women worldwide, and we've got our work cut out for us. **I'm proud to be part of the largest contingent of Congresswomen in history; there are 128 of us here in the House, including four of the six representatives from Oregon.** Despite making up more than half of the US population, women still make up less than _one-third_ of the 435 voting representatives in the House. That gap matters. Even with a historic number of women in Congress and on the Supreme Court, the right to choose is under attack. Any day now, an anti-choice extremist federal judge is expected to decimate access to safe medication abortions for millions of women. **So today's also an important reminder that it isn't enough to just elect women. We also need to elect women with proven track records of**** _fighting for women_****.** That's what I've done my entire career – from leading the effort for paid family leave, to ending workplace discrimination, and protecting a woman's right to choose**.** Now, in Congress, I'm fighting to extend those policies nationwide. Fighting for women isn't just a matter of policy.**I'm also working to clear the way for more women to join the movement in Congress.** Honored to fight at your side, _Val_ | Express Donate: If you've Despite making up more than half of the US population, women still make up less than one-third of the 435 voting representatives in the House. That gap matters. Even with a historic number of women in Congress and on the Supreme Court, the right to choose is under attack. Any day now, an anti-choice extremist federal judge is expected to decimate access to safe medication abortions for millions of women. So today's also an important reminder that it isn't enough to just elect women. We also need to elect women with proven track records of fighting for women. That's what I've done my entire career – from leading the effort for paid family leave, to ending workplace discrimination, and protecting a woman's right to choose. Now, in Congress, I'm fighting to extend those policies nationwide. Fighting for women isn't just a matter of policy.I'm also working to clear the way for more women to join the movement in Congress. Honored to fight at your side, Val | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

name: Freedom First Project
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | |
---
| | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDY3LTJmMmJkNTk3M2ZlMTRmMWU5M2RiMWIyMjU2ZTA1MjlmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2xwLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvc3VwcmVtZS1jb3VydC1zdXJ2ZXk_c2M9MDA1NjhOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXN1cHJlbWVjb3VydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1CX0FFX0ZGUDM2NTQ4In0/IBViwjIG-TyK5A2Mbz4wvw)
---
| | | Dear Friend,Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation’s highest court: **“My job is to apply the Constitution.”**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDY3LTJmMmJkNTk3M2ZlMTRmMWU5M2RiMWIyMjU2ZTA1MjlmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2xwLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvc3VwcmVtZS1jb3VydC1zdXJ2ZXk_c2M9MDA1NjhOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXN1cHJlbWVjb3VydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1CX0FFX0ZGUDM2NTQ4In0/RCsgZ5WPWnhlEMYTLNR32g)[NO](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDY3LTJmMmJkNTk3M2ZlMTRmMWU5M2RiMWIyMjU2ZTA1MjlmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2xwLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvc3VwcmVtZS1jb3VydC1zdXJ2ZXk_c2M9MDA1NjhOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXN1cHJlbWVjb3VydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1CX0FFX0ZGUDM2NTQ4In0/xTHl2leLma0r1VUJTi4GqA)Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link:**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDY3LTJmMmJkNTk3M2ZlMTRmMWU5M2RiMWIyMjU2ZTA1MjlmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2xwLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvc3VwcmVtZS1jb3VydC1zdXJ2ZXk_c2M9MDA1NjhOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXN1cHJlbWVjb3VydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1CX0FFX0ZGUDM2NTQ4In0/V7hkD1qCG8ypojtdrgnmZw)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states—including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty—featuring issues such as “Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution.”

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** —as we do all of our work—without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work—including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty—depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away—the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDY3LTJmMmJkNTk3M2ZlMTRmMWU5M2RiMWIyMjU2ZTA1MjlmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2xwLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvc3VwcmVtZS1jb3VydC1zdXJ2ZXk_c2M9MDA1NjhOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXN1cHJlbWVjb3VydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1CX0FFX0ZGUDM2NTQ4In0/HPg1GR5xsvebKwc9W1pIZQ)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention—and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDY3LTJmMmJkNTk3M2ZlMTRmMWU5M2RiMWIyMjU2ZTA1MjlmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/yqH4aqqAElJ1bQD_x8HepQ) to unsubscribe.

name: Sean Themea
subject: Who is really failing our students?
body:
Public school unions are failing our students.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5rdg0o917dog2fhs4oh15vqthskatnj89ekg938_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spi64o72c3h2bs)

Friend,

Public school unions are failing our students.

But brave parents, young activists, and legislators are fighting back.

School Choice is sweeping the nation, and Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is at the forefront of the battle.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Sean Themea, Chief of Staff at YAL. _**YAL is the nation 's largest, most active, and most effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty on campus and in American politics. **_

We're waging an aggressive national campaign to help pass School Choice legislation in states across America to ensure that 2023 is the Year of Education Freedom!

One of our key programs involves sending our activists to knock on doors and make phone calls to put pressure on weak-spined politicians.

Our goal this month is to raise $50,000 for our national efforts.

[_**Will you send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount and join YAL 's fight for freedom? **__**Click here**_ _**to rush your gift >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztu814nepcc2b8dthstr5f5i8k4a3f412vlasvfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spi64o72c3h2bs)

The school shutdowns, mask mandates, vaccine mandates, school shootings, and woke curriculum have awoken a sleeping giant: the American Mom and Dad.

Parents throughout the United States have made it clear that they refuse to accept the status quo and are fighting for more educational freedom.

They have pushed back against the establishment and the teachers' unions for the past two years -- and won! Parents have made their voices heard across the country, from local school board races to governor's mansions.

Friend, parents are taking control of their children's education and paving the way for future generations to have better opportunities.

_" We have seen parents from all across the country come together and push for expanded School Choice at Young Americans for Liberty. This week, we have dozens of events happening across the country. **We have deployed door knockers, and we also have members of our Hazlitt Coalition, those liberty-minded legislators who are on the front lines of pushing for expanded educational freedom all across the country,** so the momentum is unlike anything I've seen."_

-- YAL's National School Choice Director Randan Steinhauser

School Choice leads to outcomes like:
* Educational freedom
* Better and safer schools
* More choices and improved outcomes
* Protection of parental rights
* Higher graduation rates

The current school system is little more than a government-run monopoly that stifles competition, innovation, creativity, and freedom.

[_**Help make 2023 the Year of School Choice in America. Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zunmvgr0tkc9j21oepe2hsbqm4v3op7b0r77ni3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spi64o72c3h2bs)

YAL has already contributed to School Choice victories. In Iowa, our Hazlitt Coalition of pro-liberty legislators and student activists made sure that legislators made no bad amendments to this universal School Choice bill.

And we're continuing the fight for universal School Choice in states like Idaho, Texas, Ohio, South Carolina, Arkansas, Missouri, Indiana, Georgia, South Dakota, Montana, Alabama, Kentucky, Tennessee, Oklahoma, and Florida!

**YAL is waging a war against teacher unions and their corrupt allies in the Department of Education. Can you join the fight today, Friend?**

Click any link below to help meet our goal of raising $50,000 this month to fuel our national efforts:

[_**Donate $10**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2t1hqnl47l266ere9a5enjpibhfu65sa5c6idi8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spi64o72c3h2bs)
[**_Donate $35
Donate $50_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7js59r36f1nu31upnnlog7cgbgsfq2velr467qo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spi64o72c3h2bs)
[**_Donate $100_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0rha0bu99q6a05m4ck5pj1pr421m519ig2m79k8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spi64o72c3h2bs)
[**_Donate $250_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpbjhvio1mbj2qialft5j594kmkrde0r4821q2n8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spi64o72c3h2bs)
[**_Donate $500_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbfigb0ghojgani182nbj1ah7rsnbm7mimpld7c8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spi64o72c3h2bs)
[**_Donate $1,000_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znkjsl2k7u466tqvkksaifcrftvoulip7qpoupt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spi64o72c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjkf4khn7ri5484vq80fgb46pkvbr5nm11o401og_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spi64o72c3h2bs)
[**_Donate Any Amount_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu6iaiein53e19eip4u704uqujn3qv9gdqdnof3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spi64o72c3h2bs)

Thank you for your support and for helping to make liberty win!

Sincerely,

Sean Themea
CEO
Young Americans for Liberty, Inc.

_Young Americans for Liberty, Inc. is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. No goods or services are given in exchange for any contribution._

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdt6i36b3u0dqj0kjph2ic5j4res34ln5dksghm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spi64o72c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

How do you eliminate trillions of dollars of debt, my friend? Glenn's common sense solution is simple: **stop reckless, out-of-control spending** and **cut taxes**. Joe Biden wants to do the opposite... _**and completely ignore Congress and the Constitution!**_ __**Here's the scoop** :__ Late last year, Biden signed an executive order to "cancel" major portions of U.S. student loan debt by transferring the burden to taxpayers. Peter, it’s a simple fact: countries have borders, and if you don’t enforce them, you don’t have a country. We MUST empower our Border Patrol Agents with the necessary resources, hold illegal immigrants accountable for breaking the law, and most importantly BUILD THE WALL! | | | | We lock our doors at night because we love the people on the inside, not because we hate the people on the outside. If we want to take back the House in 2024, then we must win this race. We’re committed to ensuring Dave has the resources he needs to win – but we’ll need your help. = | | = From backing common-sense gun reforms to taking action against domestic violence, Dave Min is focused on doing what’s right for his community. Dave’s public service experience and people-first priorities stand out in the field. In Congress, he’ll continue fighting for California families. That’s why we couldn’t be prouder to back Dave in his congressional run! = Thanks, Democrats Serve | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Democrats Serve, DemocratsServe.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. | =

| | | A number of documents were released from the Dominion lawsuit against Fox, and here's what we've learned: \- Tucker Carlson "passionately hates" Donald Trump
\- Tucker and the other Fox talking heads KNEW the 2020 election "big lie" was BS but pushed it anyway
\- The top leaders at Fox also knew this, but did nothing to stop it **But there's a lot more we don't know:** _" Fox lawyers redacted the documents extensively, leaving much of what people said to one another under seal. The New York Times and several other media outlets are challenging the legality of those redactions."_ ([NYT](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec46761a-6e36-480c-8aa5-b76fed139c1a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)) What else is Fox hiding? body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|

| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?

| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e6d456a0b6f74e4ca2d8aa73da73f078&_e=yUiDvjEhq7Vzgu3nukse93D4LQLffI_v5cdj_HLvX_mtv42tsvvsGiuGZViB5XzNGxzol-4eN6fvCkp41EakaJeCfqXsYLcToT307Fi_Fgxlte2iuIgm7qpb2FJ9V7-BEaJR4RSpGa__8nR4JJOm2Bkjy5B0r3JN-UbNLLXWjQ5N_cwBKcqx5oa_zKbo7DYp7-p2Ec5FT2AWedO6ghPdAf5ifGhjiUr3aMRMn0uxOu9aEuWa--c4bsfWIOZ7TBYZRuEJYmotU8-kjk8BmenPekPOUE6ynDtG3CejDnc0WcVYtb0nTofP0jlysuQU0PZJZAVQRdFdn6RGFibYlCJU7Ezw-V2LV_52xAkZAY2NQHvJJCpwzLp3f8ISbETPjU_xQms02iwjKYFstZL-O6gYRse3VZv8mvs4Dm5hWjKD0OygmfLJg737MJgX4KOpXyGo "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e6d456a0b6f74e4ca2d8aa73da73f078&_e=yUiDvjEhq7Vzgu3nukse93D4LQLffI_v5cdj_HLvX_mtv42tsvvsGiuGZViB5XzNGxzol-4eN6fvCkp41EakaJeCfqXsYLcToT307Fi_Fgxlte2iuIgm7qpb2FJ9V7-BEaJR4RSpGa__8nR4JJOm2Bkjy5B0r3JN-UbNLLXWjQ5N_cwBKcqx5oa_zKbo7DYp7-p2Ec5FT2AWedO6ghPdAf5ifGhjiUr3aMRMn0uxOu9aEuWa--c4bsfWIOZ7TBYZRuEJYmotU8-kjk8BmenPekPOUE6ynDtG3CejDnc0WcVScoLStKO_xz3Ckyeq7yhlu_aGNNWQ-vEVGSFvCyy_JL-ViDjLJksnuFh0dsIICUmvy_uHE3tIXrk1EPLd7A1lSdOxg9LeW_zpVpPXq0uKqxpgKo4R_wTm4ppfZnwfRB3kej6WsUkC-KkEEItAN1Vk "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e6d456a0b6f74e4ca2d8aa73da73f078&_e=yUiDvjEhq7Vzgu3nukse93D4LQLffI_v5cdj_HLvX_mtv42tsvvsGiuGZViB5XzNGxzol-4eN6fvCkp41EakaJeCfqXsYLcToT307Fi_Fgxlte2iuIgm7qpb2FJ9V7-BEaJR4RSpGa__8nR4JJOm2Bkjy5B0r3JN-UbNLLXWjQ5N_cwBKcqx5oa_zKbo7DYp7-p2Ec5FT2AWedO6ghPdAf5ifGhjiUr3aMRMn0uxOu9aEuWa--c4bsfWIOZ7TBYZRuEJYmotU8-kjk8BmenPekPOUE6ynDtG3CejDnc0WcV6L4JjCqYDhoK_PbISo6-Qv8v1_GJomPJzVt1BPwjvwg8X3hF8fqXz0Dz2Sb1CoSfQl9aYzOgGcPj90cIEPM5Q_W1zeGDJP2EH-1gvUagrXWWHxkWWsVkBdtzrQe7LrLDebDchL4pAExY12hqqk1RX "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")

You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e6d456a0b6f74e4ca2d8aa73da73f078&_e=yUiDvjEhq7Vzgu3nukse93D4LQLffI_v5cdj_HLvX_mtv42tsvvsGiuGZViB5XzNGxzol-4eN6fvCkp41EakaJeCfqXsYLcToT307Fi_Fgxlte2iuIgm7qpb2FJ9V7-BEaJR4RSpGa__8nR4JJOm2Bkjy5B0r3JN-UbNLLXWjQ5N_cwBKcqx5oa_zKbo7DYp7-p2Ec5FT2AWedO6ghPdAf5ifGhjiUr3aMRMn0uxOu9aEuWa--c4bsfWIOZ7TBYZRuEJYmotU8-kjk8BmenPekPOUE6ynDtG3CejDnc0WcUJMuJGG9LGpeN6L7x2gqLO3FYNIvcKSV7uOdWk7K0dL1Le2LIwVyqDzL2ANXPSbPCX3b6uHK0VSCUHZjzZl4Rde6-CV9ZUHJJNQFTKVmbpA5NdeojuFGI2aljmEq3RfY_irPTLXLiOYoWy8xUAfNdn "Renew your membership before it’s too late >>>")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Date: Tues, Dec 20, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e6d456a0b6f74e4ca2d8aa73da73f078&_e=yUiDvjEhq7Vzgu3nukse93D4LQLffI_v5cdj_HLvX_mtv42tsvvsGiuGZViB5XzNGxzol-4eN6fvCkp41EakaJeCfqXsYLcToT307Fi_Fgxlte2iuIgm7qpb2FJ9V7-BEaJR4RSpGa__8nR4JJOm2Bkjy5B0r3JN-UbNLLXWjQ5N_cwBKcqx5oa_zKbo7DYp7-p2Ec5FT2AWedO6ghPdAf5ifGhjiUr3aMRMn0uxOu9aEuWa--c4bsfWIOZ7TBYZRuEJYmotU8-kjk8BmenPekPOUE6ynDtG3CejDnc0WcUu3HEgqmbh9aDjbeYorjXdUDnRTfas70R1PLXquCMR_0Mt7TNBlaoTdF1S8UcnZTX9H_Bf8HHFg9WHORmG5mhoQhWQe2pEfOnyxRQZkXe9wZaTXWj2kUhfulVKvH9uF-nXq6wX5kFUtH2f52gyv6du "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

body:
Five short years ago, we made history. Now it's time to do it again. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59868392/395345080/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2ZkZDlmNC1kOGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5AOCj6XEdKu0xRov_KsDLooTszfw07nTv24CeUjN9xI=&emci=1d2acf0f-19bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=7cfdd9f4-d8bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=8943725) Peter,

It's hard to believe that just five short years ago, there were **NO** women representing Pennsylvania in Congress — a century after women in our nation had won the right to vote.

That ended in 2018 when people like you helped make history by electing Susan Wild, Chrissy Houlahan, Mary Gay Scanlon, and Madeleine Dean to Congress. Four years later, Summer Lee joined them in Washington to become the first Black woman ever to represent Pennsylvania in Congress. Republicans continue to try and erase all of that progress, spending millions to distort their records and air baseless attacks.

This Women's History Month, I'm asking you to build on the progress we made in the last three elections and prove to more women that if they step up and run, they'll have our support to fight against a never-ending barrage of Republican smears.

[**Will you help Susan Wild, Summer Lee, Chrissy Houlahan, Mary Gay Scanlon, and Madeleine Dean win in November and make sure women have a voice in Congress? Chip in now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59868393/395345081/-1956074562?refcode=em23_230308_PAWmn_fndt_gq_act___bc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230308_PAWmn_fndt_gq_act___bc_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=7cfdd9f4-d8bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2ZkZDlmNC1kOGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5AOCj6XEdKu0xRov_KsDLooTszfw07nTv24CeUjN9xI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59868394/395345082/-1956074562?refcode=em23_230308_PAWmn_fndt_gq_act___bc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230308_PAWmn_fndt_gq_act___bc_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=7cfdd9f4-d8bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&express_lane=true&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2ZkZDlmNC1kOGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5AOCj6XEdKu0xRov_KsDLooTszfw07nTv24CeUjN9xI=)

clean_body: Five short years ago, we made history. Now it's time to do it again. Peter, It's hard to believe that just five short years ago, there were NO women representing Pennsylvania in Congress — a century after women in our nation had won the right to vote. That ended in 2018 when people like you helped make history by electing Susan Wild, Chrissy Houlahan, Mary Gay Scanlon, and Madeleine Dean to Congress. Four years later, Summer Lee joined them in Washington to become the first Black woman ever to represent Pennsylvania in Congress. Republicans continue to try and erase all of that progress, spending millions to distort their records and air baseless attacks. This Women's History Month, I'm asking you to build on the progress we made in the last three elections and prove to more women that if they step up and run, they'll have our support to fight against a never-ending barrage of Republican smears. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Despite the progress our nation has made since the right to vote was won, women continue to be underpaid, overworked, underrepresented, and harassed in the workplace. Electing and supporting women who step up and run for Congress is essential to closing the wage gap, ending workplace harassment, stopping violence against women, and more. If we maintain our commitment to support Susan, Mary, Summer, Madeleine, and Chrissy as they come under attack from Trump allies, national Republicans, and corporate special interests, we'll be able to recruit even more women to run — and win. = Thank you, Bob If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC. Bob Casey for Senate PO Box 58746 Philadelphia, PA 19102 United States

name: Team Schrier
subject: The fight for women's equality continues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
International Women's Day is celebrated across the globe to honor the social, economic, cultural, and political achievements of women. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59869422/395348665/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzViZTUwZi1kYmJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UQbzgdoD6ogNigOAztULgG9B7zFqm7dYHvcqY_1ggQ4=&emci=1807b8ed-2cbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c75be50f-dbbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)

Happy International Women's Day, Peter!

Over a century ago, women marched in the streets to demand the right to vote, better working conditions, and increased pay. Since then, International Women's Day has been celebrated across the globe to honor the social, economic, cultural, and political achievements of women.

Since the first celebration of International Women's Day, we've made great progress for women's equality. But we still have a lot of work to do.

Last year, the Supreme Court overturned the landmark _Roe v. Wade_ decision – stripping millions of women of the right to make their own personal reproductive health care decisions. Now, Republicans in Congress want to go even further. They've already passed two anti-abortion measures and want to pass a national abortion ban.

As a doctor, Kim knows that deeply personal reproductive health care decisions should be made between a patient and her doctor only. That's why she's standing up against any attack on women's reproductive rights and fighting for women's equality.

**[On this International Women's Day, will you make a monthly donation to Kim's campaign to help keep her in Congress fighting for women's equality? Anything you can give each month will help us build another winning campaign so we can defend her seat and retake the House with a pro-choice majority →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59869423/395348666/-242852182?refcode=em23_230308_IWD_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230308_IWD_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=c75be50f-dbbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzViZTUwZi1kYmJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UQbzgdoD6ogNigOAztULgG9B7zFqm7dYHvcqY_1ggQ4=)** | [MAKE A MONTHLY DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59869424/395348667/-242852182?refcode=em23_230308_IWD_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230308_IWD_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=c75be50f-dbbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzViZTUwZi1kYmJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UQbzgdoD6ogNigOAztULgG9B7zFqm7dYHvcqY_1ggQ4=)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Will Kyrsten Sinema run for reelection to the Senate? We have to raise resources in the expectation she will. The likeliest Republican candidate is democracy-attacking fascist, Kari Lake, who’s expressed interest in the race for Arizona’s Senate seat … even though she has yet to admit she lost the 2022 governor’s race. Meanwhile, a great Democrat, Ruben Gallego is running. He’s asking for support.
body:
Arizona Senate up for grabs
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb2834b55-8f14-484e-b0bb-c10d326e9af2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, did you get a chance to read about this race? **As the nature of the 2024 races start to clear up a bit, one thing has become even more crystal clear: We must elect Ruben Gallego to the U.S. Senate seat in Arizona.** _We do not yet know if turncoat Kyrsten Sinema is going to run, but we have to raise resources in the expectation she will. And on the other side is democracy-attacking fascist, Kari Lake, who has expressed interest in this race even though she has yet to admit she lost the last one._ [**Can you please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to this "Marine, Latino...with a record of standing up for working people." He's what we always wish our Senators would be.** ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3f6d653e-9f26-44b6-93ff-8ee97729de1b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _I can tell you why Ruben Gallego is great, as I've done before_ , but I'll let him tell you about himself. This is from a recent email of his: _Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.

I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my family was dirt poor. So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.

I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party switch. I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race...doesn’t matter.

The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there. And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right._
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td7986703-030c-43b4-ab56-9ddbcce1b721/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_We have an exceptional candidate who's progressive as hell in a swing state, Arizona, turning blue. If Gallego does great in 2024, so will President Biden. The President must win this state, one of his closest contests in '20, and Gallego must win if we're to hold our Senate majority._** [**So can you please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to this "Marine, Latino...with a record of standing up for working people." He's what we always wish our Senators would be.** ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taef68ea1-9cae-44c8-bd62-418361c03f30/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thanks for fighting for a great candidate and a great person,** Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T77e31c89-b902-44f2-b1a3-600ac9e1e364/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/rubengallegomarch3-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T956631b2-6922-4585-9cde-189ce1e9b763/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ae-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ae-email]
Friend,

| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b233093635ba4e2ea9184ba0f5ea58ff&_e=4xZk1t70uAfNtMJ2o2ZDJH7PC5z76471W5ghX4vC6WJ0tGEMpBmWang1K1Bb-SeD_E1ZbkK9mifKKJxHhnywqJUmr_ZnwgdADcq1gVuQDEx0LBSi8LYn_POm9tNpKoB-4otBfvS_fErAru1NG7ZsgjghYObvm_dTBIhgjOOoRSw9sA-O3qJWbLdi_3Gz962JNFrJckot6guE8lvw9OUuhAbamnEDNN9bRg7tb8axmnN5MWTtK7Nif6--S-K_SnwIzNAL5gpQ1e1Ci6zZ9Uc-5qyEnW4A4gZfFDtUz5fWigSwd3vQJnKOLH2dfJFXDj8Wvlt-91M9LjX0HRUzuxC0tSuzCjr0fsiRBfNG1hLnB-q90HvpoW_qDFdaMBiR3jiFbfz-MqyAba4UtU3SOIQC_Dqhw80-iWYW4XbOSJU4nzGAnAJfA5xg8Cu862WyYYPQ)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans-that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b233093635ba4e2ea9184ba0f5ea58ff&_e=4xZk1t70uAfNtMJ2o2ZDJH7PC5z76471W5ghX4vC6WJ0tGEMpBmWang1K1Bb-SeD_E1ZbkK9mifKKJxHhnywqJUmr_ZnwgdADcq1gVuQDEx0LBSi8LYn_POm9tNpKoB-4otBfvS_fErAru1NG7ZsgjghYObvm_dTBIhgjOOoRSw9sA-O3qJWbLdi_3Gz962JNFrJckot6guE8lvw9OUuhAbamnEDNN9bRg7tb8axmnN5MWTtK7Nif6--S-K_SnwIzNAL5gpQ1e1Ci6zZ9Uc-5iSl46SujEoPWGMlLu2swSVylfJ5IxfMbsA0OUZUxB0917mjuhHFgCvP0jRWqlm2x1-BBHwjp76Pp3rDtAkhJ6aBSXs--joxvTW9BKA2fXgZ8uFb-CEDel7XZHYlxZwdBhYzUs9UnzrYF2M6Nj7fDW1IvyuLs1vgcnJOT-oxr9Ke)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b233093635ba4e2ea9184ba0f5ea58ff&_e=4xZk1t70uAfNtMJ2o2ZDJH7PC5z76471W5ghX4vC6WJ0tGEMpBmWang1K1Bb-SeD_E1ZbkK9mifKKJxHhnywqJUmr_ZnwgdADcq1gVuQDEx0LBSi8LYn_POm9tNpKoB-4otBfvS_fErAru1NG7ZsgjghYObvm_dTBIhgjOOoRSw9sA-O3qJWbLdi_3Gz962JNFrJckot6guE8lvw9OUuhAbamnEDNN9bRg7tb8axmnN5MWTtK7Nif6--S-K_SnwIzNAL5gpQ1e1Ci6zZ9Uc-5jQsZWFISp68GgbPW5DuL30mCphgjYGlzlFLIWDTN57MvxzBclIMhNdjJrMDULhf5Bz567vBQztUYPRyxjgtmy4q7LETnwXY6j9hywwS5Qkgi7Pjtisc_rsTI6TIT5Kai89YI5mhQFLP5ssgfIgWmip5SZrnFc2zcZznB2tq_M5B)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b233093635ba4e2ea9184ba0f5ea58ff&_e=4xZk1t70uAfNtMJ2o2ZDJH7PC5z76471W5ghX4vC6WJ0tGEMpBmWang1K1Bb-SeD_E1ZbkK9mifKKJxHhnywqJUmr_ZnwgdADcq1gVuQDEx0LBSi8LYn_POm9tNpKoB-4otBfvS_fErAru1NG7ZsgjghYObvm_dTBIhgjOOoRSw9sA-O3qJWbLdi_3Gz962JNFrJckot6guE8lvw9OUuhAbamnEDNN9bRg7tb8axmnN5MWTtK7Nif6--S-K_SnwIzNAL5gpQ1e1Ci6zZ9Uc-5kkjNSKhjMAUl_z3Wi5kwBWDmGE0DDWaCLMwUy19B1ZPzTmQLurr5vSyhVgyLceBdYx_Sy9OpF172ukaa-KrDZu9m5SEgEOZnYD1gg3nCfJSqL3v4qUmzBdjl9BUor13OpsyLNbKxn8cZv2N1QXhVC5YRrMeZU6Lp5ob0BaE1ZLB)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b233093635ba4e2ea9184ba0f5ea58ff&_e=4xZk1t70uAfNtMJ2o2ZDJH7PC5z76471W5ghX4vC6WJ0tGEMpBmWang1K1Bb-SeD_E1ZbkK9mifKKJxHhnywqJUmr_ZnwgdADcq1gVuQDEx0LBSi8LYn_POm9tNpKoB-4otBfvS_fErAru1NG7ZsgjghYObvm_dTBIhgjOOoRSw9sA-O3qJWbLdi_3Gz962JNFrJckot6guE8lvw9OUuhAbamnEDNN9bRg7tb8axmnN5MWTtK7Nif6--S-K_SnwIzNAL5gpQ1e1Ci6zZ9Uc-5gl4cWluKaw9pO92OPrsrhQdAjmNczQwFFH2WLeidLY9DtXZF4v391vSx9HLMoBTBWUDhDy7zhFUF40Ho9_6LW81OeYb1BU5IUfY3TsYaKDzZnjiwpfxbkb_xdp1RIy2nan3QU0JkNxkSRsPbqqjsiw2vLbYYo22QXMLKt_4XLSz)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I'm looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream. | Fellow American, I am sending you a different type of political email - mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign. When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans-that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream. I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, but that won't work if we stay united. How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement. For The American Dream, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Adam Schiff
subject: “The times have found us”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| As the former Speaker is fond of saying, “the times have found us.” But again and again, the times have found her — and our country has reaped the benefits.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1910%2E5257348%2Ep2WE6Z)
Derek —
March is Women’s History Month — our chance to celebrate the women who have made our country and our democracy what it is today, and whose commitment to progress drives us forward.
No one embodies those virtues more than my good friend **Nancy Pelosi.**
As the former Speaker is fond of saying, “the times have found us.” But again and again, the times have found her — and our country has reaped the benefits.
Speaker Pelosi is the most effective legislative leader in a generation. She ensured _tens of millions_ more Americans would have the health care they deserve. She was instrumental in passing legislation like the _Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act_ , bolstering protections against pay discrimination. She helped pass the most significant investment in climate action in history, and one of the most substantial investments in infrastructure in ages. And she held the former President accountable for his attempts to wreak havoc on our democracy — even in the face of relentless right-wing smears and attacks.
On top of all that, the former Speaker has paved the way for the next generation of leadership — encouraging countless folks to run for office (myself included!). The 118th Congress is our most diverse to date, and Nancy Pelosi’s efforts have a lot to do with that.
I hope you’ll join me in celebrating her — and all the women who have made America a more perfect Union!
Thanks,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20230308_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=1910%2E5257348%2Ep2WE6Z)

Bad news: Trump-crony Dan Kelly is officially on the ballot for Wisconsin’s Supreme Court. | | |

| | **Bad news: Trump-crony Dan Kelly is officially on the ballot for Wisconsin’s Supreme Court.** In case you don’t know, Kelly is an election denier who:
* Is anti-abortion access and anti-gun safety.
* Worked as a “special counsel” for Wisconsin Republicans, aiding their attempts to overturn the results of the 2020 election with their fake electors scheme.
* Was endorsed by Trump during his last run for a seat on the court in 2020.

**If he wins, he’ll be a rubber stamp on the Wisconsin GOP’s extreme, right-wing agenda.** This race could have pivotal consequences for state Democrats – it could give us a chance to un-gerrymander Wisconsin. **And with fair maps, Democrats could have their best shot in _over a decade_ to gain power in the state’s legislature.** But state-level races are overlooked and underfunded – making them especially vulnerable to Republicans’ outsized spending. **Right now, Republicans are _pouring_ money into Wisconsin ahead of next month’s Supreme Court election, so we need to mobilize around state Democrats _now._** [Will you chip in $7 today to build Democratic power in state legislatures and defeat Trumpist Republicans in states like Wisconsin and across the country?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrq1lFR55S3_Ci6S1MgB3mG3iGvTw42xXLFgubytchMBtXcQuSlEV3p1KEVvB-s81JdOQ_XR5n8mq5SsEPoFvG-pwNl8XYf2S80Xn3so27PoDtenmagagiiVKPBLmUSHMDFexbULRAdm9fiKyjXKqPwVwAvjgC0xic8F-f3U8R7nz89FBSesBCIfI7JMbdKv0UMznxhzn1fc6Oql78jRy6pLKZ6UkZTIv6Fnxg-Lp1hhhLDhAqxYLnDqttVHD9nQMRJO1bV__9zeJnppyRpntVpWdPkIpSfnJb7eXbbHCMjKIGY1anATu2IYf4svugavHpnkHfQlEy0NOeVeOlDh5jYEzQ6mtspZFvwYJNZ5TBkUcrt45hgmF0WaMeFtQeN1W8PwZJtq-HLaMgCVPsFcgGDA/3ub/ZgYChOE8SsWdbxvZLEQ2oQ/h0/uDF0PPII8BR1oMxBKMYLOTL9yqHV2JUBSlvOsK3Y6j8) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Wisconsin state Republicans are nothing short of extremists – passing laws that threaten our rights, freedoms, and democracy. **And now, with ultra-conservative candidate Dan Kelly on the ballot for a seat on Wisconsin’s Supreme Court, their extremism could go unchecked – we can’t let that happen.**
By building our Democratic power in statehouses, we can defend our democracy and fight against GOP attacks on our elections, abortion access, and LGBTQ+ rights. But we can’t win against Republican extremists without the support of grassroots Democrats like you.

Peter, Eric Sorensen here. It's been an eventful couple of months in Congress, so I wanted to take a moment to hit pause and share some of the recent highlights. It's important to me that you're kept in the loop with what we're up to. I hope you enjoy these occasional updates, and if you have any questions or concerns, feel free to respond to this email directly. **Probably my favorite highlight from the past month was meeting with _May I Community Outreach_ \-- a Peoria-based organization led by ‘Coach’ Carl Holloway. **This group is doing incredible work to keep disadvantaged youth off the streets by offering a safe place to spend time and get fed in the after school hours. We heard heartbreaking stories about how often the kids Coach Holloway serves go hungry. We need more Coach Carls who are making sure our kids are fed, taken care of, and safe from gun violence.
---

---
_Hanging out with ‘Coach’ Carl Holloway_
---
Our team is helping _May I Community Outreach_ with the federal grant process to secure funding that will allow them to scale throughout Peoria and help more kids. I’ll never forget, near the end of our meeting, Coach Carl asked me _“So what do you get out of this?”_ I looked at him and said “Nothing, this is my job!” **Last month I was appointed to the Committees on Agriculture and Space, Science, & Technology.** I am using my background as a meteorologist and science communicator to advocate for family farmers in Central and Northwest Illinois. That means making sure our country is continuing to lead on technology and innovation. I was also honored to be named the ranking member on the Space subcommittee! **Our team continued Cheri Bustos’ long-running tradition of delivering Valentines for Veterans.** Students from across the district submitted over 1,000 Valentines, and I went on the road to deliver them to four veterans’ centers across the district. It was fantastic to spend time with our ultimate heroes, the ones who’ve given so much to our community.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: What I’m thinking about this International Women’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Today’s a chance to celebrate the trailblazers who’ve made so much progress, and it also calls on us to keep up the fight. That’s exactly what I’m going to do. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59892187/395399914/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ12A_HOL_E_20230308_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGFiZjg4OC0wOGJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dsJ9qvrMfvk6xRYFYtbWvxcLAb479B2J8w68MyE0Kw8=&emci=453eda82-08be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=80abf888-08be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908)
---
It’s International Women’s Day, and I’m thinking about the brave champions who’ve shown us how we can tackle all the righteous fights that lie ahead. American history is chock-full of powerful examples. If you’ve got a minute, I’d like to run through just a few of them. **Phillis Wheatley** , the first Black woman to publish a book of poetry in America — her imaginative power inspired leaders like George Washington, and she had to stand tall against attacks on her intellect and integrity. **Black washerwomen in Atlanta** who formed a union and went on strike in 1881, less than two decades after the end of enslavement — they won higher wages and inspired more workers to fight for economic justice. **Women at the Everett Mill in Lawrence, Massachusetts** who went on strike in 1912 — they defeated big businesses, won higher wages, and sparked a movement that increased the pay of hundreds of thousands of other textile workers throughout New England. **Frances Perkins** , who was driven to keep fighting for workers after witnessing the Triangle Shirtwaist Factory Fire, where 146 workers (mostly women, mostly immigrants) died in unsafe conditions — she helped pass landmark safety measures and labor laws, became the first woman to serve in the Cabinet, and helped create programs like Social Security as FDR’s Secretary of Labor. **Latina janitors in Los Angeles** who launched a campaign in the 1980s for higher wages, better benefits, and a seat at the negotiating table — they captured the nation’s attention, mobilized a wide range of allies, took on global corporations, and won. **By channeling their determination, we can persist in making the change we need to make. We can call out injustice, and we can fight back.** **And we’ve got plenty of fights on our hands.** Too many women still don’t get equal pay for equal work. Too many women are still locked out of the workforce and denied opportunity because they can’t find quality, affordable child care. Too many women have to choose between taking care of their families and putting food on the table because we still don’t guarantee paid family leave as a nation. Too many trans women — particularly trans women of color — face discrimination and have to live in fear of violence just for being who they are. And for the first time in over half a century, we’re celebrating International Women’s Day in a country that doesn’t protect the right to an abortion nationwide. **So today’s a chance to celebrate the trailblazers who’ve made so much progress, and it also calls on us to keep up the fight. That’s exactly what I’m going to do.** Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | [**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59892188/395399915/-65073031?amount=3&refcode=EMZ12A_HOL_E_20230308_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGFiZjg4OC0wOGJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dsJ9qvrMfvk6xRYFYtbWvxcLAb479B2J8w68MyE0Kw8=)

clean_body: Today’s a chance to celebrate the trailblazers who’ve made so much progress, and it also calls on us to keep up the fight. That’s exactly what I’m going to do. | | | It’s International Women’s Day, and I’m thinking about the brave champions who’ve shown us how we can tackle all the righteous fights that lie ahead. American history is chock-full of powerful examples. If you’ve got a minute, I’d like to run through just a few of them. Phillis Wheatley , the first Black woman to publish a book of poetry in America — her imaginative power inspired leaders like George Washington, and she had to stand tall against attacks on her intellect and integrity. Black washerwomen in Atlanta who formed a union and went on strike in 1881, less than two decades after the end of enslavement — they won higher wages and inspired more workers to fight for economic justice. Women at the Everett Mill in Lawrence, Massachusetts who went on strike in 1912 — they defeated big businesses, won higher wages, and sparked a movement that increased the pay of hundreds of thousands of other textile workers throughout New England. Frances Perkins , who was driven to keep fighting for workers after witnessing the Triangle Shirtwaist Factory Fire, where 146 workers (mostly women, mostly immigrants) died in unsafe conditions — she helped pass landmark safety measures and labor laws, became the first woman to serve in the Cabinet, and helped create programs like Social Security as FDR’s Secretary of Labor. Latina janitors in Los Angeles who launched a campaign in the 1980s for higher wages, better benefits, and a seat at the negotiating table — they captured the nation’s attention, mobilized a wide range of allies, took on global corporations, and won. By channeling their determination, we can persist in making the change we need to make. We can call out injustice, and we can fight back. And we’ve got plenty of fights on our hands. Too many women still don’t get equal pay for equal work. Too many women are still locked out of the workforce and denied opportunity because they can’t find quality, affordable child care. Too many women have to choose between taking care of their families and putting food on the table because we still don’t guarantee paid family leave as a nation. Too many trans women — particularly trans women of color — face discrimination and have to live in fear of violence just for being who they are. And for the first time in over half a century, we’re celebrating International Women’s Day in a country that doesn’t protect the right to an abortion nationwide. So today’s a chance to celebrate the trailblazers who’ve made so much progress, and it also calls on us to keep up the fight. That’s exactly what I’m going to do. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2023 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

| Dear Peter,

Did you read my Parental Bill of Rights?

As a member of the Committee on Education and the Workforce, I am thrilled to announce that I have recently signed onto the Parents Bill of Rights as a cosponsor. This proposal seeks to promote children’s well-being and success by empowering parents and ensuring they have a seat at the table in their child’s education.

| Friend
Republicans are leading the way in the House, and their next priority is restoring American energy independence!
We've spent trillions investing in our oil and gas infrastructure, but that hasn't stopped Biden from canceling projects and releasing millions of gallons of crucial strategic reserves.
Friend unless we get back to America FIRST, we'll always be indebted to foreign powers who are hell-bent on taking advantage of our nation.

| Republicans have been working to stop the shutdowns for years now. They've worked with energy experts to introduce common-sense solutions, but they've ALL been shot down. Here are five things that energy independence could accomplish for America:

* Establish a future of growth for the U.S. economy
* Grow thousands of good-paying jobs for hard-working Americans
* Lower gas and utility bills
* Ensure we are independent of foreign nations
* Lower the National Debt

And that's just the start! If we want to preserve American freedom, we must guarantee that we can meet our own energy needs!
Kat is done listening to Biden's far-Left agenda. She's standing up to put energy independence first in Congress. If you're with her, [pledge your support and help Kat restore American Energy today! >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013gX-S3e68C8RoGo0Dhua8yL5QlF2HpQBiwYUZeVKgmT3KS_mhmQ035_0CTSyzAUaFdwNv44unp0h42UsNQ5NiLyBzcMvLzBR_5xp7yvnUOKvt03HhPYHY47a4EvGVchv8r81XnwYK0mZ0eu_D7mSqdw2bMyfGcFMvu7_dy4PPiLaG38rqnruOnd6Nf8wFecl9T-MmzRgI9cU-iKJO3eufg==&c=-YlUy87kyH1y60PLl1gJ8B3jnNx0A2Iz4EiFjrBbHJkgwCdpb8YJyg==&ch=rwl7npAD4xqgLhOzV5DPw3tD6bj0of4dnIPxuLnpimHIhACKEfV8TQ==)

clean_body: | | | | == | Friend Republicans are leading the way in the House, and their next priority is restoring American energy independence! We've spent trillions investing in our oil and gas infrastructure, but that hasn't stopped Biden from canceling projects and releasing millions of gallons of crucial strategic reserves. Friend unless we get back to America FIRST, we'll always be indebted to foreign powers who are hell-bent on taking advantage of our nation. | | == == | Republicans have been working to stop the shutdowns for years now. They've worked with energy experts to introduce common-sense solutions, but they've ALL been shot down. Here are five things that energy independence could accomplish for America: Establish a future of growth for the U.S. economy Grow thousands of good-paying jobs for hard-working Americans Lower gas and utility bills Ensure we are independent of foreign nations * Lower the National Debt And that's just the start! If we want to preserve American freedom, we must guarantee that we can meet our own energy needs! Kat is done listening to Biden's far-Left agenda. She's standing up to put energy independence first in Congress. If you're with her, == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | For America, Team Cammack | | == | == == == | | | | | | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | == Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59873635/395354625/-1392034954?refcode=X_030823_Frisch_Tandem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDBhNDMzYy1kZmJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c5dNiWkP57SuOK6FBvbiOJISbOqgtCxtV87R46OZwrI=) **** Hello, Well, it didn’t take long. **The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from her national Republican allies began.** It’s no mystery why: Last year, I lost to Boebert by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. And unless they lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win in 2024. Here’s the thing, though. I’m not running to represent myself like Boebert. I’m not going to be a part of the circus in Washington. I’m running because the people of Western and Southern Colorado deserve someone in Congress who will wake up every day ready to work for them and their families – not corporate PAC donors. I’m ready to put forward a positive vision for our district and our country, but I need your help to make sure we don’t get drowned out by Boebert’s lies. **We’ve set a goal of getting 25,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to win, but right now we’re still short. subject: Women’s History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59875222/395356000/1328194270?refcode=EM_NBI_BWC_20230308_PT_NA_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_NA_WomensHistoryMonth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWRjMzU0Yy1lMGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ejnmiI0CfzbtZRR4bqpdxKUjVRU1QM9D4zcZgwzavLc=&emci=82219962-dbbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=5edc354c-e0bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=30096098) | March is Women’s History Month, and there’s no better way to commemorate the vital role of women in our nation’s history than by staying involved.

Despite the reversal of _Roe v. Wade_ , women across our nation are standing up to ensure their rights — and I’m with them every step of the way. As the co-chair of the Congressional Caucus on Black Women and Girls, I believe structural injustice is what we need to tackle for women to flourish in our nation.

[If you stand with me, sign your name today to address the unequal division of power and resources between women and men.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59875224/395356002/-8410732?refcode=EM_NBI_BWC_20230308_PT_NA_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_NA_WomensHistoryMonth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWRjMzU0Yy1lMGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ejnmiI0CfzbtZRR4bqpdxKUjVRU1QM9D4zcZgwzavLc=&emci=82219962-dbbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=5edc354c-e0bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=30096098) [SIGN MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59875226/395356004/-8410732?refcode=EM_NBI_BWC_20230308_PT_NA_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_NA_WomensHistoryMonth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWRjMzU0Yy1lMGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ejnmiI0CfzbtZRR4bqpdxKUjVRU1QM9D4zcZgwzavLc=&emci=82219962-dbbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=5edc354c-e0bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=30096098) Women play many roles in our economy, and yet structural barriers and inequities continue to hinder them from meaningful participation. [Add your name today if you think there shouldn’t be any structural injustice between women and men>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59875227/395356005/-8410732?refcode=EM_NBI_BWC_20230308_PT_NA_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_NA_WomensHistoryMonth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWRjMzU0Yy1lMGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ejnmiI0CfzbtZRR4bqpdxKUjVRU1QM9D4zcZgwzavLc=&emci=82219962-dbbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=5edc354c-e0bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=30096098)

Bonnie
