| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4838f69d36cf4d8593ce8810b3ff475c&_e=NYfB6GoE7WIOAzflCSz9dJejWQn6UKNIPG8uXk9vBJrNtbNWvYS29r60JnrFuhkb7ZwQk_AutXk78HfwZ9q7EesTo_ZqujqT9lUS4LNECQDz5eFc9uxXRN5ppY2G8bXoLZMM5xhl6OzKdUhdwKfOeYoI_83ZSPL0wib1By1FpPTfyu-9Utsx82v2zlWagdur1QoAtxOGuQ7HEXvQ68BPpOF9orvJWye-cLl2VYM0mbtU77_fnRYF52FHnttdBAKzHFElLrinO5cXEsOXbJG8HucxDmC8UUPMD9g4a6wTtrxDKLO79utYbq_yJwF6tRmBWBW7Tl_qV8uHwXc9U-WPwu0FLUh9Y56h9pcdCHUAd_ipFTb337VFcnKLQYrWmdsgZKQNRIK4CnNyz6UNm8mgJ16ytbRbMb7q1GBGUe-mWPgt5K-soi_lAmVv1Uds1407)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4838f69d36cf4d8593ce8810b3ff475c&_e=NYfB6GoE7WIOAzflCSz9dJejWQn6UKNIPG8uXk9vBJrNtbNWvYS29r60JnrFuhkb7ZwQk_AutXk78HfwZ9q7EesTo_ZqujqT9lUS4LNECQDz5eFc9uxXRN5ppY2G8bXoLZMM5xhl6OzKdUhdwKfOeYoI_83ZSPL0wib1By1FpPTfyu-9Utsx82v2zlWagdur1QoAtxOGuQ7HEXvQ68BPpOF9orvJWye-cLl2VYM0mbtU77_fnRYF52FHnttdBAKzHFElLrinO5cXEsOXbJG8HvG3pwiLvuiovJzuW_ITjzZA8-MHzS38Us8k4GpaRfQx7rEhi0CQ2hR-ZMIMWwQAlkwvtVUuvVwZsNn0Wl9TZtucigdDT400ABabiA23SMRq5_SvjLgKee4vZNBmjlRc6i_ZT9p0h1qXi8YM80b8Kh8jW6XU93iiVfApK4mpt5o-)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4838f69d36cf4d8593ce8810b3ff475c&_e=NYfB6GoE7WIOAzflCSz9dJejWQn6UKNIPG8uXk9vBJrNtbNWvYS29r60JnrFuhkb7ZwQk_AutXk78HfwZ9q7EesTo_ZqujqT9lUS4LNECQDz5eFc9uxXRN5ppY2G8bXoLZMM5xhl6OzKdUhdwKfOeYoI_83ZSPL0wib1By1FpPTfyu-9Utsx82v2zlWagdur1QoAtxOGuQ7HEXvQ68BPpOF9orvJWye-cLl2VYM0mbtU77_fnRYF52FHnttdBAKzHFElLrinO5cXEsOXbJG8Hth-MzFg50LF0FkXllqwMNnzBNE7jDKrLc7R6wSNbOmQ0wzARut3e_sxYAt9afuC64UD1dBlAxq5sCAsPK5GXF99L14oCm6pdGXlUxN3oDz29XxVFD7yIZYq7SRDntCGTiNsedL5gN7QEFRMhHI-ADipvbRp1j4aaN2oAxcygB_5).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. | | | This sponsored message from Defend The Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | - | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | Sent to Defend the Constitution subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Tina Smith
subject: John is doing exactly what he should do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
My experience taught me how important getting help can be.
#
Hi Derek, Senator Tina Smith from the great state of Minnesota here.
I know you’re a supporter of John Fetterman, and because of what he’s going through, I want to tell you my story.
In the short time I’ve worked with John, I’ve been struck by his resilience and heart. John is doing exactly what he should do, which is seek help.
Seeking help when you need it is a sign of strength, not weakness, something that John is demonstrating for all of us.
For people who have experienced depression, seeing someone else suffering can take you back to your own experience. If you are seeing the news about John, it may bring up old feelings for you. It did for me.
I can’t speak to John’s personal experience, and I’m not comparing my own struggles with depression to what he’s going through, because everyone is different. But I’ve learned that there’s a lot of good that comes from people like John and me speaking openly about our mental health challenges.
I first experienced depression in my late teens, and then again in my thirties when I was a young mom. For me, depression drained hope away, and the promise that I’d ever feel hopeful again. I couldn’t feel joy or love or contentment, and I couldn’t see a way I’d ever feel that way again.
So, I want to say that, if you or someone you know is feeling this way, there’s help, and you can feel better. **You can reach the National Suicide and Crisis Lifeline by dialing or texting 988.**
_It takes courage to ask for help, but you can do it._
My experience taught me how important getting help can be. And I also remember the experience of slowly emerging from depression: a little more energy every day. A little more capacity to pay attention to the people and things I love. The colors of the world came back.
I’m thinking of John and his family and wishing him the best. He has a terrific team around him in D.C. and back home in Pennsylvania. And while I can’t wait to see him back in the Senate, working on issues he cares so deeply about, I know he is doing the right thing—taking care of himself.
Yours,
Tina Smith
U.S. Senator, Minnesota
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230308-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230308-8280&refcode2=8280_434096_iPG31U&akid=8280%2E434096%2EiPG31U)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230308-8280-footer&t=1&refcode2=8280_434096_iPG31U&akid=8280%2E434096%2EiPG31U)**
---

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign the petition: Investigate and expel Elise Stefanik from Congress
body:
What did she know about George Santos?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T212e7329-ca02-4b8a-8dc4-bece02be26e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, The only thing we know for certain when it comes to George Santos is that he is an unrepentant liar and grifter.

However, no one gets to Congress on their own—especially an unknown like Santos. Enter House Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik. [**Sign the petition: Investigate and expel Elise Stefanik from Congress.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tafbec004-b3bf-4557-a809-aa857f3c6f28/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

According to reports, Santos’ lies were kind of an [open secret among Republicans](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8863b316-5de8-4ab0-81aa-8033b6c04e02/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). That didn't stop Stefanik, who as the third-ranking House Republican is the most influential elected member of the GOP in New York, from using her prolific fundraising prowess to convince donors to support his campaign. Many people [reportedly](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f617a3f-d87b-4652-887b-e6773201c36c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) contributed to Santos because she endorsed him and aggressively campaigned on his behalf.

Without her validation, Santos may not have made it to Congress. So it begs the question: What did Stefanik have to gain by supporting him?
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T91e31c71-d183-4f04-93ea-272172c27ed5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Santos is not the only reason Stefanik should be expelled. She was [catapulted](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9efaa2f6-e074-41ed-8e11-5d0de1ef762f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to a top House Republican leadership position after the GOP purged Liz Cheney from the role as punishment for speaking out against Donald Trump's violent attempted coup. Stefanik has since proven to have no moral boundaries whatsoever, eagerly embracing the farthest-right conspiracy theories culled from QAnon, from neo-Nazi groups, and other extremists.

The Nassau County Republican committee and other prominent Republicans have publicly denounced Santos. Stefanik has been suspiciously quiet. If nothing else, her ties to Santos must be thoroughly investigated. If it's found she also knowingly defrauded voters, she must also be expelled from Congress.

[**Sign the petition: Investigate and expel Elise Stefanik from Congress.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T515409b3-d769-4c70-b096-c9b2b8e4deae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17f9e672-8cf5-4063-b6fe-1e8322f7d9b0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: Today, we’re celebrating the strength of women everywhere
body:
Happy International Women's Day, Derek!
| | |
---
**Happy International Women's Day, Derek!**
From my early days as an ROTC cadet to then joining the Air Force to becoming the first woman ever to represent Pennsylvania's 6th District in Congress, I have consistently made it my mission to empower more women and girls everywhere.
Our ongoing work demands that we remain committed to issues like protecting women's reproductive rights and ensuring all women have the support they need to achieve their full potential.
But, we've made incredible progress in other important ways.

For one, I am thrilled that 2022 was a historic year for electing women to Congress, with a record number of female representation, including the landmark election of Philadelphia's Joanna McClinton as the first woman and second Black person to serve as speaker of the Pennsylvania House.

This is a significant milestone for women and minorities in our state, and I am excited to see the positive changes that Speaker McClinton will bring to our state and country.
And so much still needs to be done; I am dedicated to continuing the effort to empower women and girls everywhere. On this International Women's Day, I hope you'll join me in recommitting ourselves to the mission of achieving true gender equality.
There's work to be done.

– Chrissy

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Protecting abortion access has never been more important
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
It’s been nine months since the Supreme Court’s right-wing majority overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and wiped out abortion access for millions of Americans. Like many of you, I’m still angry — not only with Republicans whose actions have endangered the health and safety of millions, but also on behalf of women across the nation whose rights have been taken from them. But as I said last June, _I’m not giving up, Peter._ Abortion access is a fundamental right, and I’ll never stop fighting to protect it. **That’s why today, I’m re-introducing my bill to restore reproductive rights in the Senate, the _Women’s Health Protection Act_.** Across the country, far-right legislators and judges have stripped women of the right to make decisions about their own bodies. Right here in Wisconsin, we are stuck with a law from 1849 banning nearly _all_ abortions. **It’s not just ridiculous — it’s dangerous — and it’s time to take action at the federal level. ** The _Women’s Health Protection Act_ would preserve the right for patients to receive abortions and for providers to perform abortions — all without fear of prosecution or unfair restrictions. I will do everything in my power to get this legislation across the finish line and ensure women everywhere can get the health care they need — and I’m hoping you’ll be fighting right beside me to protect abortion access. [**Peter, will you sign onto my petition calling for the swift passage of the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ in the Senate and Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59887804/395382557/503833822?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230308_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTRiYjA1Mi1mNGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uNAJV5QiV2bJP-s9WBwHL3HjVossym4D7PO04O489eU=&emci=344bb052-f4bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=354bb052-f4bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=35007871) | | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59887805/395382559/503833822?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230308_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTRiYjA1Mi1mNGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uNAJV5QiV2bJP-s9WBwHL3HjVossym4D7PO04O489eU=&emci=344bb052-f4bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=354bb052-f4bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=35007871)
---
I’ll keep you closely updated on the progress of this legislation, Peter. Rest assured that I am doing everything I can to pass this bill and restore the right to choose.
Thank you for your early support of this bill,
Tammy
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---

P.O. Box 696
Madison, WI 53701

name: =?utf-8?Q?Governor=20Chris=20Christie?=
subject: You're Invited to a Conference on Criminal Justice and Bail Reform
body:
Law enforcement is a top issue on the minds of all New Jerseyans, in fact, of all Americans. | | |
---
|
---
| | | The Christie Institute for Public Policy cordially invites you to a conference on:
## Criminal Justice and Bail Reform - A New Jersey Case Study
---
|
---
| Law enforcement is a top issue on the minds of all New Jerseyans, in fact, of all Americans. There are current ongoing discussions about how bail reform has failed in New York and succeeded in New Jersey. While nothing is ever perfect, we thought it would be an appropriate time to review and critique our bail reform program after five years in existence.

We would be grateful for your input by attending our upcoming Christie Institute for Public Policy panel discussion at **Seton Hall Law School** in Newark on **Tuesday, March 21, at 7:00 p.m.** , preceded by a reception beginning at 6:00 p.m., also at the law school. We will have a substantial period for questions, answers, and audience commentary after our panel presentation. We have a great panel of experts who will take us through the last five years, from original ideas for reform through its implementation in our state.

Kindly register for the event at [www.christieinstitute.com](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=08cb1b35ae&e=65ae29fa7e). Tickets for the event for all our guests are complimentary. If you have any questions, please reach out to the Institute’s Executive Director Michele Brown at [mbrown@christieinstitute.com](mailto:mbrown@christieinstitute.com).

We hope you can join us.
---
|
---
| Chris Christie
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=8e0f9de029&e=65ae29fa7e)

name: Senate Republicans
subject: He should be ashamed of himself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
where is Senator Sherrod Brown? Rubbing elbows with Hollywood donors. | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f816c8f265dd4abdb5da482116734577&_e=GB2UXnOeS5uqnx_wQnYUEU97ZbSNLC0PTETFpPLkUd68_zTxQFwlgNs5oObEl4JvZJdGp0d7YLiNvl_f-yrng2Pm8jyfRPdDlxpKShMoXaUtacc8MW2707WyJVprAPHL5SBm7SdvCXM1XxMb1njKKceUdK9kJ6vLVJZ9dF6CeqL04YUV3vL1TKWWpbRDupAztIDtpJsmhidI_Ph6DP-pwJh8CwFPf2kYXc8iUa__8-x8xlQ5MV7KBKFI_Qhe2jwcOU8bPI3Kx7cK6L1xwgTQIsmpDDoE_CcEROyxZ-oqGLwNQ141pEsYrleRW_BQpwGvnxO26GvhIge_e5h0PBx_OwhwTrERSImbxsZuGgzKl5dcQzwb6cLlX_pAR9CbUKG1Xs88Mmg4fl2kyerR3tgD0t7ODbz-kFL8LognscGTc_lCwuTm4f_yolMJaYhF17l4T0QYjCOBcCkkcqeH9o42PA%3D%3D)

| | Fellow American,

While Ohio is facing the worst chemical spill in recent history, where is Senator Sherrod Brown? Rubbing elbows with Hollywood donors.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f816c8f265dd4abdb5da482116734577&_e=GB2UXnOeS5uqnx_wQnYUEU97ZbSNLC0PTETFpPLkUd68_zTxQFwlgNs5oObEl4JvZJdGp0d7YLiNvl_f-yrng2Pm8jyfRPdDlxpKShMoXaUtacc8MW2707WyJVprAPHL5SBm7SdvCXM1XxMb1njKKceUdK9kJ6vLVJZ9dF6CeqL04YUV3vL1TKWWpbRDupAztIDtpJsmhidI_Ph6DP-pwJh8CwFPf2kYXc8iUa__8-x8xlQ5MV7KBKFI_Qhe2jwcOU8bPI3Kx7cK6L1xwgTQIsmpDDoE_CcEROyxZ-oqGLzs1TM84J5s6y_chYIx2sAUcPC81ypIVvil72JW1qw4ExdsVmyUmWq-zzYe8BOMv2uHOSyzO6yUe9ZdbwyIWG-mpbsUBPGFXKT_Q6QgOsj4ixc6oFm2vFguoUqnZB5XFXeuOZePT7T5m2381h0Oj_bbg91APRh1VuongXRj8_eRvg%3D%3D)
---
Everyone knows that it requires a sizeable amount of money to run for one of the top targeted U.S. Senate races, **but there is a line politicians aught not to cross, and progressive Senator Sherrod Brown of Ohio just crossed it.**

Sherrod Brown is on the ballot next year, so it’s confusing to us that instead of providing on-the-ground support to Ohioans affected by the chemical explosion in East Palestine earlier this month, **he instead opted to fly to the Hollywood Hills for a fundraiser benefitting his reelection campaign.**
---
[**DEMAND ACCOUNTABILITY >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f816c8f265dd4abdb5da482116734577&_e=GB2UXnOeS5uqnx_wQnYUEU97ZbSNLC0PTETFpPLkUd68_zTxQFwlgNs5oObEl4JvZJdGp0d7YLiNvl_f-yrng2Pm8jyfRPdDlxpKShMoXaUtacc8MW2707WyJVprAPHL5SBm7SdvCXM1XxMb1njKKceUdK9kJ6vLVJZ9dF6CeqL04YUV3vL1TKWWpbRDupAztIDtpJsmhidI_Ph6DP-pwJh8CwFPf2kYXc8iUa__8-x8xlQ5MV7KBKFI_Qhe2jwcOU8bPI3Kx7cK6L1xwgTQIsmpDDoE_CcEROyxZ-oqGLyWIh9bFH6VkOLVx6gwuJP-YQ0sBXVrzLz_3XAXH9HE0B6fn0_3Z_icmI68hgIDdDx80w-gwkaj_yFmtZmsSuVblILJpdtMd5nk9NztSiqdr2IltNmmquNq55ATmtQ_K5_WNx3cASkEbWR53jAK4uKJtCTCH0AyWrD6c8myDGwWzQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Ohioans are looking for answers – they’re looking to their leaders at the federal level for guidance and support. It’s SHAMEFUL to see elected officials ignore their duty to the people they work for to attend fundraising events; **to do so in the aftermath of a disaster the likes of which we’ve just witnessed in Ohio is unforgiveable.**

Ohioans need a leader who they can turn to when they’re concerned and have questions, they need answers. By abandoning his state for a glitzy Hollywood fundraiser, **Sherrod Brown has demonstrated he’s no longer fit for the job he currently holds.**

**[If you agree that this member of the United States Senate should be removed from office, will you help us demand accountability and chip in $3 right now? ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f816c8f265dd4abdb5da482116734577&_e=GB2UXnOeS5uqnx_wQnYUEU97ZbSNLC0PTETFpPLkUd68_zTxQFwlgNs5oObEl4JvZJdGp0d7YLiNvl_f-yrng2Pm8jyfRPdDlxpKShMoXaUtacc8MW2707WyJVprAPHL5SBm7SdvCXM1XxMb1njKKceUdK9kJ6vLVJZ9dF6CeqL04YUV3vL1TKWWpbRDupAztIDtpJsmhidI_Ph6DP-pwJh8CwFPf2kYXc8iUa__8-x8xlQ5MV7KBKFI_Qhe2jwcOU8bPI3Kx7cK6L1xwgTQIsmpDDoE_CcEROyxZ-oqGLw9q3RAVTiZjQWh8EgxPh7lKgHvoa0jFTi4rXxHh5JzlEvJUUfzN4455Bhbk22XXyHDVfj0_rQV0URRon-FzTG91z96lbGvF4Zuo0PHKk54lGnN3_ZY_-1F3ST9EXnPKktwCDvwNlOakzfPYVZkwpsvjM36j9pSmz573hUy487kug%3D%3D)** Thank you,

clean_body: Keeping our hopes up | Friend, I know I can trust you about this—Conservatives are in trouble already. With the slimmest Conservative majority in the House in years, every seat counts to make sure we can push through our agenda. Democrats know this and are already raising millions of dollars on the promise that they will flip my district BLUE. Conservatives like me need Protect Our Conservative House Majority We need Americans – loyal patriots who understand what’s at stake – to help us protect and expand our House majority for the future of our country. I know that with you by my side, we can achieve victory and ensure that Conservatives can defend the House from the far left. Thank you, Rep. name: Sharice Davids
subject: We did it before, now we need to get back to work to protect abortion rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hey,

Today is International Women’s Day and I’m celebrating by reflecting on the work we did not only to fend off my anti-choice opponent last year, but to ensure Kansans’ rights are protected from the extreme bans we’ve seen in other states.

**Now, another potentially harmful case is looming within a Texas federal court. The result could be a nationwide ban on medication abortion.**

**_[That’s why I’m asking you to take a stand once again for reproductive rights. I’ve seen what we can do if this team puts our minds to it, so please sign your name to my petition before today’s holiday call-to-action is over:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59888686/395386401/-949106169?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230308_PT_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_abortion&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGVhOGQ5OC1mOGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UeIDm-Q0WlUxA7tBBY2D4QrYpsS1jzHq7Gtjz1Yaq5k=&emci=caea8d98-f8bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d4ea8d98-f8bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=22117458)_** | | [Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59888687/395386402/-949106169?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230308_PT_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_abortion&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGVhOGQ5OC1mOGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UeIDm-Q0WlUxA7tBBY2D4QrYpsS1jzHq7Gtjz1Yaq5k=&emci=caea8d98-f8bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d4ea8d98-f8bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=22117458)
---
**I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: No judge or politician has any business making medical decisions that should be left between individuals and their doctors.**

This ruling could have ramifications for the entire country at a time when more people than ever are having their rights taken away because of local bans.

**_[So please, sign on to show you’re with me and ready to fight→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59888688/395386403/-949106169?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230308_PT_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_abortion&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGVhOGQ5OC1mOGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UeIDm-Q0WlUxA7tBBY2D4QrYpsS1jzHq7Gtjz1Yaq5k=&emci=caea8d98-f8bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d4ea8d98-f8bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=22117458)_**

Thank you,
Sharice

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Eve of my Hearing Against Twitter and Facebook . . .
body:
This is HUGE news, because since I filed my lawsuit in May 2022, nearly everything I alleged in my original complaint has now been proven to be true and even admitted by Twitter's new CEO and owner,Elon Musk! | | | | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FfDDNG44FbOz4YbERP78lkg%2FB8ehm80HhAmsQgsmrdm3Jg/1/01000186c32b5855-6df6789b-2238-48ba-aaad-69b8a524a014-000000/L4Gl-pe7fHcHXkOdjGWJTQJN6Go=312) | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FfDDNG44FbOz4YbERP78lkg%2FB8ehm80HhAmsQgsmrdm3Jg/2/01000186c32b5855-6df6789b-2238-48ba-aaad-69b8a524a014-000000/2-PfcZ-bF2jAAhMdKG6lOTwdIu8=312) Dear Friend,

A vital hearing date for my RICO lawsuit against Twitter, Jack Dorsey, Facebook, and Mark Zuckerberg was scheduled for tomorrow.

The Big Tech Mafia was scheduled to be heard on their Motion to Dismiss, and **the outcome could have been devastating to my case.**

But today, **the judge cancelled the hearing** after my legal team and I filed an amended second complaint with all of the new allegations, proof, and supporting evidence for my lawsuit that has come to light due to the Twitter Hearings in Congress, and the "Twitter Files" data dump.

This is HUGE news, because since I filed my lawsuit in May 2022, **nearly everything I alleged in my original complaint has now been proven to be true and even admitted by Twitter 's new CEO and owner, Elon Musk! **

Twitter and Facebook were caught red-handed colluding with each other, and even with the federal government on a private cloud server to censor and silence conservatives while the Twitter Files released to various reporters by Elon Musk have clearly proven that Jack Dorsey and Mark Zuckerberg have been running criminal organizations for years, with the explicit goal of influencing society and manipulating the outcome of our elections.

So, good news! My case lives on, and my legal team and I will now need to furiously compile every piece of evidence and subpoena every witness we can track down in preparation for a possible trial.

[_Will you help cover my legal fees so I can be more aggressive in this fight?_](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FfDDNG44FbOz4YbERP78lkg%2FB8ehm80HhAmsQgsmrdm3Jg/3/01000186c32b5855-6df6789b-2238-48ba-aaad-69b8a524a014-000000/XEEJpPomqOjhCCF9bpjXsG0QKO8=312)

This year alone, Big Tech has been fully exposed for what they are, and my complaint proves it. Even before getting access to discovery, so much of the evidence that my legal team and I wanted access to has now been made public. These new revelations are incredibly DAMNING to the Big Tech Tyrants . . . and they know it!

They've lawyered up with the most expensive attorneys in the nation to fight me, including one of Barrack Obama's lawyers, because if I win, their liability will be through the roof just in my case alone . . . not to mention all of the future lawsuits filed by others that will likely follow.

[_So please, help me keep this fight going by donating today._](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FfDDNG44FbOz4YbERP78lkg%2FB8ehm80HhAmsQgsmrdm3Jg/4/01000186c32b5855-6df6789b-2238-48ba-aaad-69b8a524a014-000000/ZA0DNnHzIBcMqNH2qeJgyy02ZnE=312)

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---
| (C) 2023 Illoominate Media, 720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
Lake Worth, FL 33460

body:
Chances are, if you’ve seen someone sporting some Official DNC swag, it’s one of our best-selling items. Our store offers a wide range of products to help you showcase your support for Democrats. | |

name: Team NPP
subject: Celebrating International Women’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
We have come a long way, but the fight is far from over.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59888975/395387898/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230308IWD_N_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxMDA0Y2U3LWZhYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P03ZpoJyqULXhQn5xqi-o0QoyNbceswAenl76WhUZSY=)
| Fellow activist, Today, we are proud to celebrate International Women’s Day and Women’s History Month.

As we commemorate the two, we honor the extraordinary contributions women have made throughout history and continue to make today. Women have been fighting for their rights and equality for centuries, and their struggles have paved the way for progress and change.

Yet we also recognize the challenges women still face in the fight for gender equity. Women are still paid less than men for the same work, they are underrepresented in politics and leadership, and they face barriers to accessing healthcare and reproductive rights. We stand with our sisters in the fight for true gender equality and pledge to continue our work towards achieving this.

In particular, we would like to take this opportunity to once again celebrate Pennsylvania State Representative and NPP Board Member Joanna McClinton for becoming the first woman Speaker of the Pennsylvania State House of Representatives.

Her election was a giant step forward, and we are confident her leadership will not just break the glass ceiling, but truly advance women and the entire Commonwealth along the path to a better future. In solidarity,

Team NPP [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59888976/395387899/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230308IWD_N_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_Signoff&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxMDA0Y2U3LWZhYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P03ZpoJyqULXhQn5xqi-o0QoyNbceswAenl76WhUZSY=) | _The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. clean_body: We have come a long way, but the fight is far from over. = | Fellow activist, Today, we are proud to celebrate International Women’s Day and Women’s History Month. As we commemorate the two, we honor the extraordinary contributions women have made throughout history and continue to make today. Women have been fighting for their rights and equality for centuries, and their struggles have paved the way for progress and change. Yet we also recognize the challenges women still face in the fight for gender equity. Women are still paid less than men for the same work, they are underrepresented in politics and leadership, and they face barriers to accessing healthcare and reproductive rights. We stand with our sisters in the fight for true gender equality and pledge to continue our work towards achieving this. In particular, we would like to take this opportunity to once again celebrate Pennsylvania State Representative and NPP Board Member Joanna McClinton for becoming the first woman Speaker of the Pennsylvania State House of Representatives. Her election was a giant step forward, and we are confident her leadership will not just break the glass ceiling, but truly advance women and the entire Commonwealth along the path to a better future. In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A very personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor
in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.

Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going
to stand for that.

Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and
the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs
to name just two.

Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I
worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in
Congress.

The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht,
the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving
relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an
America that lives up to its ideals.

As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned
growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone.

I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re
going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18901?t=1001&akid=3037%2E346206%2EPo0zFd ]Can you please split a $25 contribution between Charles Booker and my
United States Senate campaign today? I would not ask if this was not so
important.

CHIP IN →

The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to
sleep in wouldn’t believe these last forty-eight hours. I’m not sure I do
yet, either.

Thank you, and adiós,

Ruben

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230308-3037-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3037_346206_Po0zFd&akid=3037%2E346206%2EPo0zFd

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3037%2E346206%2EPo0zFd

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Sean Themea
subject: Public schools are a government-run monopoly
body:
Public school unions are failing our students.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1e398f3fe6b343f58bc4e0fbbbdc8ea9&_e=Tl2oljZl3PtOIPeabrPpCUreuYhZYmQUNwBGaDOOBnHU3pJoo0ma3YC-9OuNkqjEqP0611N_pEVVZmkISDK4iaywl5C6PHcqGoDyMG17UdzTicvs3kM9aBryV6HlqiIJ4rC-jFlxNSxj4OntXGDNU4pruG1dzraFZ4CFeO59rxu8hEVQVLGuXh7ZBiSccICm12uwJ8AEulAYMwG_hra2yg52vtAjT4LOXqtpZZvtA0PHftQyVysqE_QfZTNpFq38rII9RYQS7uwzo3umCK1LJA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Public school unions are failing our students.

But brave parents, young activists, and legislators are fighting back.

School Choice is sweeping the nation, and Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is at the forefront of the battle.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Sean Themea, Chief of Staff at YAL. _**YAL is the nation 's largest, most active, and most effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty on campus and in American politics. **_

We're waging an aggressive national campaign to help pass School Choice legislation in states across America to ensure that 2023 is the Year of Education Freedom!

One of our key programs involves sending our activists to knock on doors and make phone calls to put pressure on weak-spined politicians.

Our goal this month is to raise $50,000 for our national efforts.

[_**Will you send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount and join YAL 's fight for freedom? **__**Click here**_ _**to rush your gift >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1e398f3fe6b343f58bc4e0fbbbdc8ea9&_e=Tl2oljZl3PtOIPeabrPpCUreuYhZYmQUNwBGaDOOBnHU3pJoo0ma3YC-9OuNkqjEqP0611N_pEVVZmkISDK4iaywl5C6PHcqGoDyMG17UdzTicvs3kM9aBryV6HlqiIJqLHW9Bu8AChhr1AcEaO5dV8HJbyz_k_WT5ISDEBoeZqaykygAnKVv5Yp8yBEuSzpzPmKc8XLbF5gq_YN7AMybIQRm0XVrGUhM5LjXfGRlfqfJ5NSoiWq_reYrko1g0DgYVoJhCcFk9r7pU3RHa1UoA%3D%3D)

The school shutdowns, mask mandates, vaccine mandates, school shootings, and woke curriculum have awoken a sleeping giant: the American Mom and Dad.

Parents throughout the United States have made it clear that they refuse to accept the status quo and are fighting for more educational freedom.

They have pushed back against the establishment and the teachers' unions for the past two years -- and won! Parents have made their voices heard across the country, from local school board races to governor's mansions.

Friend, parents are taking control of their children's education and paving the way for future generations to have better opportunities.

_" We have seen parents from all across the country come together and push for expanded School Choice at Young Americans for Liberty. This week, we have dozens of events happening across the country. **We have deployed door knockers, and we also have members of our Hazlitt Coalition, those liberty-minded legislators who are on the front lines of pushing for expanded educational freedom all across the country,** so the momentum is unlike anything I've seen."_

-- YAL's National School Choice Director Randan Steinhauser

School Choice leads to outcomes like:
* Educational freedom
* Better and safer schools
* More choices and improved outcomes
* Protection of parental rights
* Higher graduation rates

The current school system is little more than a government-run monopoly that stifles competition, innovation, creativity, and freedom.

[_**Help make 2023 the Year of School Choice in America. Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1e398f3fe6b343f58bc4e0fbbbdc8ea9&_e=Tl2oljZl3PtOIPeabrPpCUreuYhZYmQUNwBGaDOOBnHU3pJoo0ma3YC-9OuNkqjEqP0611N_pEVVZmkISDK4iaywl5C6PHcqGoDyMG17UdzTicvs3kM9aBryV6HlqiIJP4jV5zVPLAWBEuB4RteKaUwVEmyyCMm42JAcTUAgxhKPWT5zkbeyEX79PfWPEKLz6_io6YZ5v0lZmBYjUSXOBsKc4fheAqKuPn-x1V-fAjMgaBPI1CdUWIw8IJKOi21INB6OHB0T61Vo-ydQWsQLYg%3D%3D)

YAL has already contributed to School Choice victories. In Iowa, our Hazlitt Coalition of pro-liberty legislators and student activists made sure that legislators made no bad amendments to this universal School Choice bill.

And we're continuing the fight for universal School Choice in states like Idaho, Texas, Ohio, South Carolina, Arkansas, Missouri, Indiana, Georgia, South Dakota, Montana, Alabama, Kentucky, Tennessee, Oklahoma, and Florida!

**YAL is waging a war against teacher unions and their corrupt allies in the Department of Education. Can you join the fight today, Friend?**

Click any link below to help meet our goal of raising $50,000 this month to fuel our national efforts:

[_**Donate $10**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1e398f3fe6b343f58bc4e0fbbbdc8ea9&_e=Tl2oljZl3PtOIPeabrPpCUreuYhZYmQUNwBGaDOOBnHU3pJoo0ma3YC-9OuNkqjEqP0611N_pEVVZmkISDK4iaywl5C6PHcqGoDyMG17UdyR5VFqBnt7kcrRaOyW_oER7m31LwVK11GBRLl1Shza1sVuvFURrmQkGe5-4btLjcdfEOun-dZb0k_uabsBTu0ySmEHwtnnG5xY02kcTKigW4SD3GtD12YRnexgGnOjDBeFr2XR-4A4WvQMiEN2iPOc0_8rGN8Uvyvf7sX1kAveP5EbHBfSUch99PZuAUFo2KE%3D)

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Our 2023 youth fellows range in age from 14 to 17 and are 100% BIPOC.
body:
Over this 8-month fellowship, they’ll learn community centered organizing and how to stay rooted in the community. | | |
---
Friend, Young voters turned out in record numbers to fight for critical issues impacting their generation―from the climate crisis to access to higher education to jobs and wages and more. **The leaders of tomorrow are ready to lead now.** That’s exactly why we launched our youth civic engagement fellowship, to provide young people with the tools and resources to be organizers and leaders in their local community. **Our 2023 Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship launched in January, training 13 Fellows, ages 14 to 17 in areas ranging from grassroots organizing to communications.** Our Fellows are 100% BIPOC with 85% identifying as women, 7% men, and 7% non-binary. Each month, our Fellows come together to hear from grassroots and elected leaders, as well as to learn from each other, bringing their own individual experiences to this 8-month training. **One Fellow recently told us:**
> _“In the short time I’ve been in this fellowship I have witnessed immense love, strength, struggles, and power. Surrounded by my likeminded allies, I can clearly say this fellowship is one step in an ongoing marathon to success and prosperity.”_
[**We’re in the 3rd month of this 8 month training, with much more to come including trainings on environmental justice and education justice. Pitch in to my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC now to train the leaders of tomorrow today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yg2iGXkyQbkeXrcsVBa3n36OsJbKGt609Ht41LFK6A5pVOOuO9li3GCWCXS9XRFK3PLu82C1jK606CD3XXFKU2lZeh2UOkuLqHRgIIZlfRKv8iX8FpeJ3MY9DETikUpVP9A--dVfVkCQRI83Bt-8LC4hOv6fVCo0t-33dvGRq-fZNg8GQVV0X-3IUWxmay_j2PGodEDrL8ROqsxvlo6gaFvFeFtUAWSydwrkPPTFqhNRERy6cQCQXn15MFtsrJsAO7wkEMj0Gdi9CTsabudVa6v5noydVcP9fBtpjyEMJP2otFLT_UCIyqwHwfzDdTx4i8PSErLBodx0BUKzFlNKXOn8XtLP04m8ZYiZf7A4BMMWc6yNGHcirUlUD2Zn-5HMuU3tJLHqHqRtKp39OVnt93/3ub/ugh1j6kaRt2GUbRPZwtmYQ/h0/SV58ECCKS062M1eOce6cMdV4CvUL8qxp-zl6GJKhVDM) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to the Rooted In Community Leadership PAC_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yg2iGXkyQbkeXrcsVBa3n36OsJbKGt609Ht41LFK6A5pVOOuO9li3GCWCXS9XRFK2O51wWaJgPzokm4fEy37OCp4cOTwpbJbM3Bk4HgkZNvghE0ZyxYtLwua6jCjnqDClknqg82b0VjycXB0v1qayMUrUOPxWqh1E4GFaNa5ebGle2WVXPvJDcgZ5yKc2s62-RVHDUScgz-PofizEETCOkLnOheckbKsPdV_iUpgEjFdyiM12GRZQmFibazrlTXlDJMaQvF53v1MvfRbY6-9gvl-GAwvEAmVLUTXMeBfgtiEaQHVvJg2JymtpeQVS-cKOCYJ8nNgypm2vCDQTHLhOKuT6D-26LJdj1QHgTp1sb1eFSlxFfBshsRGWcNuPS7RasPx2d2b8BOxgRg04Ry19wz5kh8Fr9114pTudmqUhhSlqoUgj1pBcJo1lPkl3TPwGWGjULkjY_Xe1qYUXiyrMr/3ub/ugh1j6kaRt2GUbRPZwtmYQ/h1/iIBFBcYMs-GbFkuhO1FmjTQVKEhtxnyVAxEtWbh9tLY)

clean_body: Over this 8-month fellowship, they’ll learn community centered organizing and how to stay rooted in the community. | | | Friend, Young voters turned out in record numbers to fight for critical issues impacting their generation―from the climate crisis to access to higher education to jobs and wages and more. The leaders of tomorrow are ready to lead now. That’s exactly why we launched our youth civic engagement fellowship, to provide young people with the tools and resources to be organizers and leaders in their local community. Our 2023 Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship launched in January, training 13 Fellows, ages 14 to 17 in areas ranging from grassroots organizing to communications. Our Fellows are 100% BIPOC with 85% identifying as women, 7% men, and 7% non-binary. Each month, our Fellows come together to hear from grassroots and elected leaders, as well as to learn from each other, bringing their own individual experiences to this 8-month training. One Fellow recently told us: “In the short time I’ve been in this fellowship I have witnessed immense love, strength, struggles, and power. Surrounded by my likeminded allies, I can clearly say this fellowship is one step in an ongoing marathon to success and prosperity.” If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to the Rooted In Community Leadership PAC | | | | | | | | | | Together, we are empowering the next generation to fight for their future and ours. In solidarity, Rashida | Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003, not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee. | | Sent via . name: Mark Takano
subject: re: International Women’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
| **Peter, today is International Women’s Day.**

At a time when women and other vulnerable groups are facing increasing attacks from far-right political factions, we need to speak up about women’s rights at every moment we can. [**Will you sign my petition joining me in recommitting to the fight for abortion rights? I need 10,000 Democrats to sign on and make our voices heard. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59891127/395395580/-631408116?refcode=MTFC_20230308_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjY3ZjY4Ni0wNGJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NOcju5usG0_VpkkLTsAgcBvf917lzAdAwS7ynS0yOEg=&emci=1550e8d0-d7bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6267f686-04be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=18839602) | [SIGN ON NOW TO RECOMMIT TO THE FIGHT FOR ABORTION RIGHTS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59891128/395395581/-631408116?refcode=MTFC_20230308_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjY3ZjY4Ni0wNGJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NOcju5usG0_VpkkLTsAgcBvf917lzAdAwS7ynS0yOEg=&emci=1550e8d0-d7bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6267f686-04be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=18839602)
---
Peter, we’ve seen how the decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and end abortion access for millions of women has caused so much _**pain and fear for so many working and marginalized families.**_

I am deeply frustrated that our political system has allowed this destruction of American rights – flying in the face of public opinion and American democracy itself.

**That’s why today, on International Women’s Day, I’m recommitting to the fight for abortion rights – today and every day.**[**Will you join my fight? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59891129/395395582/-631408116?refcode=MTFC_20230308_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjY3ZjY4Ni0wNGJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NOcju5usG0_VpkkLTsAgcBvf917lzAdAwS7ynS0yOEg=&emci=1550e8d0-d7bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6267f686-04be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=18839602)
**[SIGN ON NOW TO RECOMMIT TO THE FIGHT FOR ABORTION RIGHTS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59891130/395395583/-631408116?refcode=MTFC_20230308_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjY3ZjY4Ni0wNGJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NOcju5usG0_VpkkLTsAgcBvf917lzAdAwS7ynS0yOEg=&emci=1550e8d0-d7bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6267f686-04be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=18839602)**
---
Thank you,

_Mark_
| | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517
www.marktakano.com

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. name: Jacqueline Coleman
subject: How far we've come.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Together, we can keep making positive change for women. I want to wish you a happy International Women's Day, Peter!

Today, we recognize International Women's Day to celebrate the achievements of women worldwide, and take time to acknowledge how far we have come, where we're headed, and how we can continue working together to create an inclusive, safe, and equitable world.

Andy and I both have young daughters, and we are committed to ensuring our commonwealth provides them with the same rights and opportunities as everyone else. That's why we have been working to invest in public education, health care, and an economy that works for everyone. These are policies that lift up girls and women and allow us to access our full potential.

We've made great progress since the first International Women's Day, but we still have a long road ahead. So please join me today in celebrating our achievements, and recommit to the fight for equality.

Thank you,

Jacqueline
Lieutenant Governor [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59891257/395396687/1737192232?refcode=em23_230308_IWD_engg_gq_act___JC_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230308_IWD_engg_gq_act___JC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=34223&refcode2=86d515f7-04be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmQ1MTVmNy0wNGJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KS3XALi01koGuGsZbiak1ktm2AOQWkulwh-arCdTayo=)

name: Letitia James
subject: On International Women’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59891473/395397011/475085866?refcode=jtk993-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWQ1MTVmNy0wNGJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=snVKM9biIvDH8h9FSD7XYjGKXCBnZLdRzD98yvSZ8VU=)
---
Peter, this International Women’s Day, I wanted to take a moment to celebrate all of the progress we’ve made toward gender equality in America – and bring awareness to all the obstacles that still stand in our path.

**In some ways, this last year was _groundbreaking_ for gender equality.**** **

For the first time in our nation’s history: A Black woman is serving as a Justice on our nation’s highest court, _12_ women are currently serving as governors this year, _149_ women are serving in the 118th Congress and _94_ women, including me, are serving in statewide elective executive offices.
**But in other ways, the fight for gender equality was _severely_****wounded last year. **

Women and pregnant people in America have fewer reproductive rights today than they did 50 years ago. Women are ___still_ fighting for equal pay with little progress – especially Black women, who are making just 63 cents to every dollar earned by a white man. And, alarmingly, 8 out of every 10 women have reported experiencing some form of sexual harassment or assault in their lifetime.

Peter, I’m proud of the progress we’ve made so far for gender equality – but clearly, we still have a long, hard fight ahead of us. That’s why I’m committed to the fight for reproductive freedom, equal pay, and combating harassment, and I hope you’ll join me.
[**This International Women’s Day, can I count on you to donate $5 or more right now to power my fight for gender equality, reproductive rights, and progress for all?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59891476/395397016/-1997846888?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk993-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWQ1MTVmNy0wNGJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=snVKM9biIvDH8h9FSD7XYjGKXCBnZLdRzD98yvSZ8VU=)

clean_body: | | | = Peter, this International Women’s Day, I wanted to take a moment to celebrate all of the progress we’ve made toward gender equality in America – and bring awareness to all the obstacles that still stand in our path. In some ways, this last year was groundbreaking for gender equality. For the first time in our nation’s history: A Black woman is serving as a Justice on our nation’s highest court, 12 women are currently serving as governors this year, 149 women are serving in the 118th Congress and 94 women, including me, are serving in statewide elective executive offices. But in other ways, the fight for gender equality was severelywounded last year. Women and pregnant people in America have fewer reproductive rights today than they did 50 years ago. Women are _still fighting for equal pay with little progress – especially Black women, who are making just 63 cents to every dollar earned by a white man. And, alarmingly, 8 out of every 10 women have reported experiencing some form of sexual harassment or assault in their lifetime. Peter, I’m proud of the progress we’ve made so far for gender equality – but clearly, we still have a long, hard fight ahead of us. That’s why I’m committed to the fight for reproductive freedom, equal pay, and combating harassment, and I hope you’ll join me. = | | = Thank you for being by my side. Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump’s CPAC attack on me made it clear - he doesn’t want me anywhere near the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1909%2E5257348%2EYrrQ_5 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, Donald Trump’s predictable attacks against me were once
again the centerpiece of his keynote speech at the Conservative Political
Action Conference this weekend.

But it’s not just me. Imitating the cadence of his racist attack on
immigrants from the start of his first presidential campaign, Trump made
another dangerous attack on the press:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230308_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=1909%2E5257348%2EYrrQ_5 ]Trump giving a speech at CPAC

“They make up Russia, Russia, Russia, which was a plan made up by crooked
Hillary Clinton, Adam Shifty Schiff, and the Democrats, the DNC...remember
Schiff...he repeated the call like I was a gangster, over and over again,
“quid pro quo”...These guys, they’re sick, they’re sick people...Adam Shifty
Schiff comes out from a very secretive room, Intelligence Committee or
whatever, and he meets the press right in front, the press is going crazy,
they’re going crazy because they’ll do anything to hurt Trump, anything.
They’re evil people (in many cases, some cases they’re great people), but
a lot of evil people.”

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230308_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=1909%2E5257348%2EYrrQ_5 ]Derek, as Trump and his MAGA rivals compete for attention and
the GOP presidential nomination, they will attempt to outdo each other
with more brazen and dangerous attacks not only on me, but the free press
and our democracy at large. These attacks are not OK. That’s why your
support to help us respond today is so important. Chip in if you can:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=mar2023_abs_em.5OS6KE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230308_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=1909%2E5257348%2EYrrQ_5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230308_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=1909%2E5257348%2EYrrQ_5 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I won’t stand idly by while Trump continues his assault on the free press
and the First Amendment. They are central to our democracy, and must be
defended.

Thanks for doing your part to help today,

— Adam

subject: Someone who wants civil war should NOT be allowed to set homeland security policy.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEMOCRATS WIN SEATS PAC
body:
|
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59891982/395399176/-1079005579?source=2023RemoveMTG_DWSP&referrer=group-democrats-win-seats-pac&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwspac-upsell23&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230307_PT_1.1_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_MTGJA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWUwNjA0My0wN2JlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=smvFsSq2jXxw0N_5kVCVWR5puOc-KMcr8GJppD1ugTg=&emci=1ae06043-07be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=25e06043-07be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5260669)
Have you heard about this, Peter?

**Marjorie Taylor Greene just called for a “national divorce” between red and blue states.**

This isn’t the first time Greene has called for civil disobedience. She’s gone so far as to support calls to **execute** Democratic leaders. She said that she would have “won” on January 6 because they would have been **armed** if she led it.

Her rhetoric is dangerous and unfortunately, impactful. And what’s worse?

While she’s sparking violence, Speaker McCarthy has rewarded her with a position on the high profile House Homeland Security Committee—the committee that exists to keep the United States safe and secure.

**We can’t believe we have to say this, but anyone who publicly endorses the dissolution of the United States has no place setting policy for our homeland security._[This is urgent, Peter. Sign the petition today to demand Marjorie Taylor Greene be removed from U.S. House committees immediately.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59891983/395399177/-1079005579?source=2023RemoveMTG_DWSP&referrer=group-democrats-win-seats-pac&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwspac-upsell23&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230307_PT_1.1_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_MTGJA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWUwNjA0My0wN2JlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=smvFsSq2jXxw0N_5kVCVWR5puOc-KMcr8GJppD1ugTg=&emci=1ae06043-07be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=25e06043-07be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5260669)_** | | ****_******[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59891984/395399178/-1079005579?source=2023RemoveMTG_DWSP&referrer=group-democrats-win-seats-pac&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwspac-upsell23&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230307_PT_1.1_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_MTGJA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWUwNjA0My0wN2JlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=smvFsSq2jXxw0N_5kVCVWR5puOc-KMcr8GJppD1ugTg=&emci=1ae06043-07be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=25e06043-07be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5260669)******_****

We have seen the GOP cower to Rep. Greene’s tantrums in the past. This cannot be ignored. Rep. Greene must, once again, be stripped of committee assignments on the basis of her extremely harmful rhetoric.

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

We are less than one month away from the
Chicago Mayoral runoff, and the battle between progressive Brandon Johnson
and corporate "Democrat" Paul Vallas is the first big test of the power of
progressives in the 2023 election cycle.

Paul Vallas is as bad as it gets. As head of Chicago's public schools, he
depleted the teachers' pension fund, closed critical neighborhood schools,
and consistently put profit over educating kids. Republican donors and the
head of the Fraternal Order of Police support him, including their leader,
who openly praised the January 6 rioters.

His opponent, Our Revolution-backed Brandon Johnson, is a former union
organizer and teacher committed to providing "reliable transportation,
good paying jobs, affordable housing" to Chicago's residents.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8411?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230307_FR_Chicago_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Mayor&t=1011&akid=4099%2E5885482%2Ej2FEps ]That's why we need your help mobilizing our nearly 100,000 Our
Revolution members in Chicago to get out and vote. Can we count on you to
pitch in to help fund our organizing campaign to make 250,000 voter
contacts ahead of the April 4 runoff?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8434?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230307_FR_Chicago_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Mayor&t=1012&akid=4099%2E5885482%2Ej2FEps ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8435?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230307_FR_Chicago_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Mayor&t=1013&akid=4099%2E5885482%2Ej2FEps ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »

Chicago is one of America's most prominent cities, and a win for
progressives here would shake the corporate establishment to its core.

That's why Our Revolution is going all-out to ensure Brandon Johnson wins.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8411?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230307_FR_Chicago_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Mayor&t=1018&akid=4099%2E5885482%2Ej2FEps ]With less than a month left, every day is critical. Please rush a
donation to help scale up our campaign to elect a progressive mayor in
Chicago!

When we organize, we win!

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59892420/395400642/-1392034954?refcode=X_030823_Frisch_Tandem_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDIyN2MyNC0wOWJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGiylBoct2gI9rA59ZSHe2MM0sIfWgeaev7tcH_0RAo=) **** Hello, Well, it didn’t take long. **The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from her national Republican allies began.** It’s no mystery why: Last year, I lost to Boebert by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. And unless they lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win in 2024. Here’s the thing, though. I’m not running to represent myself like Boebert. I’m not going to be a part of the circus in Washington. I’m running because the people of Western and Southern Colorado deserve someone in Congress who will wake up every day ready to work for them and their families – not corporate PAC donors. I’m ready to put forward a positive vision for our district and our country, but I need your help to make sure we don’t get drowned out by Boebert’s lies. **We’ve set a goal of getting 25,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to win, but right now we’re still short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on you to chip in now:** [**Please, if you’re able to, will you split $10 or more right now between my campaign and Michael Bennet's – any amount you can afford – to help us hit our goal and defeat Lauren Boebert?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59892421/395400643/-631220794?refcode=X_030823_Frisch_Tandem_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDIyN2MyNC0wOWJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGiylBoct2gI9rA59ZSHe2MM0sIfWgeaev7tcH_0RAo=) Lauren Boebert may have the special interests behind her, but I have something even more powerful: You. Thank you for being a part of our grassroots campaign. _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Adam Frisch & Michael Bennet will go through immediately:_ | | | ******[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59892422/395400644/-631220794?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=X_030823_Frisch_Tandem_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDIyN2MyNC0wOWJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGiylBoct2gI9rA59ZSHe2MM0sIfWgeaev7tcH_0RAo=)******

clean_body: | = ** Hello, Well, it didn’t take long. The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from her national Republican allies began. It’s no mystery why: Last year, I lost to Boebert by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. And unless they lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win in 2024. Here’s the thing, though. I’m not running to represent myself like Boebert. I’m not going to be a part of the circus in Washington. I’m running because the people of Western and Southern Colorado deserve someone in Congress who will wake up every day ready to work for them and their families – not corporate PAC donors. I’m ready to put forward a positive vision for our district and our country, but I need your help to make sure we don’t get drowned out by Boebert’s lies. We’ve set a goal of getting 25,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to win, but right now we’re still short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on you to chip in now: = Lauren Boebert may have the special interests behind her, but I have something even more powerful: You. Thank you for being a part of our grassroots campaign. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Adam Frisch & Michael Bennet will go through immediately: | | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** With gratitude - Adam Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Ayanna & AOC Teams
subject: It’s long past time to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The momentum behind efforts to advance gender justice is growing.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230308-3979-header&t=1&akid=3979%2E2526796%2EmVZGib)
On this International Women’s Day, the momentum behind efforts to advance gender justice is growing.
Last month, Representative Ayanna Pressley co-led a historic resolution to affirm the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) and finally enshrine gender equality in our Constitution.
Then last week, the U.S. Senate held its first ERA hearing in 40 years.
Now, we need to keep up the pressure on Congress to pass Ayanna’s resolution and ensure the Constitution affirms that women are equal in the eyes of the law.
[**Will you take the first step and show your support for the Equal Rights Amendment by adding your name to our petition alongside Alexandria’s and Ayanna’s?**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/era-sign-on/?source=em20230308-3979-P_ENG_SPL_MIS&t=2&akid=3979%2E2526796%2EmVZGib)
**[Add your name →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/era-sign-on/?source=em20230308-3979-P_ENG_SPL_MIS&t=3&akid=3979%2E2526796%2EmVZGib)**
The Equal Rights Amendment would give women in every community across the country an essential tool to combat discrimination and violence — from pay and pregnancy discrimination to sexual and domestic violence.
38 states have ratified the Equal Rights Amendment, but because of an arbitrary deadline established in the 1970s, it hasn’t been added to the Constitution.
There’s no time limit on equality. That’s why Ayanna’s resolution would remove the deadline for ratification and pave the way for the ERA to take its rightful place as part of the Constitution.
[**We need the ERA now. If you agree, add your name and join Ayanna, Alexandria, and a broad coalition of folks across the country fighting for gender equality.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/era-sign-on/?source=em20230308-3979-P_ENG_SPL_MIS&t=4&akid=3979%2E2526796%2EmVZGib)
In solidarity,
Team Ayanna & Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230308-1?refcode=em20230308-3979-P_ENG_SPL_MIS&t=5&refcode2=3979_2526796_mVZGib&akid=3979%2E2526796%2EmVZGib)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230308-3979-P_ENG_SPL_MIS&t=6&akid=3979%2E2526796%2EmVZGib)**

American Action Network, a dark money issue advocacy group tied to House Speaker Kevin McCarthy, is targeting Yadira Caraveo with **$115,000** worth of ads that lie about her position on Medicare spending.

**Allow us to be clear: Yadira will not support plans to cut Medicare or Social Security – which millions of Coloradans rely on.** This is simply the latest attempt by the GOP to discredit her work.

Yadira has spent her career caring for her community as a doctor and standing up for hardworking families — her record speaks for itself. **[Peter, we need the full strength of our incredible team to help us fight back. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress

| | Folks, what my team and I have been warning of for months has finally happened: **I officially have my first Republican opponent running against me.** This means that our re-election campaign starts right now, and you can bet that this won’t be the last Republican to jump in the race to defeat me. I can’t do this without your support. I’m asking: [**Will you chip in any amount you can to help power my campaign and stop my GOP opponent from flipping NV-03 dark red?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59892749/395402420/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230308_FR_NEWOPPONENT_A0_NA_U2_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzc2MWRjYS0wY2JlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_o2xJHsIEo8_kaS9JsN7SVXDQ1deE9ECMqQHOcTx3U=) | | | [Chip in: Keep Nevada Blue >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59892750/395402421/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230308_FR_NEWOPPONENT_A0_NA_U2_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzc2MWRjYS0wY2JlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_o2xJHsIEo8_kaS9JsN7SVXDQ1deE9ECMqQHOcTx3U=)

Even though my opponent launched her campaign just this morning, that hasn’t stopped her from getting a head start on the false attacks that she plans to run against me.
In an interview with _The Nevada Globe_ , she unleashed a string of lies about my record and talked in circles about her plan to represent folks across our district. So, here’s what I can tell you for certain: _That’s not what Nevadans want from their representative._
Nevadans deserve a fighter who will go to bat for them. It’s why I’m proud to stand behind my record of fighting for working families, strengthening public education, and reinvigorating our water supply.
But all of this doesn’t change the fact that the Republican Party is going to spend as much as it takes to unseat me. The only thing stopping them from winning this seat is your support.
[**Starting today, this campaign is in full swing and we need to double down on our efforts. I’m asking you to please chip in to help my team and I fight back against my new, far-right opponent and the blatant lies she’s spreading about my record.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59892751/395402422/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230308_FR_NEWOPPONENT_A0_NA_U2_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzc2MWRjYS0wY2JlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_o2xJHsIEo8_kaS9JsN7SVXDQ1deE9ECMqQHOcTx3U=)

clean_body: | = | | Folks, what my team and I have been warning of for months has finally happened: I officially have my first Republican opponent running against me. This means that our re-election campaign starts right now, and you can bet that this won’t be the last Republican to jump in the race to defeat me. I can’t do this without your support. I’m asking: = | | | = Even though my opponent launched her campaign just this morning, that hasn’t stopped her from getting a head start on the false attacks that she plans to run against me. In an interview with The Nevada Globe , she unleashed a string of lies about my record and talked in circles about her plan to represent folks across our district. So, here’s what I can tell you for certain: That’s not what Nevadans want from their representative. Nevadans deserve a fighter who will go to bat for them. It’s why I’m proud to stand behind my record of fighting for working families, strengthening public education, and reinvigorating our water supply. But all of this doesn’t change the fact that the Republican Party is going to spend as much as it takes to unseat me. The only thing stopping them from winning this seat is your support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for acting fast to keep NV-03 blue, Susie Lee | | = We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: CaucusRoom
subject: America is Fed Up
body:
Why is Kamala so cringy? No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qkyujkk-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyujkk-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Wednesday! CaucusRoom CEO, Matt Knoedler was on the Frontier Freedom Podcast last week.[Check it out here.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyujkk-trhiujldw-y/)**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyujkk-trhiujldw-j/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyujkk-trhiujldw-t/) **Heading Down a Wrong Path** China and 'reckless' America are**[heading for a 'catastrophic' conflict if Washington 'continues to speed down the wrong path](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyujkk-trhiujldw-i/),' **a Beijing foreign minister warned in his first news conference since taking office. **Denied** A federal court ruled that **[Twitter cannot publicly reveal the number of times the FBI asks it to provide information](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyujkk-trhiujldw-d/)** for national security investigations. **Cringy Kamala** [**Kamala Harris shared a childhood memory to bash conservatives**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyujkk-trhiujldw-h/) Monday that made Twitter users cringe and suggest it was completely made up. **Banning Masks in NYC** NYC Mayor Eric Adams is **[asking business owners to order patrons to remove their face masks](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyujkk-trhiujldw-k/)** when entering businesses to reduce shoplifting. _And just like that, masks are bad._ **Hope for Clarity** The purpose of releasing the footage from Jan 6th should be obvious: [**Americans deserve to know the unvarnished truth about the Capitol breach**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyujkk-trhiujldw-u/)--an event that has been used to justify the Left's sprawling, civil liberties-eviscerating War on Wrongthink. **America is Fed Up** **[Has the progressive fever broken?](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyujkk-trhiujldw-o/)** Are Democrats finally abandoning the crazy policies that have delivered damaging inflation, soaring crime, unsustainable illegal immigration, and failing schools?

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyujkk-trhiujldw-x/)!**
* Just **[pretending](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyujkk-trhiujldw-m/)**.
* **[White powder](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyujkk-trhiujldw-c/)!**
* If he**[only had a brain](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyujkk-trhiujldw-q/).**

[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyujkk-trhiujldw-a/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyujkk-trhiujldw-f/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyujkk-trhiujldw-z/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyujkk-trhiujldw-v/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
800 Washington Ave Ste C
Golden, CO 80401 You are receiving this email because you are a valued member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-qkyujkk-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-s) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-u-qkyujkk-trhiujldw-g/)
